name: Team Virginians For Fair Elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Virginians for Fair Elections
body:
We need your support today.
# [](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/629?refcode=em20260402-431&t=2&akid=431%2E12592%2EzbFQG9)
**$3****.**
**$3** is how much we are asking you to donate to support the YES campaign for redistricting in Virginia.
**$3** goes a long way in supporting our on-the-ground work in Virginia, it helps us reach voters across the Commonwealth, and cut through Republican misinformation.
**$3** helps us keep our ads like this one running:
[](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260402_2.cRGR2s&amount=3&refcode=20260402-431&t=3&akid=431%2E12592%2EzbFQG9)
[**Watch the full ad by clicking here >>>**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260402_2.cRGR2s&amount=3&refcode=20260402-431&t=4&akid=431%2E12592%2EzbFQG9)
**$3** today helps us cross the finish line on Election Day and know that we left it all on the table.
[**Are you with us? Donate $3 if you’re able right now. We’re only 19 days away from Election Day on April 21, and we don’t have time to slow down.**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260402_2.cRGR2s&amount=3&refcode=20260402-431&t=5&akid=431%2E12592%2EzbFQG9)
**[Donate $3 ››](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260402_2.cRGR2s&amount=3&refcode=20260402-431&t=24&akid=431%2E12592%2EzbFQG9)**
Onwards,
Team Virginians For Fair Elections

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_vafe_2026_footer?refcode=em&t=25&refcode2=431_12592_zbFQG9&akid=431%2E12592%2EzbFQG9)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=26&akid=431%2E12592%2EzbFQG9)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://vafe.actionkit.com/signup/update-contact-information/?&t=27&akid=431%2E12592%2EzbFQG9)

name: John Cornyn
subject: I need you to hear me out on this

name: Eileen for Colorado
subject: Eileen Laubacher Officially on the Ballot, Marks Turning Point in Fight Against Boebert
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE****Date:** April 2, 2026 **Contact:**[ Taylor Gillespie](mailto:taylorg@eileenforcolorado.com), 720-557-6185
---
| | **Eileen Laubacher Officially on the Ballot, Marks Turning Point in Fight Against Boebert**
---
| | **Highlands Ranch -** Retired Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher officially secured her place on the primary ballot, becoming the **only** Democratic candidate and marking a decisive turning point in the campaign to defeat Lauren Boebert. With this milestone, the campaign will now focus its full time, resources, and energy on what matters most: winning in November. Over the past eight months, Laubacher’s campaign has built an inclusive, energized coalition - engaging veterans, first-time caucus-goers, unaffiliated voters, frustrated Republicans and lifelong Democrats - proving that more unites Coloradans than divides them.“The fight for Colorado starts today,” **Retired Rear Admiral Eileen Laubacher said.** “This milestone marks a new phase—one where all our energy, strategy, and focus goes into the work that matters most: defeating Lauren Boebert and delivering real leadership that shows up and gets things done.”In stark contrast, Boebert has repeatedly failed to show up for the people of this district, leaving critical issues—like skyrocketing gas prices, unaffordable healthcare, and rising grocery costs—unaddressed. She has proven herself incompetent, incapable, ineffective, and unwilling to do the work Coloradans deserve. Eileen Laubacher will be the representative in Congress who shows up, works for the people, and fixes what Boebert has left broken.“I want to thank the voters, volunteers, and community leaders who have shown their support and confidence throughout this campaign,”**Laubacher said**. “I also want to acknowledge the other candidates and all of their passionate supporters who stepped up and competed. They strengthened the conversation and energized our base. Now, with the ballot secured, we will come together around a common goal: delivering leadership that works for the people and defeating Lauren Boebert in November.”This campaign is for everyone in the district. Democrats, progressives, independents, Republicans, and anyone frustrated with the broken system all have a place here. What unites Coloradans are the challenges they share, and by coming together around those shared problems, this campaign is delivering leadership that listens, shows up, and gets results for the people. Coloradans from across the district who feel like things are headed in the wrong direction and want to send a message that we need to change course immediately have their champion in Eileen Laubacher.**##**
---

---

name: Deb Haaland
subject: this is urgent, friend
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=8735%2E400544%2ExrBWNv)
---
This is urgent, friend: The first vicious attack ad of the cycle was launched against me and it is full of lies and misinformation to sway voters and tear down our momentum. **If we don't fight back ASAP, it could cost us this race and FLIP New Mexico red._[Could you please rush $10 now to keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7307?refcode=jtk534-fr-nd&t=2&akid=8735%2E400544%2ExrBWNv)_ **
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7306?refcode=jtk534-fr-nd&t=3&akid=8735%2E400544%2ExrBWNv)
---
It has never been more essential, friend, to ensure New Mexico has a Democratic governor. Even in the last few days, Trump has reiterated how much power, not people, is his priority. He’s willing to continue an illegal war at the expense of your Medicare, Medicaid, and childcare. And now he’s trying to use the Supreme Court to do his dirty work, pushing to rewrite our Constitution and even casting doubt on whether Native Americans are birthright citizens.
They know if I’m in office, I’ll stop them. That’s exactly why they’re coming after me now.
This attack ad comes on top of reports saying that our race in New Mexico is one of the best pickup opportunities for Republicans.They're gearing up to spend MILLIONS to buy this seat and bring their extremist agenda into our state — _all because they know governors are the last line of defense when the federal government abuses its power._
And now, they've launched a massive smear campaign on the airwaves because it's the only way they think they can win. **But with our rights, freedoms, and communities on the line, I refuse to back down without a fight.**
**That's why my team and I just set a $15,000 rapid-response goal to ensure we have the money to fight back against these lies, and I'm personally asking for your grassroots support to help us reach it before midnight tonight.
_
[Will you please rush $10 now to help me fight back, win in November, and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7307?refcode=jtk534-fr-nd&t=4&akid=8735%2E400544%2ExrBWNv)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/7306?refcode=jtk534-fr-nd&t=5&akid=8735%2E400544%2ExrBWNv)
---
Be fierce,

Deb
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1101?t=6&akid=8735%2E400544%2ExrBWNv)
---

**🚨 THEY'RE HUNTING OUR BORDER AGENTS. THIS ENDS NOW.**

Patriot, let me tell you something that ought to make your blood boil.

[**Armed Mexican drug cartels are now hunting U.S. Border Patrol agents.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/YpFNfC-kTwIvwwYH_Z8zuzIg0PsQhaHG5Nr_nba__hpIKE3Oqh4YNv4QUvD5nEsD9PTN1MbOtu9XNn-mTeFncCROJKBtb6JYtIfXl8adOetzpnJ3OudvEakTe5RSDmcfd1Q3bZUK2HdlEavF8_1xdQLEPbio5qJl-n2lcMhxKfXKN9ciVfJZNICksbrEj5EljrqMv-WAyGC8jPYbPBk7HDFwh_PcnChY18DvBcNMzMkyWntitDUm9gk5AcNY8EKd53wJJfz6Z4Cix-72OqIZVHdVZyBnxGX_ul1PpqSWigBbpeeZRT_dlWEWKcGRlYERnAr3kAt8xwgAI_FGztnyyjVlc2L2dcsStHhBuoXljpBXuiG5cVtm2NSvknaks470KM31MMvtIDwyfrAlVyGTzF-XEE-rYlpPZBeHvLy6AcM-fgI_GPNd9NPsCJbOYLhS0bP8MZNZE7g-UtR3uVcdMIISltqMr7xO6MDu_mjnunfWIDb8ij7C-e8G49l6bX9w4LmMCiz8KvwSKclA-cCOH7TKCOePk0LaaPNpfvyLGx_RMONQdovgnSX4jbi6ZYS9nS7TswFzSV1HlAcno9EeveXZ6yRW9qX6Ohvefvgnj28TTs2hVQ3gLMJ-s0TdcmXF475Yt49eO5MbCG4auGW1Ig18n_ML9uqGI5jwMxvtMVhAkMHS-WfIeJAtUuJsGb1N47SYI1XiOpuLTRdvv6VwB0keNZUSNzyPhslwBEyvcBnoG7H4_879GzEyfSy2auOWAxIwf8BGZFjvlZoR4NSvWmDO1NgSrOB3fguQYj2Z8Mq2DDCYBaSAWZaFBz2vBtPP3F8k9_pMh99KnTcb5xTtn_dm4mhiCC4CYu0sVBO0lLgvSlhDRYiM_f_O3Zko5GdC75v8tYP7hzNwY0o7IqRbE4S0QPmuD9F7rhhGOVJFXHrqFX5BXJRwjJp9dg59Q5iL--gpHvqGbLjQsHUUVjpzLNI46Ba9AWZW4QdsOaguyeigoX7qGKjBCndSVCNtlztkOWX5kSwjKW6S8yLA2AVVA5nZMvYq07kM9-c09tKsPM5_LO1wgcBfq4H5MQDkj2bjWmypAk1P7Ngmc1lymcfwLCmShI38AbME_huj5nRXBvbccxB69XHhHsn6niJgIMs8LptOqCar9ttRv1YE7oZ7oqI/xzfV53RH4qMPrd3vJvFifJFH3Xh6LMCI/19)

Not sneaking across. Not running from law enforcement.
**Hunting them.**
Drones. Military-grade rifles. Coordinated ambushes designed to kill Americans in uniform.

And Jon Ossoff?

Silent as a church mouse.

Because Chuck Schumer told him to be.

See, Schumer needs the border open. He needs the chaos. He needs the cartels moving freely so Democrats can keep counting bodies and calling it a "humanitarian crisis" instead of what it really is:
**An invasion.**

Hunting them. Drones. Military-grade rifles. Coordinated ambushes designed to kill Americans in uniform. And Jon Ossoff? Silent as a church mouse. Because Chuck Schumer told him to be. See, Schumer needs the border open. He needs the chaos. He needs the cartels moving freely so Democrats can keep counting bodies and calling it a "humanitarian crisis" instead of what it really is: An invasion. And Ossoff has voted with Schumer's open-border agenda every single time he had the chance to stop it. While American families bury loved ones lost to fentanyl, fentanyl that crossed that same border Ossoff REFUSES to secure, They live behind walls. They have private security. Their kids don't go to schools flooded with cartel poison. Yours might. I'm Mike Collins. I'm a Georgian, a businessman, and a fighter who believes if you won't defend this country's border, you've got no business sitting in the United States Senate. But right now, I need to hear from YOU. We're building a Rapid Response Poll from America First patriots across Georgia and this great country. I want to know exactly where you stand, because your voice shapes this fight. 👉 Thank you, Mike Collins (R-GA) Candidate for United States Senate PAID FOR BY MIKE COLLINS FOR SENATE PO BOX 6491 ATHENS, GA 30604 Hey, if you're still reading this, don't forget to follow Mike Collins for Senate on and and TEXT MIKE TO 70622 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this, please .

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: The media says we're losing in Iran - what's the truth?
body:
Plus: the new Noem scandal! Mark and Krysty reveal what they saw in an Aspen elevator in 2022. | New episode for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=79d3079045&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | |
The media says we're losing the war in Iran. The actual numbers say something very different — [and they're not even close.](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2c77087e2f&e=567664f14c)
Then the Kristi Noem scandal exploded. Mark and Krysty weren't surprised.
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=e22514f6fc&e=567664f14c)
| |
🔥 **11,000 TARGETS HIT — THE IRAN WAR NUMBERS THE MEDIA WON'T SHOW YOU**
90% drop in Iran's drone and missile capability. 150 naval vessels destroyed. 70% of their military production wiped out.
Mark compares the casualty numbers to the Gulf War and Iraq. When you see them side by side, the media narrative falls apart.
**Then Marco Rubio delivers the clearest explanation yet for why this had to happen now. It comes down to one word: nuclear.

** 🚨 **KRISTI NOEM'S HUSBAND EXPOSED — MARK AND KRYSTY SAW THIS COMING**
The Daily Mail dropped hundreds of messages and photos. Security experts are calling it a blackmail vulnerability at the highest level of government.
Noem says she's "devastated" and "blindsided." Krysty's not buying it.
Then Mark and Krysty reveal something they witnessed in an Aspen elevator in 2022. When you hear it, the whole picture comes together.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=009fe58510&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
🏛️ **FIRST ANTI-DEB HAALAND AD DROPS — SHE LOST 15 POINTS IN ONE POLL QUESTION**
A PAC called Accountable New Mexico is going after Haaland's Epstein connection. The polling data is real — 15-point drop once voters find out.
But Mark says it won't be enough to stop her in the primary. His advice on where to put your energy instead might surprise you.

📉 **36 REPUBLICANS QUIT CONGRESS — TRUMP AT -18 AND PLAYING THE LONG GAME**
A record number of GOP House members are heading for the exits. The historical data says when the president is below 50%, his party loses an average of 34 seats.
Democrats only need 3.
Mark's theory: Trump knows this and is trading short-term popularity for long-term legacy. Venezuela. Iran. Cuba. That's the play. But it's gotta work — and the clock is ticking.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=2067ba3796&e=567664f14c)
---
| |

PLUS: Bob Costas delivers the best common-sense case against men in women's sports you'll hear anywhere, Danny Hurley prays in a bathroom stall after UConn's insane buzzer beater, and 24 of New Mexico's 33 counties are losing population — which ones are growing and why it matters.

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Statistically tied
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
What this really means for us

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.PbGJ1kIyEenAw0tnDUhusOoLNWgI-YRzzANhrl6T19g?) for more
---
# [Statistically tied](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=193007335&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkzMDA3MzM1LCJpYXQiOjE3NzUxNzgxMDgsImV4cCI6MTc3Nzc3MDEwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.a1Ic1oISaugKrEOlXGNkLl4u-ZFb2rSL-S_OG5T4VB0)
### What this really means for us
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Apr 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..Jz_dAEaTGIGy4Xr1uGIv7aGuxoz85AKVI9PF-Rx5G7o?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/statistically-tied?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hi friends,
I'm reaching out personally with some big news out of Michigan:
**Our race for U.S. Senate is officially tied:**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dc53fb87-b72b-4e98-bea6-23113a2d7738?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
That's right. According to _The Detroit News_ , I'm in a statistical dead heat with MAGA Republican Mike Rogers.
My reaction to the poll?_I 'm more motivated than ever._
These numbers tell me we're doing something right. But they also tell me we have work to do. Which is perfect, because your gal _loves_ good old-fashioned hard work.
**I 've never expected anything to come easy.** That's not how I was raised.
My parents ran a small landscaping business and worked their tails off every day. In the winter, my dad would wake up way early to plow snow just to help make ends meet. That's where my Stevens doggedness comes from -- and it's exactly what I'm bringing to this campaign.
I'm ready to fight every single day to earn the votes of Michiganders across this state.
But here's what we're up against:
**Donald Trump has personally come to Detroit because he knows Michigan could decide control of the Senate.** And his handpicked candidate, Mike Rogers -- the same guy who said Trump should send the military into Michigan -- is now backed by a far-right Texas oil billionaire who's already poured millions into this race.
Let's be clear: Rogers and his MAGA allies are going _all in_ on Michigan. They're planning to spend massive amounts to try to buy this Senate seat.
We can't let them.
And this poll? It proves something we've believed all along:
**" It's very clear, looking at these numbers, that at the start of the year, Haley Stevens comes in as the strongest of the three positioned candidates." **- Pollster Richard Czuba of the Glengariff Group, via _The Detroit News_
It also confirms I'm the strongest Democrat to face off against Rogers because **I 'm the only one resonating with independent voters. And in a battleground state like Michigan, that matters. **_**A lot.**_
Michigan is one of just four seats experts say is most likely to flip this cycle - and _The New York Times_ just named us a key race to watch. That means the spotlight is getting brighter. The stakes are higher. And I'm more ready than ever.
**[So yes, the poll shows we're tied. But I don't plan on staying tied.](https://substack.com/redirect/6fbcfaf3-c863-4539-b563-ebd0c2cd3758?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
I plan on winning.
With you beside me -- fueled by our grit, heart, and hard work -- we can do it. I know it.
If you're with me, I'd love your support. Chipping in -- whatever amount you can -- will make a huge difference in a race this close. Every dollar helps us pull ahead in the polls, win this race, and flip the Senate.
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/6fbcfaf3-c863-4539-b563-ebd0c2cd3758?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
I'm so proud to be in this fight with you.
Now, let's win it together.
With gratitude and grit,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/6fbcfaf3-c863-4539-b563-ebd0c2cd3758?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..Jz_dAEaTGIGy4Xr1uGIv7aGuxoz85AKVI9PF-Rx5G7o?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

(C) 2026 Haley for MI
33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..IBwv-lzCtlbXKWMtUkU4xHm1qzadzfIuPdUKX0iOO3k?)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/84db5bef-b847-44f3-a0a2-d295fc76431d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..Nhg3DzOog85tBHbqzGFJ69qZbYCG2puvsqSr_EZFDqw?)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: “They’d have a much different country.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, did you see
what Marco Rubio and Donald Trump said this week?

Shot:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260402.UmAMjJ&refcode=em20260402-37633&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37633%2E1203867%2Eu8OhaQ ]State Sec. Rubio: 'Imagine if instead of spending billions on weapons,
Iran spent that money on its people. They'd have a much different country'

Chaser:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260402.UmAMjJ&refcode=em20260402-37633&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37633%2E1203867%2Eu8OhaQ ]Trump: 'We can't take care of daycare. We're a big country. We're
fighting wars. It's impossible for us to take care of daycare, Medicaid,
Medicare, all these things.'

Rubio is accusing Iran of doing exactly what the U.S. does, while Trump
says the quiet part out loud. These two comments were made within a day of
each other, and perfectly sum up the United States’ broken system: Our
basic needs will always be the price politicians demand we pay for their
warmongering.

Like Justice Democrats CO-01 primary candidate Melat Kiros said, “We’re
giving up a world where having kids is affordable and getting sick doesn’t
make you bankrupt to fight in wars we never asked for so the oil execs and
the defense contractors can get even richer.”

She’s right. It’s not that we can’t afford Medicare for All, universal
childcare, a livable wage, and other policies that would lift up working
families — Trump and the Republican Party would just rather spend it on
war, and far too many establishment Democrats are right there with them.

This is the perfect opportunity for Democrats to actually lead as the
anti-war party... but only if they're willing to listen to the majority of
their constituents, stand up to their corporate defense donors and war
hawk lobbies like AIPAC, and vote to stop this through a war powers
resolution.

All of our 2026 Primary Slate candidates staunchly oppose Trump’s war with
Iran and believe that it’s time to spend our tax dollars on healthcare,
childcare, and other investments into our communities — NOT more forever
wars and genocide.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260402.UmAMjJ&refcode=em20260402-37633&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1004&akid=37633%2E1203867%2Eu8OhaQ ]But they’re going up against corporate, AIPAC, and establishment-backed
opponents with massive war chests in the upcoming primaries. Will you fuel
our work to transform the Democratic Party and send a dozen anti-war
progressive Democrats to Congress this year?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260402.UmAMjJ&refcode=em20260402-37633&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1023&akid=37633%2E1203867%2Eu8OhaQ ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260402-37633-footer&t=1024&refcode2=37633_1203867_u8OhaQ&akid=37633%2E1203867%2Eu8OhaQ

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=37633%2E1203867%2Eu8OhaQ

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Team Katie
subject: The stress of a price tag
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
Katie is focused on real solutions—not the same old political talk.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41080%2E3422442%2Eaqgiln)
Peter, Katie knows the stress of a price tag, especially when you’ve got kids in or heading toward college.
Across California, families are feeling the same struggle. **The cost of higher education is skyrocketing, and our kids are being priced out of their own futures.**
That’s why Katie’s running for governor. She knows the cost of college isn’t just a number on a bill—it’s a barrier that can shape a student’s whole life.
**Affordability is the backbone of Katie’s agenda. She’s fighting to make college tuition-free—and pay for it by making the richest corporations finally contribute their fair share.**
Katie isn’t afraid to take on the tough fights. Unlike her opponents, who are cashing checks from the same corporations that got California into this mess, she’s running to take them on and deliver real results for students and working families.
But taking on billionaires and powerful corporate interests takes a strong grassroots team. That’s where you come in.
**[If you’re ready for a governor who’ll stand up to corporate power—and fight for families the way Katie does at her own kitchen table—chip in what you can today.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260402_2_ak.6RZY71&refcode=em20260402-41080&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41080%2E3422442%2Eaqgiln)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260402_2_ak.6RZY71&refcode=em20260402-41080&t=22&akid=41080%2E3422442%2Eaqgiln)
Let’s get to work,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260402-41080&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41080_3422442_aqgiln&akid=41080%2E3422442%2Eaqgiln)**

name: Jason Crow
subject: BREAKING: Trump fired Bondi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Trump fired Bondi because she didn't go far enough. Her replacement will. |
#
---
Folks, Pam Bondi just got fired. She’s been a terrible Attorney General, acting as a stooge for the President. But in the end, that still wasn’t good enough for Donald Trump. Bondi will be remembered for her many failures, including covering up the release of the Epstein files and weaponizing the Justice Department against their perceived enemies, including me. Under her watch, the Justice Department tried, and failed, to indict me in front of a grand jury on bogus criminal charges, all because the President didn’t like what I said reminding our service members of their duty to obey the law. After the DOJ failed to indict me, I put Trump and Bondi on notice: _"We are taking names. We are creating lists. There will be costs."_ I meant it then. I mean it now. Even though she was just fired by Trump, accountability is coming for Pam Bondi, or anyone else that breaks the law or fails to live up to their oath to our Constitution. I won’t shy away from speaking truth to power and holding this reckless and lawless administration accountable. [**That’s why your support right now has never been more important. clean_body: Trump fired Bondi because she didn't go far enough. Her replacement will. | Folks, Pam Bondi just got fired. She’s been a terrible Attorney General, acting as a stooge for the President. But in the end, that still wasn’t good enough for Donald Trump. Bondi will be remembered for her many failures, including covering up the release of the Epstein files and weaponizing the Justice Department against their perceived enemies, including me. Under her watch, the Justice Department tried, and failed, to indict me in front of a grand jury on bogus criminal charges, all because the President didn’t like what I said reminding our service members of their duty to obey the law. After the DOJ failed to indict me, I put Trump and Bondi on notice: "We are taking names. We are creating lists. There will be costs." I meant it then. I mean it now. Even though she was just fired by Trump, accountability is coming for Pam Bondi, or anyone else that breaks the law or fails to live up to their oath to our Constitution. I won’t shy away from speaking truth to power and holding this reckless and lawless administration accountable. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = When Trump and Bondi first put a target on my back, the outpouring of support from grassroots donors like you gave my team the resources we needed to fight back — and win. I’ve never taken a dime from corporate PACs or special interests — because since my first campaign when we beat a five-term Republican incumbent, I’ve always worked for Coloradans. Who comes after Pam Bondi could very well be worse. We could even see the DOJ try to come after us again. That’s why = I went to war three times for this country. I’ve always fought to protect this country — and I won’t stop now. Thank you, Jason Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Team Kern
subject: This Easter
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Vote Kern]( "Paid For By Vote Kern")
body:
The Passion Begins |
---
| | [ ](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=eb992fce83&e=b78dc6f299)
---
|
---
| Supporters and Friends,

This coming weekend we celebrate Good Friday and Easter Sunday. When Jesus rose from his grave, everything changed.

“I am he that liveth, and was dead; and, behold, I am alive for evermore, Amen; and have the keys of hell and of death.” Revelation 1:18 KJV

He defeated death. He gave us the chance for everlasting life by his side. And he gave us the opportunity to seek forgiveness for past wrongs.

A lot of wrongs have been done to Arizona under Katie Hobbs’ so-called leadership—but that does not mean we have to be forever defined by them.

As we seek personal salvation in the hereafter, let’s join together in finding a small piece of redemption in the here and now, improving Arizona so it’s the kind of place each of us can love to live, work, worship, and raise a family.

Whether in law enforcement or in the legislature, my faith has guided my decision-making. And it will continue to do so as I represent LD27.

Have a wonderful and blessed Easter with your family, your friends, and your congregation. Pray on what this day signifies.

And afterwards, with a renewed spirit of life and purpose as we enter spring, I hope you’ll join my campaign with a monthly contribution.

[**Just $20 every month**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=7f9f28d905&e=b78dc6f299) goes a long way to support my team of volunteers and gives me the resources necessary to spread the good word ahead of election day.

Nothing can replace faith and love for the Almighty. But with our modest means, we can pass policies that make Arizona feel a little bit more like Heaven.

Happy Easter,
Anthony Kern
---
|
---
| | [DONATE NOW >](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=45ac97fd34&e=b78dc6f299 "DONATE NOW >")

body:

| | **PASS THE NO KINGS ACT >>>**
---
Trump’s not above the law, friend – but the MAGA-controlled Supreme Court seems to think so.

That’s why we’re fighting to pass the NO KINGS ACT, which would affirm that **the President and Vice President are not immune to criminal prosecution.**
[RUSH $7 TO PASS THE NO KINGS ACT »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106140?t=6&akid=23448%2E878179%2EXmLY31)

On March 28, _more than 8 million Americans_ took to the streets to say that Trump is not a king.

We need to use the energy of this moment to make clear Trump is not a king not only in the eyes of the people but **also in the eyes of the law.**

[If you join thousands of other Democrats in stepping up in and beyond we can win this, and bring Trump’s dictator dreams crashing down »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/106140?t=7&akid=23448%2E878179%2EXmLY31)

name: Eric Metaxas
subject: Imagine this, it's horrifying.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians
body:
The threat is real. Persecution that starts overseas doesn't always stay there.

| | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3qb9tj41bai2qepbgcfgo3otnaq74i9ub1eja0o_rp22sh2s8i6epr5c9i62o34cjh2bs)
---
Dear Faithful Friend, **Imagine this:** A man steps outside his own home in a quiet neighborhood. Suddenly, violence erupts, his kneecap shattered in a brutal attack. His car torched. His family terrorized for years, children taunted with slurs in the streets, living under police protection for nearly a decade. This isn't a scene from some distant war zone. **This happened in Bradford, England – to Nissar Hussain.** **His only "crime"? Leaving Islam and embracing Jesus Christ as Lord and Savior.** For 17 years, Nissar endured relentless persecution from his former community. The Church of England? _**SILENT.**_ Not one bishop stood with him or his family. **But Save the Persecuted Christians, where I’m proud to serve as a board member, refused to stand by. We brought Nissar here to the U.S. to help him share his story, and he is now fighting back boldly – in part by pursuing a groundbreaking legal case against 11 countries that still mandate death for apostasy. ** [**Your support has amplified his voice and his mission to expose this evil.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1u1thvu727lacd09dch6e9scsd1k55ggmjuuvug_rp22sh2s8i6epr5c9i62o34cjh2bs) Nissar's story is heartbreaking, but it's not isolated. Over 380 million Christians face severe persecution globally, and the numbers are growing. _**In Iran, 254 believers were arrested**_ in 2025 alone for simply practicing their faith, escalating further amid the regime's war on Christians. _**In Nigeria, thousands have been slaughtered**_ by Islamist militants: entire villages massacred, girls held captive for years, all because they refused to deny Christ. _**In Pakistan, blasphemy laws **_are twisted to destroy Christian lives. _**In North Korea, owning a Bible**_ can mean a lifetime in a labor camp. **It is for all of these reasons that Save the Persecuted Christians is relentlessly educating Americans and rallying the faithful to recognize the threat before it takes deeper root here.** A powerful example: Our ongoing education and advocacy efforts helped fuel the overwhelming success on March 3, when **95% of Texas Republican primary voters stood up and voted to ban Sharia law** – sending a clear, faithful message: We will not let this ideology gain a foothold in America and threaten our freedoms or our persecuted brothers and sisters in Christ. **The threat is real.** _Persecution that starts overseas doesn't always stay there._ We must be extra vigilant, and **we need your help right now** to keep pushing back. [**Q1 ends at midnight on March 31, and we’ve set a goal of 1,000 individual donations from believers across America to sustain this vital work. Will you be one of them today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zglnkqt8jbq403ne1kt0f5b9d0n09de6nmdn3i9o_rp22sh2s8i6epr5c9i62o34cjh2bs)
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zqmte5enkc9767ah8e6cf0gs3pivc5n86bsb6mrg_rp22sh2s8i6epr5c9i62o34cjh2bs)
---
Your gift, especially a monthly commitment through The Defenders Guild, multiplies our impact and sustains the fight against this growing evil. [**Click here to give and carry the burden with us.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z00mcptlgsrnt3j8e3bn0ge3ah96csrl9h5hdqtg_rp22sh2s8i6epr5c9i62o34cjh2bs) [**From media campaigns to conferences and everything in between, I’ve seen firsthand how effectively and tirelessly Save the Persecuted Christians guides a coalition of 200+ leaders in order to expose evil and rally the Church – and any support you can offer is well-placed.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z753ss3nb0krd523p6ri5usrh687ceni7apgq65g_rp22sh2s8i6epr5c9i62o34cjh2bs) **Paul wrote in Galatians 6:2, **_**“Carry each other’s burdens, and in this way you will fulfill the law of Christ.”**_ **That is our mandate as the Body of Christ.** The Church must rise in one spirit, refusing silence in the face of darkness. Thank you for your faithfulness and courage in this hour. In Christ,
---
---
Eric Metaxas Member, Board of Directors Save the Persecuted Christians
---
---

name: Record breaking:
subject: 36 House Republicans just quit
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:
MAGA is jumping ship as an unprecedented blue wave looms.
| | | | | [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001cin8xOnBR5AP1wuY6a-OrhmeYSg14E8sjlsbpjfrnxzCFyaFponFZw-m48vtaUkXyjzFuojNVuClongkSVyTckeMd0EHKCyngo4XVNjcjqSo6h13XcTMB6S_tUsfZQ4jOdJZtzEc2WzHArJ-uTfH8aJWqTtrsfaqrEIK3a46cGu1oFnomfLKmV0ZqFrM9gk21gG4iPNEZr5GM8GjigtYrHzDMCKay7Ww&c=5di_xDECTc_DT1b0ZqYziv5stYzX7glH66nhy2d4FpnLzYJF_iBWAA==&ch=eMe4qovcPPVxEwCwf4cOv4cwZGf6F0fVqDI5VXoseaXdPivw0HRTnA==)
---
Peter,
36 House Republicans are quitting.

body:
President Trump [fired Attorney General Pam Bondi](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQBuCngc3IGILD4KFLtnTtiA77nFxrbGQfobx9RV6h20kn_fq__-s-3YECxccnLGjYpyniXgIyY544b8vqKWOZU3RUtviDcYdcJiXVIGQvZDc5oHBMfe2MR1TY1WharS-qlaNS9dNYNcpO23EYXY-6VbMah0FfpdftoC9urMmcabKXXSvltW8bnC_aIbSgB9TKYtVLdMQpN9-JIj_RhyO9MDc2LXUwT-a1VN1HpW6Vuu373vj0eyrOf6VuawrEZMt5wiLeFAEhI7hDnDongDnliId4YMQMQViYKSKL5D1ZgiAY0YltFRnXABYXjCxK2rLFUmfj1p1CoDLoqpePBSi8u_G_Bn0Z9RcAAP__xs6ObQ), his second cabinet-level ouster in a month. Sources say he had grown frustrated with her handling of the Jeffrey Epstein files and investigations into his political rivals.

# Friday, April 3, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1953, the first edition of _TV Guide_ was published, featuring the biggest TV story of the year on the cover: "Lucy's $50,000,000 Baby"--the first pregnancy shown on a major TV series. ([See Cover](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuOpDAQAL_GZCC7eZgLHFxCNpdeiBrcht419sg2oNmvX83-wualKqn-P-YHsuew_cODTHFxDnRnT6VQmks6j6fjRHmJwXI-wyeFG1OeQcJQy66W7WyR_WvuKmscEVBbkVFa96DkH4BqN0734HAYtF0QR7SLhGV1SoO2ox16VbF522QnWyXl2KmGll5bQoV6IA0riU6S5RJT8xE5lJ2cf8WLUrPGo_JmL-WZRftXwCRguu-7KVdc8nomLkz5TQmYQKpRwCQ7AdPQl73GEPiilDG96nLV28mW6gM3_OJAAqYqGfu82XvOgxad3A5k_5Msv_p0GfgOAAD__yT2faU)) A 2,000-year-old coin from the Carthaginian empire was once [used as bus fare](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8yAQBOCnwR3ReiEmf0HxN-5y7ZUWhnWydxgswIn89iffK1wzzUifRvN5n-6OI6fHh1vJtiVPid41UmtUplb2dVu4UJ1zClz39E3p7UqdEHCQoCWoKTiOx6S7YBciJNWR7Y25Yg__ELunXSC43uhhAIPQg_JKuavyt5ubQQXwHdtTAw2qB7jp_kLz1QRyvTMDGfQkNFDglsvlK3NqT1rikV9ULj6vXbTP1rYq1H-Bo8AxHVuu7awEjicscAR9Bgocq2dKngSOPnOSe6UgXZXzXuXiCsm2l1Rl3ptsWc4kEQDkQa7IHIMsFNkLHLtiw_bmGLkORmh4rI7j75r2pwtfFn8CAAD__zuMg9E) in England. A fare cashier spotted it, pocketed it, and it sat in a wooden chest for 70 years before anyone figured out what it really was. More in _Et Cetera_. Today's sponsor, [Frontieras](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu2zAMQL9G3mzoZckZNBQIsqVrR0G26JitHoYkJ8jfF06L-wN35TkgifPrbu8OA6bHTxfBtDXbBK8aoDUotpUj7isWqHNOHuuR_kB6uVItp1z1VPZUWO8wvK3svFkBOIgODNN65IxeOO82A4v3iik6zYp64JPnl9mv0zoKPinwskNzbqOSCkbpJNkA86g9OOa0As0XIJKCx5bL8Dtjahus4Z2fUIYlxy6YrbW9EvGD8BvhN0xPqG1YS04Nobh6WicSt6NFW_NRFiDiCtFhIFydwwgej0jEdXfo-92VlqDUDff_fHFxd_hIH-MLson2YhT2X4YjYXNW0svEqdRKs64Yv78wBKxKE0kf58HPy-1bnZ-G_w0AAP__Y1qTaw), is offering a limited-time investment opportunity in an emerging energy company aiming to meet AI's massive power demands with innovative coal-to-clean-fuel technology.

## Attorney General Pam Bondi Fired
President Trump [fired Attorney General Pam Bondi](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQBuCngc3IGILD4KFLtnTtiA77nFxrbGQfobx9RV6h20kn_fq__-s-3YECxccnLGjYpyniXgIyY544b8vqKWOZU3RUtviDcYdcJiXVIGQvZDc5oHBMfe2MR1TY1WharS-qlaNS9dNYNcpO23EYXY-6VbMah0FfpdftoC9urMmcabKXXSvltW8bnC_aIbSgB9TKYtVLdMQpN9-JIj_RhyO9MDc2LXUwT-a1VN1HpW6Vuu373vj0eyrOf6VuawrEZMt5wiLeFAEhI7hDnDongDnliId4YMQMQViYKSKL5D1ZgiAY0YltFRnXABYXjCxK2rLFUmfj1p1CoDLoqpePBSi8u_G_Bn0Z9RcAAP__xs6ObQ), his second cabinet-level ouster in a month. Sources say he had grown frustrated with her handling of the Jeffrey Epstein files and investigations into his political rivals. Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche will [serve as acting attorney general](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOnDAQhJ_GdD6ZxcBRuEjj7tKmRAYvsImxkb3cibePuFf4m2lG-jTf_HmNL0eB4vrb7Wh4SWPETwnIjHnkfO7HQhnLlKKncsZ_GD8ulxEUdFJpqZrROwrXqCtvFkTApkJT930LtRoAqs307QCo5m5RDTROPad21pP3zwkHXy_tUJG5aUqrplbqqesHTm3v0dWu77CHGYVW6IlTfvxNFHnDJVzpjfkxp70KZmM-imh-CbACbLyOVPiuBNgbLMAqfQcIsGeRt58A-3WTjCEUebhdfg3lhlky7SipyHzGSHGV6WTpinTMKUe85IoRswsCbJWNPz4UApWuF1qtu6PwXcU_uvJt4H8AAAD__whMiSs). EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin is reportedly being considered as a permanent replacement. Trump confirmed the firing in a Truth Social post, calling Bondi "a Great American Patriot." [Read the post here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFuwyAYBOCngS0R_BCIB4ZKlbd0qtTR-mN-YloMFpBEefvKfYWud9In3X1dpgvGFPPtA1dyPZQp07Ml6p3q1Ot93UKs1K4l-9ju-YfyE2ubQIA5CH0QavIY02vS3LtABKQ4OWntCaQYAPjiNF0hkAVNxqBCCEKStUhK0jDIMPPodk1ooaQQZy2PdD1ZTyjRGrIwE9OCfOylHr9LzH2hkF7lQfU4l5Unt_S-NabeGIwMxl7vfWlljpj2fg-1qITpvWRM_nOfxGDcSuuNwSilUcqAtueTUWdr7MCr89szphSbsUyL24rxj-L9X_88HPwGAAD__3UoeNA). The House Oversight Committee had [subpoenaed Bondi](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuhDAQRL_GdEb2Ys5J4SIN3aVNiRZ7OZwYG5m9Q5evj7hfSDPNSG_05us6XjGmmG-fuJLjuYyZjj0RM9WR633d5lhpn0oOcb_nH8oH1n0EBRepjFTdGDCm52ia4GYioK4hp63tQat3gGZxaL0PYKzuPNreeDTdbLSHqQetYYYmupOmjOq0Um9GtzT1NhBqtBey4EkYRSFyqe13iZkXmtOzPKi2vqxNcgvztovuQ8AgYDiOo_V58mcpYDjRAgZlzgABw8tJbrjKl5NE5lIzPeWNMlVMMhHJX0oh5nbhNTXVhe2IKcX9YoVRtxVjei3zv-56OPgLAAD__2A3fvA) to testify about the Epstein files on April 14. Her departure follows last month's firing of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem.
## Trump Orders Pay for All DHS Workers
President Trump said Thursday he would sign an order to [pay all Department of Homeland Security employees](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLESnCAURb9GOxx4IsSCIo3dpk3pIDzXlyA4gOv49xn3F1KfmTv3nN-v-WUpUHz_sjuauqY54lUC1op5rvncj5UyliVFT-WMfzFeNpcZOCjGJeP97C2Fe5atNysiYN-iEVoPIPgI0G5mBHTC2tFb5ZzSg11WrbUXQi4DF2psyTxrXPJecP5Dig6XQXu0wmqFGhw2kqOnmnL3J1GsG67hTh_MnUt7G8xW61Ga_mcDUwPTdV1dXNxj8fAGpiMFquTKAzeqyLZ0Fmxg-uqxYu_CCr0jS9ljZoe9md8Kw_0I6UYsrGxn9emKLLtoQSkJ0Gbjj4tCoKJ0I_l7txS-f-p_RfwY-BcAAP__yn6JnA), expanding last week's order that covered only TSA agents as the shutdown stretches to 49 days. The Senate on Thursday [advanced a bill](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu9CAUBODT4M7W4xnDvwXF37jbtCktbJ4XEgwrwIv29pFzhTTTjPSNNJ_35W588PHxYQ7SdU9LpFYC1Up5qfk8nrvPVNYUrS9n_KbYTC4LAsoeRA_jYo0P70V0Vu9ESGNHmis1IYcbYue0vIEQRpndSFhRgrzJaeW7hG2yG59s5_WlgYCRA_wTfKB1UpYMN0qSwo2YALK-pjx8JR-roz2804vysKWjC9rV-ixs_M9wZji31oYtrttVMpwvmuEM4gpkONdieutKX9xZbWqxLxRNpd6ls9Dg6hG6rO2z-RB8kYoJeBzGh9-t-qeDXhp_AgAA__9Vu3mN) to fund most of DHS except ICE and Customs and Border Protection. The House didn't act, meaning the shutdown continues. Republican leaders unveiled a [two-track plan](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5CAUhE-DM1v4-YcmINjEWW-6ofUwjzY7GCzAjfr2I88VJiuppCp937_n-kTnXXj9xYNUsXENVLOnUiitJV3HaV2irGMwLl_hi0LFlFfgMLd8bPmwGnT-s46NUZYIaGhI9UJM0HMJ0OzKApCc9DxxFBNKyZEjShIPq-U2atk4da_xkQ8954-x70hPwhD2KGYSsBEbORlXYur-RxfKTtZ_4ptSt8Wj8Wov5cxs-MNgYbDUWrtN55vi7hksd2SwmD23eb-KiTW09grGhVebKWChNtF5ae82DLnd45WJwdIkZc7qvHd5FmzkrwOd_7ksv_L0VvAdAAD__9cVf3U) Wednesday to fund the remaining agencies through reconciliation, bypassing the need for votes from Democrats in the Senate. Most lawmakers are on recess until the week of April 13. Trump has requested the reconciliation bill on his desk by June 1.
## Ranking: How Long It Takes to Save for a Home
Saving for a 10% down payment on a home takes an average of 14.4 years in the U.S., but the timeline [ranges from under a decade](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuupDAQAE8DWSPbfPwIHGxC9jbdEPXgZugdYyO7Ac3tV7NXeHmpSqo_3_M3cuD4_I07OVnTHOkugUQoz5LP_Vg5U3mk6Lmc8UXxxlxmo8wAqgPVzh45vOeu9m4lMtTW5LS1vdFqNKbeHOllxK9l1Q_bWq-HUSP1fhzG1nvtdV-z-9hUp1qt1FenG3r01hNqtANZs1DVKfIsKTd_E0fZaA3vdFFulrTXwW0iR6naX5WZKjPd991cXE4MCx4sGLjIB6zMtKUbQopPYAHBFxWQBAUvgjVlQNjSTsAR6KL8hhMKFEGhykx1dv64OQQug6069dyRw_-8_OjZ5cy_AAAA___TCoNM) in Iowa to more than 25 years in California. Iowa leads the nation at just 8.7 years, followed by Ohio (9.9) and Texas (10.3), where lower home prices and manageable tax burdens shorten the path to ownership. California, New York, and Hawaii all exceed 20 years, with steep prices outpacing even relatively high household incomes. In San Jose alone, homebuyers need to earn roughly $459,000 a year to afford the median-priced home. The median age of first-time homebuyers has climbed to a record 38, and rents in cities like Miami and Tampa have surged more than 50% since 2020. [See your state on the map here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuupDAQAE8DWSPbfPwIHGxC9jbdEPXgZugdYyO7Ac3tV7NXeHmpSqo_3_M3cuD4_I07OVnTHOkugUQoz5LP_Vg5U3mk6Lmc8UXxxlxmo8wAqgPVzh45vOeu9m4lMtTW5LS1vdFqNKbeHOllxK9l1Q_bWq-HUSP1fhzG1nvtdV-z-9hUp1qt1FenG3r01hNqtANZs1DVKfIsKTd_E0fZaA3vdFFulrTXwW0iR6naX5WZKjPd991cXE4MCx4sGLjIB6zMtKUbQopPYAHBFxWQBAUvgjVlQNjSTsAR6KL8hhMKFEGhykx1dv64OQQug6069dyRw_-8_OjZ5cy_AAAA___TCoNM).

Sources say he had grown frustrated with her handling of the Jeffrey Epstein files and investigations into his political rivals. Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche will . EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin is reportedly being considered as a permanent replacement. Trump confirmed the firing in a Truth Social post, calling Bondi "a Great American Patriot." . The House Oversight Committee had to testify about the Epstein files on April 14. Her departure follows last month's firing of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem. Trump Orders Pay for All DHS Workers President Trump said Thursday he would sign an order to , expanding last week's order that covered only TSA agents as the shutdown stretches to 49 days. The Senate on Thursday to fund most of DHS except ICE and Customs and Border Protection. The House didn't act, meaning the shutdown continues. Republican leaders unveiled a Wednesday to fund the remaining agencies through reconciliation, bypassing the need for votes from Democrats in the Senate. Most lawmakers are on recess until the week of April 13. Trump has requested the reconciliation bill on his desk by June 1. Ranking: How Long It Takes to Save for a Home Saving for a 10% down payment on a home takes an average of 14.4 years in the U.S., but the timeline in Iowa to more than 25 years in California. Iowa leads the nation at just 8.7 years, followed by Ohio (9.9) and Texas (10.3), where lower home prices and manageable tax burdens shorten the path to ownership. California, New York, and Hawaii all exceed 20 years, with steep prices outpacing even relatively high household incomes. In San Jose alone, homebuyers need to earn roughly $459,000 a year to afford the median-priced home. The median age of first-time homebuyers has climbed to a record 38, and rents in cities like Miami and Tampa have surged more than 50% since 2020. . name: Eric Metaxas
subject: Imagine this, it’s horrifying.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save the Persecuted Christians
body:
The threat is real. Persecution that starts overseas doesn't always stay there.

| | | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3TAQhZ9G7mT0478ULkKWCyk2ZVKasTTXGrAlZzR22LcPN5AH2O4Uh8N3vl_vyzvQTnn7AQfO4aaF60IHbJRRElWSmgozPT8ob4szbtCm08a_araJc4iDdw3Odhx7Z613vknzGlcLq5sQOhjH0H2ZPK7PCWLX-wmn0ND8WjKd8dbY3rn2CUNvB7RxHPtnB0Z15jojCNY2lFyRbxC6kXIur1RyG8rR7HMSOavyX5V7KPeIJYNgW-FGSXgiVwyXYAyJqQpBrm3hTblHAOYPjRCSLpKQq14vjpir_m3167Aspz7LqfzjkmORoPzbt5_f9X9q5QbGcDFT3pR_E76w4Tmef2jfqQ6j6sx2AO3_KOXTWu_Z_Q0AAP__ZPSJcw)
---
Dear Faithful Friend, **Imagine this:** A man steps outside his own home in a quiet neighborhood. Suddenly, violence erupts, his kneecap shattered in a brutal attack. His car torched. His family terrorized for years, children taunted with slurs in the streets, living under police protection for nearly a decade. This isn't a scene from some distant war zone. **This happened in Bradford, England – to Nissar Hussain.** **His only "crime"? Leaving Islam and embracing Jesus Christ as Lord and Savior.** For 17 years, Nissar endured relentless persecution from his former community. The Church of England? _**SILENT.**_ Not one bishop stood with him or his family. **But Save the Persecuted Christians, where I’m proud to serve as a board member, refused to stand by. We brought Nissar here to the U.S. to help him share his story, and he is now fighting back boldly – in part by pursuing a groundbreaking legal case against 11 countries that still mandate death for apostasy. ** [**Your support has amplified his voice and his mission to expose this evil.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3TAQhZ9G7mT0478ULkKWCyk2ZVKasTTXGrAlZzR22LcPN5AH2O4Uh8N3vl_vyzvQTnn7AQfO4aaF60IHbJRRElWSmgozPT8ob4szbtCm08a_araJc4iDdw3Odhx7Z613vknzGlcLq5sQOhjH0H2ZPK7PCWLX-wmn0ND8WjKd8dbY3rn2CUNvB7RxHPtnB0Z15jojCNY2lFyRbxC6kXIur1RyG8rR7HMSOavyX5V7KPeIJYNgW-FGSXgiVwyXYAyJqQpBrm3hTblHAOYPjRCSLpKQq14vjpir_m3167Aspz7LqfzjkmORoPzbt5_f9X9q5QbGcDFT3pR_E76w4Tmef2jfqQ6j6sx2AO3_KOXTWu_Z_Q0AAP__ZPSJcw) Nissar's story is heartbreaking, but it's not isolated. Over 380 million Christians face severe persecution globally, and the numbers are growing. _**In Iran, 254 believers were arrested**_ in 2025 alone for simply practicing their faith, escalating further amid the regime's war on Christians. _**In Nigeria, thousands have been slaughtered**_ by Islamist militants: entire villages massacred, girls held captive for years, all because they refused to deny Christ. _**In Pakistan, blasphemy laws **_are twisted to destroy Christian lives. _**In North Korea, owning a Bible**_ can mean a lifetime in a labor camp. **It is for all of these reasons that Save the Persecuted Christians is relentlessly educating Americans and rallying the faithful to recognize the threat before it takes deeper root here.** A powerful example: Our ongoing education and advocacy efforts helped fuel the overwhelming success on March 3, when **95% of Texas Republican primary voters stood up and voted to ban Sharia law** – sending a clear, faithful message: We will not let this ideology gain a foothold in America and threaten our freedoms or our persecuted brothers and sisters in Christ. **The threat is real.** _Persecution that starts overseas doesn't always stay there._ We must be extra vigilant, and **we need your help right now** to keep pushing back. [**Q1 ends at midnight on March 31, and we’ve set a goal of 1,000 individual donations from believers across America to sustain this vital work. Will you be one of them today?**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3TAQhZ9G7mT0478ULkKWCyk2ZVKasTTXGrAlZzR22LcPN5AH2O4Uh8N3vl_vyzvQTnn7AQfO4aaF60IHbJRRElWSmgozPT8ob4szbtCm08a_araJc4iDdw3Odhx7Z613vknzGlcLq5sQOhjH0H2ZPK7PCWLX-wmn0ND8WjKd8dbY3rn2CUNvB7RxHPtnB0Z15jojCNY2lFyRbxC6kXIur1RyG8rR7HMSOavyX5V7KPeIJYNgW-FGSXgiVwyXYAyJqQpBrm3hTblHAOYPjRCSLpKQq14vjpir_m3167Aspz7LqfzjkmORoPzbt5_f9X9q5QbGcDFT3pR_E76w4Tmef2jfqQ6j6sx2AO3_KOXTWu_Z_Q0AAP__ZPSJcw)
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3TAQhZ9G7mT0478ULkKWCyk2ZVKasTTXGrAlZzR22LcPN5AH2O4Uh8N3vl_vyzvQTnn7AQfO4aaF60IHbJRRElWSmgozPT8ob4szbtCm08a_araJc4iDdw3Odhx7Z613vknzGlcLq5sQOhjH0H2ZPK7PCWLX-wmn0ND8WjKd8dbY3rn2CUNvB7RxHPtnB0Z15jojCNY2lFyRbxC6kXIur1RyG8rR7HMSOavyX5V7KPeIJYNgW-FGSXgiVwyXYAyJqQpBrm3hTblHAOYPjRCSLpKQq14vjpir_m3167Aspz7LqfzjkmORoPzbt5_f9X9q5QbGcDFT3pR_E76w4Tmef2jfqQ6j6sx2AO3_KOXTWu_Z_Q0AAP__ZPSJcw)
---
Your gift, especially a monthly commitment through The Defenders Guild, multiplies our impact and sustains the fight against this growing evil. [**Click here to give and carry the burden with us.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3TAQhZ9G7mT0478ULkKWCyk2ZVKasTTXGrAlZzR22LcPN5AH2O4Uh8N3vl_vyzvQTnn7AQfO4aaF60IHbJRRElWSmgozPT8ob4szbtCm08a_araJc4iDdw3Odhx7Z613vknzGlcLq5sQOhjH0H2ZPK7PCWLX-wmn0ND8WjKd8dbY3rn2CUNvB7RxHPtnB0Z15jojCNY2lFyRbxC6kXIur1RyG8rR7HMSOavyX5V7KPeIJYNgW-FGSXgiVwyXYAyJqQpBrm3hTblHAOYPjRCSLpKQq14vjpir_m3167Aspz7LqfzjkmORoPzbt5_f9X9q5QbGcDFT3pR_E76w4Tmef2jfqQ6j6sx2AO3_KOXTWu_Z_Q0AAP__ZPSJcw) [**From media campaigns to conferences and everything in between, I’ve seen firsthand how effectively and tirelessly Save the Persecuted Christians guides a coalition of 200+ leaders in order to expose evil and rally the Church – and any support you can offer is well-placed.**](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3TAQhZ9G7mT0478ULkKWCyk2ZVKasTTXGrAlZzR22LcPN5AH2O4Uh8N3vl_vyzvQTnn7AQfO4aaF60IHbJRRElWSmgozPT8ob4szbtCm08a_araJc4iDdw3Odhx7Z613vknzGlcLq5sQOhjH0H2ZPK7PCWLX-wmn0ND8WjKd8dbY3rn2CUNvB7RxHPtnB0Z15jojCNY2lFyRbxC6kXIur1RyG8rR7HMSOavyX5V7KPeIJYNgW-FGSXgiVwyXYAyJqQpBrm3hTblHAOYPjRCSLpKQq14vjpir_m3167Aspz7LqfzjkmORoPzbt5_f9X9q5QbGcDFT3pR_E76w4Tmef2jfqQ6j6sx2AO3_KOXTWu_Z_Q0AAP__ZPSJcw) **Paul wrote in Galatians 6:2, **_**“Carry each other’s burdens, and in this way you will fulfill the law of Christ.”**_ **That is our mandate as the Body of Christ.** The Church must rise in one spirit, refusing silence in the face of darkness. Thank you for your faithfulness and courage in this hour. In Christ,
---
---
Eric Metaxas Member, Board of Directors Save the Persecuted Christians
---
---
[SAVE CHRISTIANS](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkL2K3TAQhZ9G7mT0478ULkKWCyk2ZVKasTTXGrAlZzR22LcPN5AH2O4Uh8N3vl_vyzvQTnn7AQfO4aaF60IHbJRRElWSmgozPT8ob4szbtCm08a_araJc4iDdw3Odhx7Z613vknzGlcLq5sQOhjH0H2ZPK7PCWLX-wmn0ND8WjKd8dbY3rn2CUNvB7RxHPtnB0Z15jojCNY2lFyRbxC6kXIur1RyG8rR7HMSOavyX5V7KPeIJYNgW-FGSXgiVwyXYAyJqQpBrm3hTblHAOYPjRCSLpKQq14vjpir_m3167Aspz7LqfzjkmORoPzbt5_f9X9q5QbGcDFT3pR_E76w4Tmef2jfqQ6j6sx2AO3_KOXTWu_Z_Q0AAP__ZPSJcw)

name: Urgent call
subject: $26 built a firewall against Trump. Only one week to hold it.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Time is almost up and 53% of WI voters are still undecided. We have to act now!
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t2TA7IEKVHxdXXkVL4MZu3yzjnBLen5ofpLxFJ3MnYTusZ_TPsEWgarZKie07r81VxoDKszkOABFpB3P16LDXdRQQoUw8WCbmrIFVBVJkk-1RcHkHD-cjEOsP1uwdIoY9-8po90ZpmFUkwSHWnefsRvaOOA8SI19rZMoW4i6Yz3qQyPzzLRb8qMMdivfEGVXLK9-zFVkw0iOCPo7nZzNou_KwUsB0iEOnqjJvR5bAts=&c=VgnEmSvFLaKUyVhDZ5IBnCl9Bn77TItACT7zi8NgsNI8qVAjSq666w==&ch=TZ-esg7IuUG50j5qvB_gqbY8LhVDdwwgIZcu8OxKoLK9S97gcKJQhg==)

|
Peter,
$26.
That was the average donation from grassroots supporters like you in 2025.
On its own, it may not seem like much. But together, those donations powered something incredible:
Defend Our Courts reached 750,000 Pennsylvania voters who rarely show up for judicial elections--and turnout in that group didn't just increase...
It nearly doubled.
From 30.8% in 2023 -> 59% in 2025.
If you supported Defend Our Courts last year, make no mistake:
You helped build the firewall that protected our democracy.

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t2TA7IEKVHxdXXkVL4MZu3yzjnBLen5ofpLxFJ3MnYTusZ_TPsEWgarZKie07r81VxoDKszkOABFpB3P16LDXdRQQoUw8WCbmrIFVBVJkk-1RcHkHD-cjEOsP1uwdIoY9-8po90ZpmFUkwSHWnefsRvaOOA8SI19rZMoW4i6Yz3qQyPzzLRb8qMMdivfEGVXLK9-zFVkw0iOCPo7nZzNokaBOG-ZpmLPc-kUUik5cYs=&c=VgnEmSvFLaKUyVhDZ5IBnCl9Bn77TItACT7zi8NgsNI8qVAjSq666w==&ch=TZ-esg7IuUG50j5qvB_gqbY8LhVDdwwgIZcu8OxKoLK9S97gcKJQhg==)
---

Now we have just one week to do it again.
The Wisconsin Supreme Court election is April 7, and this race will decide whether that same firewall holds in one of the most critical swing states in the country.
If you haven't donated yet, we need you to step up now. If you have, we're deeply grateful--but at this stage, we need you to double down.
Here's the reality: We don't have the same level of resources we had in Pennsylvania. But we didn't wait.
In just the past week, Defend Our Courts has deployed cutting-edge tools to engage thousands of Wisconsin voters directly--having real conversations to close the awareness gap in a race where voters are still tuning in.
In February, 66% of voters were undecided. Now, that number is falling, but as of mid-March 53% of voters are still undecided
We are making progress. But we are running out of time.
We can't add more days to the calendar--but we can reach more voters before Election Day. And that comes down to resources. So we're asking:
[Can you chip in $26--or more--right now to help us finish this fight strong and secure the Wisconsin Supreme Court?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t2TA7IEKVHxdXXkVL4MZu3yzjnBLen5ofpLxFJ3MnYTusZ_TPsEWgarZKie07r81Ltw12dSZTJrRVk9-AWmtYSHMbUXDDKBBrvK984F6ew09rjntpjZSsL0zmxRYEkT-OeoihHdKN0z3darLePJUlarjXw-g8z5ciuoWuxF4pJlsrxObYWIWxhnFIvJlHaSEZBg3R3kJ96IcEHXgXVxzUDt83LAPCHPCasn6hZWQL9A2TWs-4oQKbg==&c=VgnEmSvFLaKUyVhDZ5IBnCl9Bn77TItACT7zi8NgsNI8qVAjSq666w==&ch=TZ-esg7IuUG50j5qvB_gqbY8LhVDdwwgIZcu8OxKoLK9S97gcKJQhg==)

clean_body: Time is almost up and 53% of WI voters are still undecided. We have to act now! | | | | | == | Peter, $26. That was the average donation from grassroots supporters like you in 2025. On its own, it may not seem like much. But together, those donations powered something incredible: Defend Our Courts reached 750,000 Pennsylvania voters who rarely show up for judicial elections--and turnout in that group didn't just increase... It nearly doubled. From 30.8% in 2023 -> 59% in 2025. If you supported Defend Our Courts last year, make no mistake: You helped build the firewall that protected our democracy. | == Now we have just one week to do it again. The Wisconsin Supreme Court election is April 7, and this race will decide whether that same firewall holds in one of the most critical swing states in the country. If you haven't donated yet, we need you to step up now. If you have, we're deeply grateful--but at this stage, we need you to double down. Here's the reality: We don't have the same level of resources we had in Pennsylvania. But we didn't wait. In just the past week, Defend Our Courts has deployed cutting-edge tools to engage thousands of Wisconsin voters directly--having real conversations to close the awareness gap in a race where voters are still tuning in. In February, 66% of voters were undecided. Now, that number is falling, but as of mid-March 53% of voters are still undecided We are making progress. But we are running out of time. We can't add more days to the calendar--but we can reach more voters before Election Day. And that comes down to resources. So we're asking: == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | | | | == | You've already proven what grassroots action can achieve. Let's do it again--before it's too late. -- Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. name: The Texas Flyover
subject: $61M FIFA Boost, an Otter Comeback, and a Stolen Owl Returns
body:
North Texas has secured more than [$61 million](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM3uoyAUxZ8GdxhA1L8LFs0k7uxiMkmX5iKXSoLSwK22bz9xXmG25yS_8_GY5glCDPvzDhsa-vg073iWiESY505uPniwKRWCPV3akja0MCuhOi40F83sIMTvrCtnrHCDrNDIvm-V1OKnr1bjG4VWD0MLVg6-s4Btp7tF9NAID7BUwVwwoUUjpZCqr7UFN0gJ7Y8Dq51gWqALlHJNKxJ-oPj4TQfmeklbFc1K9CqsuTE1MjWe51lDviZR2ulTP9PB1HjHs_BbprBELEyNVyRT4wR5WS87ZVr5n4vNf-OC4cDCp5SR0wo77-TEw85HdJgh8vG9u8J9yvyRcnT81_tVZeNeZ4gxlK5nWjw3CPFfP_q_Vw-j_gYAAP__PTaMrw) in federal funding to prepare for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with most allocated to security and the rest to boost regional transit systems. Officials say the investment will support one of the largest global sporting events ever hosted in North America.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOwyAQhk8DXaIZwBAXFCtF6bLtltYA4wQJm8igPG6_8l5hu1__q_h-rtOVcsnr7ZsW9v0912nlVyvcO2-TxWXOM4VaW6e17l6sCweaFCh7AHMAPSXK5TMZmXyANKJkj84NCg2cnLz7YMGxMQH1aBRFrSI4ZUPU4zAEm5LMfj8DAxoRULmjCZRGRBpOiYJJIAxwyr1ux37nzm9qc_nUJ2_HWBdZ_L33RxP6S6iLUJcHL6Fwr-ucV1pjprLX9kxfSOgzGgdC2Sj0WeFJ77qh0Ge5-fR45VJys04YuC2U_6ay_4_L06vfAAAA___KkXME) | |
# Friday, April 3, 2026
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1886, [Arthur "Dooley" Wilson](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO4yAURb8Gd7YAY7ALim3cZdstrYd5xGgxLwImTv5-lPmFaa-uzpHOv9t2g5hivv-FE217BdoyXjVha1g2Lc4QAzii2iDTZ9vpRAeb5FL3XPV83DzE9N5U563jfhEdWmHMJIXis-kOOy1Saj2ZoOYwLuOiAWAJYZdz2DU400X7gXHFRyG4kGZQDvwiBEyzB6c8Z4qjj43K0A5s-IIa0pueWIadzi7Zo7VHZeMfJlcm1-u6hlYPoJxixoHKncn1gOwd0X8mV8ytRKyfZ0yVcg-lHV-l90QJ312x_nHFlGLVhil-PyGmH0_7XZ2nld8BAAD__wnwepU) was born in Tyler. Wilson was best known for his role as Sam in the 1942 film _Casablanca_ and for bringing the song _As Time Goes By_ to life on screen. >From a [$61 million](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM3uoyAUxZ8GdxhA1L8LFs0k7uxiMkmX5iKXSoLSwK22bz9xXmG25yS_8_GY5glCDPvzDhsa-vg073iWiESY505uPniwKRWCPV3akja0MCuhOi40F83sIMTvrCtnrHCDrNDIvm-V1OKnr1bjG4VWD0MLVg6-s4Btp7tF9NAID7BUwVwwoUUjpZCqr7UFN0gJ7Y8Dq51gWqALlHJNKxJ-oPj4TQfmeklbFc1K9CqsuTE1MjWe51lDviZR2ulTP9PB1HjHs_BbprBELEyNVyRT4wR5WS87ZVr5n4vNf-OC4cDCp5SR0wo77-TEw85HdJgh8vG9u8J9yvyRcnT81_tVZeNeZ4gxlK5nWjw3CPFfP_q_Vw-j_gYAAP__PTaMrw) FIFA World Cup boost in North Texas to [river otters](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAMhp8mbFR2CKQMGW5h6603IkNMiRRIlfja8vYn-gq3Wp8--ft_buONQgz7_Zs2dvJe0rjzq0QW4Tx2uC1hoSmlIrSn8zanjScaNeiuBlNDM3oK8RhN5d0EvseKHVrbajRwtdXqemM8ENoWgDo0LXUW8TotU78sTYtdFdwpAwMNIqC2FzOR7xGpvXqajAdlgH2QlC-ysvCbyhKP9OR8mdNWRbeKPIpqvpQelB5-9_DkXIIcReiDKD00LVqj9HC2KT3kE6k_PaV-ZC68z1yH3YeZhEu9MkVZj5rnVI4ifCqq7PzjFWIMpbPKwH2jED8fyP92ezr9FwAA___tK4Kw) making a splashy return across Central Texas, today's lineup offers a little bit of everything. Find these stories and more in _The Roundup_. Today's sponsor, [Fisher Investments](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOwyAQhk8DXaIZwBAXFCtF6bLtltYA4wQJm8igPG6_8l5hu1__q_h-rtOVcsnr7ZsW9v0912nlVyvcO2-TxWXOM4VaW6e17l6sCweaFCh7AHMAPSXK5TMZmXyANKJkj84NCg2cnLz7YMGxMQH1aBRFrSI4ZUPU4zAEm5LMfj8DAxoRULmjCZRGRBpOiYJJIAxwyr1ux37nzm9qc_nUJ2_HWBdZ_L33RxP6S6iLUJcHL6Fwr-ucV1pjprLX9kxfSOgzGgdC2Sj0WeFJ77qh0Ge5-fR45VJys04YuC2U_6ay_4_L06vfAAAA___KkXME), is offering a free guide to help you build a smarter retirement plan that accounts for inflation, rising costs, and long-term financial security.

## North Texas Receives $61M for World Cup
North Texas has secured more than [$61 million](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkM3uoyAUxZ8GdxhA1L8LFs0k7uxiMkmX5iKXSoLSwK22bz9xXmG25yS_8_GY5glCDPvzDhsa-vg073iWiESY505uPniwKRWCPV3akja0MCuhOi40F83sIMTvrCtnrHCDrNDIvm-V1OKnr1bjG4VWD0MLVg6-s4Btp7tF9NAID7BUwVwwoUUjpZCqr7UFN0gJ7Y8Dq51gWqALlHJNKxJ-oPj4TQfmeklbFc1K9CqsuTE1MjWe51lDviZR2ulTP9PB1HjHs_BbprBELEyNVyRT4wR5WS87ZVr5n4vNf-OC4cDCp5SR0wo77-TEw85HdJgh8vG9u8J9yvyRcnT81_tVZeNeZ4gxlK5nWjw3CPFfP_q_Vw-j_gYAAP__PTaMrw) in federal funding to prepare for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, with most allocated to security and the rest to boost regional transit systems. Officials say the investment will support one of the largest global sporting events ever hosted in North America. Leaders are coordinating a regional [transportation plan](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuupDAQRL_GZKC2MY8JHGxCNptuiBp3e7BkbAS98_j7K-YXbloqVemcf_f5jjHF_PiLGzt5hzJnfp2JRfiYe72FGHAp5RTM5cp82XjB2YDpa7A1tDNhTJ_ZVuQWoJuu2Olh6Iy2MA7V6nwgTyMsGi1z33box7EPZDvtBxrpVkV3jYGFVmvQZmjsgnTTGruRcLEEygJTlHI0srLwG8-QPuXJR-PLViW3iuynav8oMykzeWxCzJg9Nx9cS7lKykwXlTKTHP-5zuWQtX7GvS4757P-wugOAKAz0KyypepwtL9iSvHsB2XhsWFM3z_5naWnMz8BAAD__03Hevk) to move fans between Dallas, Fort Worth, and Arlington, where AT&T Stadium will host nine matches, including a semifinal. Rail lines, charter buses, and other expanded services are expected to handle heavy demand. Organizers are also working with airports, local agencies, and private providers to [streamline travel](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLuu4yAQhp8Gd1gwJiYpKLZxl223tIaLYyQMFszGydsf2a9w2n8u-r7_33N-Ykwxv_7iFgx9ljLncLQUiEKdR7ktcUFbSiPM5cxc2YLFGQSMXCguhtljTN9Zdd5Y4R-yC0ZqfQOpxF13q7nrQY1aPKyzTqpBB1DK2dsQMIwKBuiiOZ8JJQYphQTdK4v-ISXe7h6t8oIpEXykUntaA4UPtiV9yzvU3pWtS2Yl2hsb_jCYGEzHcfTOttPinDOYrhMG0xkxmC70U4sfpSbP3f-d51Jp5dcip4q57aUSUiyZ7wkzg6mrxu9HTCm2UTMlXhvGdAHQ72p7G_gJAAD__1ajggA) across the region, as millions of international visitors are expected to arrive during the tournament.
## State to Launch Psychedelic Study
Texas leaders will move forward with a [state-run study of ibogaine](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAQRL_GdCB7cYAULq6hy7VXorW9hpUMjmxfSP7-lPzCtaOnmdH7uS035MjH-o07mfoMaTnoLJFqpbwMag8c0KZUKh7pnbm0k8UFJAyt1K3sF48cX4tuvLHSX1VDRo3jBZSW09hsZvI2KAvYX7wN06BghBEGUNbqa-iDbNi8y6SWvVJSwdhpi_6qFF4mj1Z7KbQkzzXlrm5U6YklxFd6UO5c2ptotlrvRfRfAmYB83me3Qeqme3vQV3Kq4D5vSFglr2AuVcC5g_Tsk0r8kFtpkKY3da6yAc7jG3NjLG09_JyG3mK7IqAucnG30-OkcswCi3XHTl-jtT_6XsY-AsAAP__PuqELA) after failing to secure a pharmaceutical partner, using $50 million in previously approved funding. Officials say no company met the requirements needed to begin clinical trials under the state program. [The psychoactive compound](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdI68i8FQUFxD9197JVrba2Kdwcg44c_bnxLpnuCvRpqRPs3Mn6_li2KK-_qbNp7qd8jLzteZuFYuSw9biIFszmelPb89lze2tKDCXiotVbt4ium16MZPVvkRGp7AmA5Bq8E09wkdG3BacRcG6EfErgvBW9DgWxgBmji9YUqrFkABmpu25EcA6gZPVnsltGIfay63eufK33SG9MpPLjeXtyZN91qPU7S_BM4C5-u6bn-fD36HAmcqNbrEAuf3LoFzyo6SwPkD-q8y2rxS3FkWPpmKu8uj5LXQJh872cTSl8cqXd4O2l_yoFJ3LgJn7EcJvXamVUaGPiipB7bStlbLwXgI1LHRvWrK5I8rphTP3git1o1i-vSvP3v9OeG_AAAA___JipT0), derived from an African plant, has shown promise in early research for treating PTSD, addiction, and traumatic brain injuries. Despite growing interest, ibogaine remains illegal in the U.S. and classified as a Schedule I drug. Lawmakers say Texas will partner with in-state universities and medical researchers to lead the effort, [aiming to develop a treatment](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOozAUhJ8GOiPbmEsKF9vQZdst0cHnOFjrC8ImhLf_RV7hb0czo5nv33N-gvMuvv5CIF0-Ns2RzuypFNrnXgTrLCwp5QIx3ZpJgRaYJZc944rxdkZw_ppVjXrh-BA1aTEMnRSKj0O96raX3dg_pGglSmEUjoMyneBtZ9FygNrpu4wr3grBhRwatQA-hIBuRFgU8kpxQlfS3pSVCn0gW3-lN-2NSaH2ei1ly1X7p5JTJafzPBubPgMcubh4Wyo53Z8qOX3DzMMRzcpcRNooIsXCtnyZlZC8MyyXAy8GttDOcD9ezKSwQXSUWXA5swD7_3rXuJ3Oe5f7oVL8FcD575zyO4hvLX8CAAD__4ZciPM) that could eventually gain federal approval. Some experts note the project carries high regulatory and financial risks without private-sector backing.
## River Otters Return to Central Texas
River otters are making a comeback across Central Texas, with [increasing sightings](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOgzAMhp8mbFR2CKQMGW5h6603IkNMiRRIlfja8vYn-gq3Wp8--ft_buONQgz7_Zs2dvJe0rjzq0QW4Tx2uC1hoSmlIrSn8zanjScaNeiuBlNDM3oK8RhN5d0EvseKHVrbajRwtdXqemM8ENoWgDo0LXUW8TotU78sTYtdFdwpAwMNIqC2FzOR7xGpvXqajAdlgH2QlC-ysvCbyhKP9OR8mdNWRbeKPIpqvpQelB5-9_DkXIIcReiDKD00LVqj9HC2KT3kE6k_PaV-ZC68z1yH3YeZhEu9MkVZj5rnVI4ifCqq7PzjFWIMpbPKwH2jED8fyP92ezr9FwAA___tK4Kw) along the San Marcos and San Antonio rivers after decades of absence. Experts say their return signals improving water quality and stronger ecosystems. Biologists note the semi-aquatic predators depend on clean water and abundant food, including fish and crayfish. Their growing presence suggests that conservation efforts and habitat restoration are helping [rivers remain resilient](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGy4yAMRb8Gd2RAEDuvcLEN3dt2S48AOWYGgweUvOTvd5z9hG2lO1fn6M_38o0pp3L_jTvN_FrrUuinZ2Kmtox6X9OKvtbOWOo5C3UnjwsoGKWyUpklYsrvxQ5x9ip-6YFmPU1X0FbdpmGbcTJg_Eq3cMNxCletcPTGgCXlKUIY0nyWKauM1krDdLEe45fWeL1F9DYqYRXFxLVdeCOmF_Y1v-uT2iXUfcjzxnx0YX4JcAJcPyhwe-y5Bsyny5kS4Ph1LuuDN_npkJTlgb0KcGdKgDsxBDhlBDijBbiWntTkR1v2dN84lXuXoRZO5UGSq0wlNMJOEkOrvctAhRvmfxeGNsfjJ-Wc-jgJq-47pvxh5v_79HOGvwEAAP__vfGUpA) despite ongoing drought. Officials say sightings have expanded from San Marcos to areas near San Antonio and even Waco, as [otters](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O6yAMQJ-GbFSGkNAODHfJ9t31jpETnAYVcAWoP29_lfYRvtE-0pGP__3MPxhiyNe_mMi118ZzpmeN1BqVeVRpCxsuzLVh5mO3cqIFZw16lGAk9LPHEN-z6bxbwF9UR05ZO2hl4Gy73V1wA1DnwVvVW7A4HJSMGXtN0BN2wR0yMNArBUrbk1nQX5TC4exxMR6EAfKhcTm1nRq9sG7xzQ8qp5VTF93e2r2K_o_Qk9DTzuxjyHRAoafDLfQERuipRqKbLOFBRX5iqkx4I4my3iPW_S2_detNhiwrZom5cQ4sMfvPnLCsXL-KKvTUFefvzxBjqKMVBq4JQ_yc1X73zIfT_wMAAP__zRiIqg) reclaim parts of their historic range. Researchers encourage residents to [observe from a distance](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2K6zAUBOCnkbsY_cVOChUXgrvcaiGlOLKOncNKlpGUOH77xfsK2w4fMzCPu70DBVrm_xDR1M-U7IJbCVgrZtuJONEELqVSYUlHNqaIDqzksjtxfeLKeqCwW91447i_igaN6PuzFJpf-uZpzpNWHp2aJCrXjdBdrtxLdAKlchP3DZmjjGuuhOBC9q124K9CwPniwWnPmeboqabc1idW_ECZwp7emNsxxSaYZ61rYeofkwOTw7ZtLS2lwpwhHoLJISMGJofbV_fYab7N635YNbxqtCW98ohM3Wi2Gzo7pnW3gZbvJhu_bhQCla5nms8RKPxO1r8d9TbyJwAA__9-xX4c) and help protect river habitats.

It isn't just about saving enough--it's also about making sure your savings last. Over that time the steady effects of inflation can significantly reduce your purchasing power, especially as costs for essentials like healthcare continue to rise. What seems like a comfortable nest egg today [could fall short tomorrow without a forward-looking strategy](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOwyAQhk8DXaIZwBAXFCtF6bLtltYA4wQJm8igPG6_8l5hu1__q_h-rtOVcsnr7ZsW9v0912nlVyvcO2-TxWXOM4VaW6e17l6sCweaFCh7AHMAPSXK5TMZmXyANKJkj84NCg2cnLz7YMGxMQH1aBRFrSI4ZUPU4zAEm5LMfj8DAxoRULmjCZRGRBpOiYJJIAxwyr1ux37nzm9qc_nUJ2_HWBdZ_L33RxP6S6iLUJcHL6Fwr-ucV1pjprLX9kxfSOgzGgdC2Sj0WeFJ77qh0Ge5-fR45VJys04YuC2U_6ay_4_L06vfAAAA___KkXME). A successful plan requires a clear objective that accounts for your goals, time horizon and the impact of rising costs. Fisher Investments' free guide, [**The 15 Minute Retirement Plan**](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDuOwyAQhk8DXaIZwBAXFCtF6bLtltYA4wQJm8igPG6_8l5hu1__q_h-rtOVcsnr7ZsW9v0912nlVyvcO2-TxWXOM4VaW6e17l6sCweaFCh7AHMAPSXK5TMZmXyANKJkj84NCg2cnLz7YMGxMQH1aBRFrSI4ZUPU4zAEm5LMfj8DAxoRULmjCZRGRBpOiYJJIAxwyr1ux37nzm9qc_nUJ2_HWBdZ_L33RxP6S6iLUJcHL6Fwr-ucV1pjprLX9kxfSOgzGgdC2Sj0WeFJ77qh0Ge5-fR45VJys04YuC2U_6ay_4_L06vfAAAA___KkXME), can help you define your goals, understand these challenges and build a tailored strategy designed to support the retirement lifestyle you've worked for.

Officials say the investment will support one of the largest global sporting events ever hosted in North America. Leaders are coordinating a regional to move fans between Dallas, Fort Worth, and Arlington, where AT&T Stadium will host nine matches, including a semifinal. Rail lines, charter buses, and other expanded services are expected to handle heavy demand. Organizers are also working with airports, local agencies, and private providers to across the region, as millions of international visitors are expected to arrive during the tournament. State to Launch Psychedelic Study Texas leaders will move forward with a after failing to secure a pharmaceutical partner, using $50 million in previously approved funding. Officials say no company met the requirements needed to begin clinical trials under the state program. , derived from an African plant, has shown promise in early research for treating PTSD, addiction, and traumatic brain injuries. Despite growing interest, ibogaine remains illegal in the U.S. and classified as a Schedule I drug. Lawmakers say Texas will partner with in-state universities and medical researchers to lead the effort, that could eventually gain federal approval. Some experts note the project carries high regulatory and financial risks without private-sector backing. River Otters Return to Central Texas River otters are making a comeback across Central Texas, with along the San Marcos and San Antonio rivers after decades of absence. Experts say their return signals improving water quality and stronger ecosystems. Biologists note the semi-aquatic predators depend on clean water and abundant food, including fish and crayfish. Their growing presence suggests that conservation efforts and habitat restoration are helping despite ongoing drought. Officials say sightings have expanded from San Marcos to areas near San Antonio and even Waco, as reclaim parts of their historic range. Researchers encourage residents to and help protect river habitats. | Flying together with our sponsor Is your retirement plan prepared for the unexpected? | | Dear friend,
Did you know that on this day in 1891, the Texas Legislature created the Railroad Commission?
The Texas Railroad Commission was the brainchild of Governor Jim Hogg, who ran for Governor in 1890 on the promise of creating the Commission.
Governor Hogg and the Texas Legislature created the Railroad Commission to protect Texans by reigning in Railroad carriers who were operating in a regulatory vacuum.
These visionaries recognized that the Railroad industry was an integral part of Texas's prosperity.
In 1917, the Railroad Commission began its transition to energy regulation when the Texas legislature passed the Pipeline Petroleum Law and declared petroleum pipelines common carriers.
Since then, the Railroad Commission has served the crucial role of promoting Texas's prosperity by protecting and stewarding Texas's vast energy resources.
**It’s high time we return to the original mission of the Railroad Commission.**
Unlike my opponent, who has spent his tenure on the Railroad Commission promoting DEI programs and Green New Scam, I believe the Railroad Commission’s principal function is to promote and protect Texas prosperity by putting Texas energy first.
That’s why I’m on a mission to make the Railroad Commission Great Again.
Do you hate the Green New Scam?
Do you think DEI has no place in Government?
Do you want to see RINOs who bow to the Left defeated?
If we are going to make the Railroad Commission great again, I’m going to need your help.

---

---

It’s going to take all of us to win this thing and save the RRC. But together, we can do it.
Nearly 70% of Republican voters rejected Jim Wright in the Primary. We just need to show up in May to seal the deal.

We just need to show up in May to seal the deal. | | | | | Wishing you a wonderful Good Friday and a Happy Easter, Bo French Candidate for TX Railroad Commissioner | | P.S. Join me on April 6th for the event of the year! | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|--- Pol. Adv. Paid for by the Bo French Campaign []()

subject: Trump Boots Bondi, Hands DOJ to Loyalist Todd Blanche Amid Growing Fallout
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Trump Boots Bondi, Hands DOJ to Loyalist Todd Blanche Amid Growing Fallout (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=6de89aa44e&e=f093fa355c)

WASHINGTON – President Donald Trump on Thursday abruptly ousted Attorney General Pam Bondi and moved Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche into the role of acting attorney general, a high-level shakeup that comes amid growing fallout over Bondi’s handling of the Jeffrey Epstein files and frustration inside Trump’s orbit over the pace of politically sensitive prosecutions. name: Brad for Governor
subject: We’re back—and it’s go time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BRAD FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
The session is over

| | | | | [|
---](https://BradForGeorgia.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb0b5d8f4cac8238170f7992f&id=7d7f924f5a&e=6036811227)
| | | | | |

Dear Friend,
With the legislative session now behind us, our fundraising restriction has officially been lifted—and we’re back.
**This is a sprint.**
**Early voting begins April 27, and the primary is May 19. We have a short window to reach voters and make our case across Georgia.**
While others in this race continue to spend millions attacking each other, we are focused on something different: delivering real solutions on affordability, education, and public safety—and communicating that message directly to voters.
Our paid program is already underway, but we need to scale quickly in the coming weeks to meet this moment.
**I’m asking you to step up today.**
[**Will you contribute now to help us finish strong?**](https://BradForGeorgia.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=cb0b5d8f4cac8238170f7992f&id=cd036a79cf&e=6036811227)
Every dollar will go directly toward reaching voters as they begin making their decisions.
Thank you for your support—and for standing with me in this fight.

name: NEGOP
subject: Join Us April 11 — Day of Action for Sen. Rick Holdcroft in LD 36
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nebraska Republican Party, 1610 N St
body:
Coffee, donuts, and door knocking in Gretna. Here's what you need to know.
| | |
---
| |
---
| Fellow Nebraska Republican,
The May 12th Primary is right around the corner, and we need your help. Join the Nebraska Republican Party and the Sarpy County Republican Party on Saturday, April 11 in Gretna as we knock doors to re-elect Senator Rick Holdcroft to the Legislature. Senator Holdcroft and Gretna Mayor Mike Evans will deliver brief remarks before we hit the streets.
Here's the schedule:
* 9:30 AM -- Coffee, donuts & volunteer check-in
* 10:00 AM -- Remarks & door knocking app training
* 10:15 AM -- Door knocking begins

No experience necessary. The exact meet-up location will be provided upon registration.
Register Here: [Sign Up Form](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qRUwIVhBgsBed1fwv2MyowORyJKgccvSGRkvsMQS29eluR5MclKuXZ1RbvX65_pMlMGEgm9uvf5yDU8Rwg9obkBJNdDUoxRYfVGN-B96bzdur6fV1SniXrFmvfWko_wJ7jECB7m3wGqG-7nWk222nhJyMxAA1BF1grhdR1sEgHa43t-_hvrOtkQ0Ne5p7RXeErZXIRvwvPezCyKTyXxSnOe5RHyKgeHcpgeDnGvx6TziZ2zgmLiBr38ZtcbBc9Nrto602CmShCSz6EXCrpiNA8vYHfl5-T3q&c=wchWNhxHcVWgfbVNhR8zl0UCq7QPWhnIuqA8a3ANH8FZLXzBF7NKwQ==&ch=y_r1XzzCWHRyGX_115UoSHh9XbN93STyLcZVviL2zudXawqg-qOioA==) Can't make it on the 11th? We have got you covered. More Days of Action are coming April 18 and April 25. Visit vote.ne.gop to find an event that works for you.
Every door knocked between now and May 12th makes a difference. We hope to see you out there!
Joe Hagerty Political Director, Nebraska Republican Party
---
