name: James O'Keefe
subject: The White House responded
body:
Two weeks ago, my team released hidden-camera footage of a man on a Los Angeles sidewalk handing a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill.

| | | | | [](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb1uhDAQhJ_GdCBjGzgKF5EQ3aVNifbsBazgH_mHe_2Ii65Jl2535tuRRvt1X-5gDuO2T7Ao1WmWmJa843M3GXdfEkZMwTuNemGU9TUVNeUX1FZaKt1zVqFsh6FjjI4trXbZ8VFT8WhFJzQooKD5IJCviikY4NZVRl5JVFDeMkopa8Z17JDdBrXeRtD6QQQtQUPG1CjvEsYTsjnROOevybtGeVsdcs85JMI_CJsJmxOqErEBh9rniyBs9t-IK1rUBrboS7gku9UQojnqA4pTe20fdfABCJ9LtkvyJSokfPrLEdZf_pVVLOHT6-ZXU2ADmM0RPr2bvR3vMrpM-KROQ1gP1pfXyrsqSh2e5jhM6gci6GbBHK9i-Z9_OCX7CQAA__8UvZh3 "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260403&utm_content=cvi&amount=25")
---
| Dear Patriot,
[](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb1uhDAQhJ_GdCBjGzgKF5EQ3aVNifbsBazgH_mHe_2Ii65Jl2535tuRRvt1X-5gDuO2T7Ao1WmWmJa843M3GXdfEkZMwTuNemGU9TUVNeUX1FZaKt1zVqFsh6FjjI4trXbZ8VFT8WhFJzQooKD5IJCviikY4NZVRl5JVFDeMkopa8Z17JDdBrXeRtD6QQQtQUPG1CjvEsYTsjnROOevybtGeVsdcs85JMI_CJsJmxOqErEBh9rniyBs9t-IK1rUBrboS7gku9UQojnqA4pTe20fdfABCJ9LtkvyJSokfPrLEdZf_pVVLOHT6-ZXU2ADmM0RPr2bvR3vMrpM-KROQ1gP1pfXyrsqSh2e5jhM6gci6GbBHK9i-Z9_OCX7CQAA__8UvZh3 "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260403&utm_content=cvi&amount=25") Two weeks ago, my team released hidden-camera footage of a man on a Los Angeles sidewalk handing a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill. On the note was a name, an address, a date of birth. A real voter's identity. "Sign his name," the man said. "Just write what I tell you to write." **2.5 million people watched that video in the first 48 hours.** 82,000 liked it. 33,000 shared it. Eric Daugherty's post demanding "ARREST HIM NOW" hit 1.5 million views and 95,000 likes. Libs of TikTok's coverage: 846,000 views and 45,000 likes. The White House responded. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called our footage "astounding" and said the President is "working on an executive order to strengthen our elections." The DOJ issued a statement: they will "aggressively pursue anyone" involved in election fraud. Governor Newsom -- _Gavin Newsom_ -- said: "This alleged activity is a felony and should be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law." Los Angeles DA Nathan Hochman personally contacted us: "We have received your complaint and will open a file." **And then a detective from the Palm Beach County Sheriff 's Office showed up at my headquarters. Looking for me.** Not a single person from our videos has been arrested. But a law enforcement officer showed up at **my** door. **[▶ STAND WITH JAMES -- CHIP IN $35 TO KEEP US IN THE FIELD](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb1uhDAQhJ_GdCBjGzgKF5EQ3aVNifbsBazgH_mHe_2Ii65Jl2535tuRRvt1X-5gDuO2T7Ao1WmWmJa843M3GXdfEkZMwTuNemGU9TUVNeUX1FZaKt1zVqFsh6FjjI4trXbZ8VFT8WhFJzQooKD5IJCviikY4NZVRl5JVFDeMkopa8Z17JDdBrXeRtD6QQQtQUPG1CjvEsYTsjnROOevybtGeVsdcs85JMI_CJsJmxOqErEBh9rniyBs9t-IK1rUBrboS7gku9UQojnqA4pTe20fdfABCJ9LtkvyJSokfPrLEdZf_pVVLOHT6-ZXU2ADmM0RPr2bvR3vMrpM-KROQ1gP1pfXyrsqSh2e5jhM6gci6GbBHK9i-Z9_OCX7CQAA__8UvZh3 "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260403&utm_content=cvi&amount=25")** Here's what I need you to understand: Everything you just read -- the footage, the White House response, the DA opening a file, the Governor forced to respond -- all of it happened because of what we built together over the past four months. This year, O'Keefe Media Group investigations have generated over **9.9 million views on a single post.** We've triggered a **$9 billion Treasury audit.** We got **$253 million in federal contracts suspended.** A Secret Service agent was suspended within hours of our report. An FBI security specialist confessed on hidden camera that major fraud cases are deliberately slow-walked so "everyone walks." **That 's not opinion journalism. That's results.** But I'm going to be straight with you -- results cost money. And right now, I need to fund my team's operations through the entire month of April. We need to raise **$92,430** to cover fieldwork, equipment, legal defense, and payroll for the journalists who made every one of those investigations possible. That's the real number. That's what it takes. $35 covers a background check on the voter identities being stolen in Los Angeles. $50 funds a day of undercover equipment. $100 covers a full day of field operations. $250 goes directly toward the legal defense fund protecting our journalists from the people who want us silenced. **[▶ CHIP IN $50 TO FUND APRIL OPERATIONS](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb1uhDAQhJ_GdCBjGzgKF5EQ3aVNifbsBazgH_mHe_2Ii65Jl2535tuRRvt1X-5gDuO2T7Ao1WmWmJa843M3GXdfEkZMwTuNemGU9TUVNeUX1FZaKt1zVqFsh6FjjI4trXbZ8VFT8WhFJzQooKD5IJCviikY4NZVRl5JVFDeMkopa8Z17JDdBrXeRtD6QQQtQUPG1CjvEsYTsjnROOevybtGeVsdcs85JMI_CJsJmxOqErEBh9rniyBs9t-IK1rUBrboS7gku9UQojnqA4pTe20fdfABCJ9LtkvyJSokfPrLEdZf_pVVLOHT6-ZXU2ADmM0RPr2bvR3vMrpM-KROQ1gP1pfXyrsqSh2e5jhM6gci6GbBHK9i-Z9_OCX7CQAA__8UvZh3 "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260403&utm_content=cvi&amount=25")** Bo Loudon, a supporter and political commentator, put it simply: "God bless James for uncovering this. These fraudsters NEED to be arrested." He's right. But arrests don't happen without evidence. Evidence doesn't happen without investigators. And investigators don't happen without you. We have four active investigations in the pipeline right now. Jonathan Choe, the journalist who broke the Los Angeles footage, is expanding into San Francisco's Tenderloin district. We're hiring new undercover operatives. The Citizen Justice League -- our network of trained citizen journalists -- is growing every week. But none of it moves forward without funding. Can I count on you for April? **[▶ YES -- RUSH $100 TO FUND APRIL INVESTIGATIONS](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb1uhDAQhJ_GdCBjGzgKF5EQ3aVNifbsBazgH_mHe_2Ii65Jl2535tuRRvt1X-5gDuO2T7Ao1WmWmJa843M3GXdfEkZMwTuNemGU9TUVNeUX1FZaKt1zVqFsh6FjjI4trXbZ8VFT8WhFJzQooKD5IJCviikY4NZVRl5JVFDeMkopa8Z17JDdBrXeRtD6QQQtQUPG1CjvEsYTsjnROOevybtGeVsdcs85JMI_CJsJmxOqErEBh9rniyBs9t-IK1rUBrboS7gku9UQojnqA4pTe20fdfABCJ9LtkvyJSokfPrLEdZf_pVVLOHT6-ZXU2ADmM0RPr2bvR3vMrpM-KROQ1gP1pfXyrsqSh2e5jhM6gci6GbBHK9i-Z9_OCX7CQAA__8UvZh3 "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260403&utm_content=cvi&amount=25")** In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** 2.5 million people watched our footage. The White House responded. The DOJ promised action. The LA District Attorney opened a file. And a detective showed up at my door. All because of what your donations made possible. **Now I need $92,430 to fund April. Your $35, $50, or $100 today is the reason we can keep going when they try to make us stop.** **[Chip in now to fund April operations.](https://email.updates.conservativeinnovation.com/c/eJyUkb1uhDAQhJ_GdCBjGzgKF5EQ3aVNifbsBazgH_mHe_2Ii65Jl2535tuRRvt1X-5gDuO2T7Ao1WmWmJa843M3GXdfEkZMwTuNemGU9TUVNeUX1FZaKt1zVqFsh6FjjI4trXbZ8VFT8WhFJzQooKD5IJCviikY4NZVRl5JVFDeMkopa8Z17JDdBrXeRtD6QQQtQUPG1CjvEsYTsjnROOevybtGeVsdcs85JMI_CJsJmxOqErEBh9rniyBs9t-IK1rUBrboS7gku9UQojnqA4pTe20fdfABCJ9LtkvyJSokfPrLEdZf_pVVLOHT6-ZXU2ADmM0RPr2bvR3vMrpM-KROQ1gP1pfXyrsqSh2e5jhM6gci6GbBHK9i-Z9_OCX7CQAA__8UvZh3 "https://secure.anedot.com/okeefemediagroup/omg-april-launch-hf?utm_source=omg-april-launch&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=20260403&utm_content=cvi&amount=25")**

clean_body: Two weeks ago, my team released hidden-camera footage of a man on a Los Angeles sidewalk handing a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill. | | | | | "" | Dear Patriot, "" Two weeks ago, my team released hidden-camera footage of a man on a Los Angeles sidewalk handing a homeless person a post-it note and a dollar bill. On the note was a name, an address, a date of birth. A real voter's identity. "Sign his name," the man said. "Just write what I tell you to write." 2.5 million people watched that video in the first 48 hours. 82,000 liked it. 33,000 shared it. Eric Daugherty's post demanding "ARREST HIM NOW" hit 1.5 million views and 95,000 likes. Libs of TikTok's coverage: 846,000 views and 45,000 likes. The White House responded. Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt called our footage "astounding" and said the President is "working on an executive order to strengthen our elections." The DOJ issued a statement: they will "aggressively pursue anyone" involved in election fraud. Governor Newsom -- Gavin Newsom -- said: "This alleged activity is a felony and should be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law." Los Angeles DA Nathan Hochman personally contacted us: "We have received your complaint and will open a file." And then a detective from the Palm Beach County Sheriff 's Office showed up at my headquarters. Looking for me. Not a single person from our videos has been arrested. But a law enforcement officer showed up at my door. "" Here's what I need you to understand: Everything you just read -- the footage, the White House response, the DA opening a file, the Governor forced to respond -- all of it happened because of what we built together over the past four months. This year, O'Keefe Media Group investigations have generated over 9.9 million views on a single post. We've triggered a $9 billion Treasury audit. We got $253 million in federal contracts suspended. A Secret Service agent was suspended within hours of our report. An FBI security specialist confessed on hidden camera that major fraud cases are deliberately slow-walked so "everyone walks." That 's not opinion journalism. That's results. But I'm going to be straight with you -- results cost money. And right now, I need to fund my team's operations through the entire month of April. We need to raise $92,430 to cover fieldwork, equipment, legal defense, and payroll for the journalists who made every one of those investigations possible. That's the real number. That's what it takes. $35 covers a background check on the voter identities being stolen in Los Angeles. $50 funds a day of undercover equipment. $100 covers a full day of field operations. $250 goes directly toward the legal defense fund protecting our journalists from the people who want us silenced. "" Bo Loudon, a supporter and political commentator, put it simply: "God bless James for uncovering this. These fraudsters NEED to be arrested." He's right. But arrests don't happen without evidence. Evidence doesn't happen without investigators. And investigators don't happen without you. We have four active investigations in the pipeline right now. Jonathan Choe, the journalist who broke the Los Angeles footage, is expanding into San Francisco's Tenderloin district. We're hiring new undercover operatives. The Citizen Justice League -- our network of trained citizen journalists -- is growing every week. But none of it moves forward without funding. Can I count on you for April? "" In Truth, James O'Keefe Founder and CEO O'Keefe Media Group P.S. 2.5 million people watched our footage. The White House responded. The DOJ promised action. The LA District Attorney opened a file. And a detective showed up at my door. All because of what your donations made possible. Now I need $92,430 to fund April. Your $35, $50, or $100 today is the reason we can keep going when they try to make us stop. "" Pop Acta Media | Conservative Innovation PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: NHGOP Headquarters
subject: We’re Just Getting Started
body:
We’re Just Getting Started

| | | | | | |
Dear Friend,
I wanted to reach out personally to introduce myself—and more importantly, to thank you.
I’ve stepped into this role at a time when we need Republicans to be more engaged than ever. You are part of that. Whether you’ve attended an event, volunteered, supported candidates, or simply stayed involved—you are the reason we have momentum going into 2026.
And let me be clear: we are just getting started.
In the months ahead, we’re going to be building, organizing, and connecting in ways that will make a real difference. That only happens when people stay informed, stay involved, and stay engaged—Now. More than ever. We need you.
You’ll be hearing from me more regularly with updates, insights, and opportunities to be part of what we’re building together. I have big plans, and I want you to be part of them. The New Hampshire Republican Party is bigger than any one person or office—we’re a team, and we’re going to need everyone working together.
So, thank you for being there. This is the _**NEW**_ New Hampshire Republican Party. I’m glad to have you along for the ride.
Sincerely,

Scott MaltzieChairman

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

The $2,000 tariff dividend is already available. | | | - Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | History rewards timing. | Not explanations. clean_body: Don’t let this slip your radar, Peter! Take 30 seconds to confirm here >> | Peter, I'm gonna say this plain & neat. Something ain't sitting right. You've always been a key supporter of mine - we go together like Cheez-Wiz and Mountain Dew. | Here's our deal, Peter: The Left is moving fast. They're locking in voters early. They're building their ground game right now. If we don't keep our side tight and accounted for, we're walking into this fight half-ready. . This takes less than a minute, but it matters a whole lot more than that. Fix it . | Don't let your name be the one that slips through the cracks. Let's get you squared away. -Tim Burchett | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Rebecca Weber
subject: We need to reach 1 million patriots calling for term limits
body:
Politicians have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckMFu4yAQhp8G32wBg7Fz4JDKSRVpvVo1VfeI0IATJGMQkPT1V666L9DbzCfN6P-_v7OejV_9dvttglO-FJ2L_nSbc7bG7AzeWfDr6uOWTM2aUy5bKloKOuVYksOqWWNVz9m4jI1TbBj2WfJDc1dOwAgCKEg54DgA9pwz7KlFM6J1tPFqf0gFBcaZpH0nYKHA6cIPB8YGa4mgj2RNdZ3fireuYIwpxdVXj6WL-das6l5rKgSOhJ8JP5tg0GD1ceuyez47jISfk-HS2qUXA7IeFzuKfiRwftSgS3xkdASml-m1fTt9EC53HJz1j0BgOs3fBE1Ixt82AtNXaGBSv0yv-jgf3_Wv-fL-tb2dPvSfY3u5Xr_PKhKYLtdr-79pk5VNn7vTIgci6C0Yv3YYQ1N_6v-p-L8AAAD__4N2kNU)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative,You know it and I know it -- Congress is broken. Politicians have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind.Left-wing radicals like Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez work to destroy our country from within. And Washington never fixes anything. **[Today, WE THE PEOPLE have a chance to do something about it when you sign your “Time for Term Limits” petition and submit it in the next 72 hours.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckMFu4yAQhp8G32wBg7Fz4JDKSRVpvVo1VfeI0IATJGMQkPT1V666L9DbzCfN6P-_v7OejV_9dvttglO-FJ2L_nSbc7bG7AzeWfDr6uOWTM2aUy5bKloKOuVYksOqWWNVz9m4jI1TbBj2WfJDc1dOwAgCKEg54DgA9pwz7KlFM6J1tPFqf0gFBcaZpH0nYKHA6cIPB8YGa4mgj2RNdZ3fireuYIwpxdVXj6WL-das6l5rKgSOhJ8JP5tg0GD1ceuyez47jISfk-HS2qUXA7IeFzuKfiRwftSgS3xkdASml-m1fTt9EC53HJz1j0BgOs3fBE1Ixt82AtNXaGBSv0yv-jgf3_Wv-fL-tb2dPvSfY3u5Xr_PKhKYLtdr-79pk5VNn7vTIgci6C0Yv3YYQ1N_6v-p-L8AAAD__4N2kNU)** Our Founding Fathers never intended for government service to be a permanent career. George Washington famously served just two terms — then went home.Our Founding Fathers also said our government was made for a “moral and religious people.” And they understood that if that moral compass broke down, Congress could easily steer America in the wrong direction, become a do-nothing body, or make government a gravy train for themselves.That’s why they included a powerful safeguard in our Constitution -- an escape hatch -- enshrined in Article V. If Congress ever became too corrupt to fix itself, Article V. says the states can use this provision in the Constitution to act.34 state legislatures can call a convention, propose term limits -- and Congress can’t do a thing about it. [**Here at AMAC Action, we have led the term limits movement in the past, and we are ready to put our efforts behind the movement once again.**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckMFu4yAQhp8G32wBg7Fz4JDKSRVpvVo1VfeI0IATJGMQkPT1V666L9DbzCfN6P-_v7OejV_9dvttglO-FJ2L_nSbc7bG7AzeWfDr6uOWTM2aUy5bKloKOuVYksOqWWNVz9m4jI1TbBj2WfJDc1dOwAgCKEg54DgA9pwz7KlFM6J1tPFqf0gFBcaZpH0nYKHA6cIPB8YGa4mgj2RNdZ3fireuYIwpxdVXj6WL-das6l5rKgSOhJ8JP5tg0GD1ceuyez47jISfk-HS2qUXA7IeFzuKfiRwftSgS3xkdASml-m1fTt9EC53HJz1j0BgOs3fBE1Ixt82AtNXaGBSv0yv-jgf3_Wv-fL-tb2dPvSfY3u5Xr_PKhKYLtdr-79pk5VNn7vTIgci6C0Yv3YYQ1N_6v-p-L8AAAD__4N2kNU)
---
[ **Time for Term Limits** ](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckMFu4yAQhp8G32wBg7Fz4JDKSRVpvVo1VfeI0IATJGMQkPT1V666L9DbzCfN6P-_v7OejV_9dvttglO-FJ2L_nSbc7bG7AzeWfDr6uOWTM2aUy5bKloKOuVYksOqWWNVz9m4jI1TbBj2WfJDc1dOwAgCKEg54DgA9pwz7KlFM6J1tPFqf0gFBcaZpH0nYKHA6cIPB8YGa4mgj2RNdZ3fireuYIwpxdVXj6WL-das6l5rKgSOhJ8JP5tg0GD1ceuyez47jISfk-HS2qUXA7IeFzuKfiRwftSgS3xkdASml-m1fTt9EC53HJz1j0BgOs3fBE1Ixt82AtNXaGBSv0yv-jgf3_Wv-fL-tb2dPvSfY3u5Xr_PKhKYLtdr-79pk5VNn7vTIgci6C0Yv3YYQ1N_6v-p-L8AAAD__4N2kNU)
---
My friend, can you imagine Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez spending 30 more years in Congress?? We are AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of Americans, “action” is what we’re known for.President Trump has said that AMAC Action is so effective that members of Congress run the other way when they see our delegates coming down the hall. And our **“Time for Term Limits”** Petition Drive certainly has Washington lifers on the run![**Please sign your petition and submit it in the next 72 hours.**](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckMFu4yAQhp8G32wBg7Fz4JDKSRVpvVo1VfeI0IATJGMQkPT1V666L9DbzCfN6P-_v7OejV_9dvttglO-FJ2L_nSbc7bG7AzeWfDr6uOWTM2aUy5bKloKOuVYksOqWWNVz9m4jI1TbBj2WfJDc1dOwAgCKEg54DgA9pwz7KlFM6J1tPFqf0gFBcaZpH0nYKHA6cIPB8YGa4mgj2RNdZ3fireuYIwpxdVXj6WL-das6l5rKgSOhJ8JP5tg0GD1ceuyez47jISfk-HS2qUXA7IeFzuKfiRwftSgS3xkdASml-m1fTt9EC53HJz1j0BgOs3fBE1Ixt82AtNXaGBSv0yv-jgf3_Wv-fL-tb2dPvSfY3u5Xr_PKhKYLtdr-79pk5VNn7vTIgci6C0Yv3YYQ1N_6v-p-L8AAAD__4N2kNU)
---
**>>** No more golden pensions for people who work 170 days a year and spend half of that just trying to get reelected.**>>** No more using the power of the office to destroy American values from within.**>>** No more insider deals to get rich.**>>** No more jobs for life with nothing to show for it!
---
Some of these grifters and America-haters have been “working” in Congress over 30, and even 40 years!
---
* **Maxine Waters — 34 years**
* **Chuck Schumer — 44 years**
* **Patty Murray — 33 years**

---
They’ve been in the swamp so long they’ve grown gills. Please – let’s not let them drag America down into the swamp with them. It’s time to use the escape hatch our Founders left for us.34 state legislatures are needed. What will embolden states to act is seeing a massive groundswell of support for term limits from millions of Americans just like you.That’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this massive 50-state Petition Drive and why you got my email today.You’ve proven that you’re a patriot who can be counted on to take action. **[Please sign your “Time for Term Limits” petition and submit it in the next 72 hours with your sacrificial donation of $35, $50 or more to spread this national campaign across America.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckMFu4yAQhp8G32wBg7Fz4JDKSRVpvVo1VfeI0IATJGMQkPT1V666L9DbzCfN6P-_v7OejV_9dvttglO-FJ2L_nSbc7bG7AzeWfDr6uOWTM2aUy5bKloKOuVYksOqWWNVz9m4jI1TbBj2WfJDc1dOwAgCKEg54DgA9pwz7KlFM6J1tPFqf0gFBcaZpH0nYKHA6cIPB8YGa4mgj2RNdZ3fireuYIwpxdVXj6WL-das6l5rKgSOhJ8JP5tg0GD1ceuyez47jISfk-HS2qUXA7IeFzuKfiRwftSgS3xkdASml-m1fTt9EC53HJz1j0BgOs3fBE1Ixt82AtNXaGBSv0yv-jgf3_Wv-fL-tb2dPvSfY3u5Xr_PKhKYLtdr-79pk5VNn7vTIgci6C0Yv3YYQ1N_6v-p-L8AAAD__4N2kNU)** We need to reach **1 million** patriots with petitions just like yours.And that takes time and money.The Washington lifers are counting on having more power, influence, and resources than the American people.They’re counting on our complacency and despair.But here at AMAC Action we say: Let’s finish the fight our Founders began and restore America’s government to the people.Your $35 gift is enough to send and collect 50 more **“Time for Term Limits”** petitions across email, text, and mail. Your gift of $70 funds 100 more **“Time for Term Limits”** petitions.Singlehandedly, you are an indispensable force-multiplier in this effort. But if you do nothing, nothing changes.
---
* Immigration policy will never get fixed and just stay a meaningless election year talking point.
* America’s spending and debt will continue to grow unchecked. Remember when we had a balanced budget? We can get back there if career politicians do something!
* Social Security will keep getting raided while real policies to protect your benefits sit on the back burner.
* Healthcare costs will do nothing but skyrocket leaving seniors vulnerable.
* America’s children will stay trapped in the leftwing indoctrination centers we call “public schools.”
* Radicals like Ilhan Omar, Corey Booker, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez will continue to undermine America’s founding values.
* And the Washington, D.C. fat-cats will just get fatter and lazier.

---
Please join our army of patriots who are fed-up with the Washington lifers who work against our interests while our country sinks. What’s even more frustrating is that President Trump has policies that can save the ship and Washington lifers stand in his way! **[Your signed “Time for Term Limits” petition is critical. And we appreciate your donation whether it’s $35, $50 or anything higher or lower. What’s most important is that you respond in the next 72 hours.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckMFu4yAQhp8G32wBg7Fz4JDKSRVpvVo1VfeI0IATJGMQkPT1V666L9DbzCfN6P-_v7OejV_9dvttglO-FJ2L_nSbc7bG7AzeWfDr6uOWTM2aUy5bKloKOuVYksOqWWNVz9m4jI1TbBj2WfJDc1dOwAgCKEg54DgA9pwz7KlFM6J1tPFqf0gFBcaZpH0nYKHA6cIPB8YGa4mgj2RNdZ3fireuYIwpxdVXj6WL-das6l5rKgSOhJ8JP5tg0GD1ceuyez47jISfk-HS2qUXA7IeFzuKfiRwftSgS3xkdASml-m1fTt9EC53HJz1j0BgOs3fBE1Ixt82AtNXaGBSv0yv-jgf3_Wv-fL-tb2dPvSfY3u5Xr_PKhKYLtdr-79pk5VNn7vTIgci6C0Yv3YYQ1N_6v-p-L8AAAD__4N2kNU)** **One million “Time for Term Limits” petitions is a bold goal but we can do it if we all pitch in.** Every dollar helps. Every signature counts. Every day matters.Thank you and may God bless you and these United States.
---
| | With hope and urgency,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckMFu4yAQhp8G32wBg7Fz4JDKSRVpvVo1VfeI0IATJGMQkPT1V666L9DbzCfN6P-_v7OejV_9dvttglO-FJ2L_nSbc7bG7AzeWfDr6uOWTM2aUy5bKloKOuVYksOqWWNVz9m4jI1TbBj2WfJDc1dOwAgCKEg54DgA9pwz7KlFM6J1tPFqf0gFBcaZpH0nYKHA6cIPB8YGa4mgj2RNdZ3fireuYIwpxdVXj6WL-das6l5rKgSOhJ8JP5tg0GD1ceuyez47jISfk-HS2qUXA7IeFzuKfiRwftSgS3xkdASml-m1fTt9EC53HJz1j0BgOs3fBE1Ixt82AtNXaGBSv0yv-jgf3_Wv-fL-tb2dPvSfY3u5Xr_PKhKYLtdr-79pk5VNn7vTIgci6C0Yv3YYQ1N_6v-p-L8AAAD__4N2kNU)

| | P.S. 80% of the American people and President Trump support term limits! But Congress will never vote to limit itself. That’s why the states -- We the People -- must do it. Our Founding Fathers left us a Constitutional escape hatch in case Congress was sinking the ship. It’s Article V. of the Constitution and it’s time we use it to make term limits law. **[Please sign your “Time for Term Limits” petition and submit it with your emergency gift of $35, $50 or more in the next 72 hours.](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckMFu4yAQhp8G32wBg7Fz4JDKSRVpvVo1VfeI0IATJGMQkPT1V666L9DbzCfN6P-_v7OejV_9dvttglO-FJ2L_nSbc7bG7AzeWfDr6uOWTM2aUy5bKloKOuVYksOqWWNVz9m4jI1TbBj2WfJDc1dOwAgCKEg54DgA9pwz7KlFM6J1tPFqf0gFBcaZpH0nYKHA6cIPB8YGa4mgj2RNdZ3fireuYIwpxdVXj6WL-das6l5rKgSOhJ8JP5tg0GD1ceuyez47jISfk-HS2qUXA7IeFzuKfiRwftSgS3xkdASml-m1fTt9EC53HJz1j0BgOs3fBE1Ixt82AtNXaGBSv0yv-jgf3_Wv-fL-tb2dPvSfY3u5Xr_PKhKYLtdr-79pk5VNn7vTIgci6C0Yv3YYQ1N_6v-p-L8AAAD__4N2kNU)**

clean_body: Politicians have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind. | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative,You know it and I know it -- Congress is broken. Politicians have turned “serving the people” into “serving themselves.” They use their positions to get richer and richer every year, while you and I get left behind.Left-wing radicals like Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez work to destroy our country from within. And Washington never fixes anything. Our Founding Fathers never intended for government service to be a permanent career. George Washington famously served just two terms — then went home.Our Founding Fathers also said our government was made for a “moral and religious people.” And they understood that if that moral compass broke down, Congress could easily steer America in the wrong direction, become a do-nothing body, or make government a gravy train for themselves.That’s why they included a powerful safeguard in our Constitution -- an escape hatch -- enshrined in Article V. If Congress ever became too corrupt to fix itself, Article V. says the states can use this provision in the Constitution to act.34 state legislatures can call a convention, propose term limits -- and Congress can’t do a thing about it. My friend, can you imagine Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez spending 30 more years in Congress?? We are AMAC Action. “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of Americans, “action” is what we’re known for.President Trump has said that AMAC Action is so effective that members of Congress run the other way when they see our delegates coming down the hall. And our “Time for Term Limits” Petition Drive certainly has Washington lifers on the run > No more golden pensions for people who work 170 days a year and spend half of that just trying to get reelected.>> No more using the power of the office to destroy American values from within.>> No more insider deals to get rich.>> No more jobs for life with nothing to show for it! Some of these grifters and America-haters have been “working” in Congress over 30, and even 40 years! Maxine Waters — 34 years Chuck Schumer — 44 years Patty Murray — 33 years They’ve been in the swamp so long they’ve grown gills. Please – let’s not let them drag America down into the swamp with them. It’s time to use the escape hatch our Founders left for us.34 state legislatures are needed. What will embolden states to act is seeing a massive groundswell of support for term limits from millions of Americans just like you.That’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this massive 50-state Petition Drive and why you got my email today.You’ve proven that you’re a patriot who can be counted on to take action. We need to reach 1 million patriots with petitions just like yours.And that takes time and money.The Washington lifers are counting on having more power, influence, and resources than the American people.They’re counting on our complacency and despair.But here at AMAC Action we say: Let’s finish the fight our Founders began and restore America’s government to the people.Your $35 gift is enough to send and collect 50 more “Time for Term Limits” petitions across email, text, and mail. Your gift of $70 funds 100 more “Time for Term Limits” petitions.Singlehandedly, you are an indispensable force-multiplier in this effort. But if you do nothing, nothing changes. Immigration policy will never get fixed and just stay a meaningless election year talking point. America’s spending and debt will continue to grow unchecked. Remember when we had a balanced budget? We can get back there if career politicians do something! Social Security will keep getting raided while real policies to protect your benefits sit on the back burner. Healthcare costs will do nothing but skyrocket leaving seniors vulnerable. America’s children will stay trapped in the leftwing indoctrination centers we call “public schools.” Radicals like Ilhan Omar, Corey Booker, and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez will continue to undermine America’s founding values. And the Washington, D.C. fat-cats will just get fatter and lazier. Please join our army of patriots who are fed-up with the Washington lifers who work against our interests while our country sinks. What’s even more frustrating is that President Trump has policies that can save the ship and Washington lifers stand in his way! One million “Time for Term Limits” petitions is a bold goal but we can do it if we all pitch in. Every dollar helps. Every signature counts. Every day matters.Thank you and may God bless you and these United States. | | With hope and urgency, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. 80% of the American people and President Trump support term limits! But Congress will never vote to limit itself. That’s why the states -- We the People -- must do it. Our Founding Fathers left us a Constitutional escape hatch in case Congress was sinking the ship. It’s Article V. of the Constitution and it’s time we use it to make term limits law. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | Inside Scoop Politics PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# [Voting Chaos in Minnesota](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=192336307&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkyMzM2MzA3LCJpYXQiOjE3NzUyMTkwMzMsImV4cCI6MTc3NzgxMTAzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNjY0NDAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FO9DD2MVMxCXI9Sg5IzPD2D4PGBQAbrOY3iOO8CGLLA)
### Call For Action: County leaders should take action to immediately secure the polling place.
| | [Benda For Commonsense](https://substack.com/@bendasense)
---
| Apr 3

---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=192336307&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkyMzM2MzA3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NTIxOTAzMywiZXhwIjoxNzc3ODExMDMzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjA2NjQ0MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Xphnuq2tvAHPQoBT2SzXokEtoHQk8K4HP2SLvAHtP_Y&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=192336307&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkyMzM2MzA3LCJpYXQiOjE3NzUyMTkwMzMsImV4cCI6MTc3NzgxMTAzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNjY0NDAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FO9DD2MVMxCXI9Sg5IzPD2D4PGBQAbrOY3iOO8CGLLA&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2066440&post_id=192336307&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTkyMzM2MzA3LCJpYXQiOjE3NzUyMTkwMzMsImV4cCI6MTc3NzgxMTAzMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTIwNjY0NDAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.FO9DD2MVMxCXI9Sg5IzPD2D4PGBQAbrOY3iOO8CGLLA)

| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvYmVuZGFzZW5zZS9wL3ZvdGluZy1jaGFvcy1pbi1taW5uZXNvdGE_.EOG90xhFgXhtuy0AylIQOOJY-dd6uCgzadeGdM55xIg?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/bendasense/p/voting-chaos-in-minnesota?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

In 2023, the State of Minnesota converted from an "excuse-based only" absentee voting process, to a complex framework that allows absentee ballot drop-off (in-person, drop-box, or mail), absentee ballot voting in person, and early direct voting in person. For _**45-days**_ prior to election day, voters may utilize an in-person absentee voting process, which is [described](https://substack.com/redirect/fe622eca-3163-4040-a3b1-b2b90f27976a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) as follows:
> To use absentee voting, a voter completes an application form and is issued a ballot by mail or in person. If they are voting in person during the first part of the 46-day absentee voting period, they are issued a ballot envelope and a signature envelope along with their ballot, just like by mail. After voting their ballot, they seal it in the ballot envelope, seal that in the signature envelope, and complete the certification form on the outside of the signature envelope. That sealed signature envelope is securely stored by the elections office, unopened, just like those returned by mail or dropped off.
### Front Line Election Workers Impacted
Unfortunately for the front-line election workers, the full extent of this new in-person absentee process was not realized until the 2024 election was held. Based upon the video footage and interviews obtained from public data requests1 we now know that Minnesota early voting locations have been converted into a three-ring circus. These locations have virtually no protections for voter privacy and have been infiltrated by outsiders directing the show inside polling locations.
As reported in my previous [Substack post](https://substack.com/redirect/4fa7426d-6b44-420f-8ed4-743f7bcd23cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Sherburn County election officials reported a 2024 double-voting incident, which lead to an in depth investigation by the Sherburn County Sheriff's Office.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9699bada-b7db-46dc-8840-de168bfe10df?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
###### The Teacher described as "acting as a director in the polling locaton"
When you enter a polling place during election day, there is an expectation of structure, security, and privacy established by processes and procedures. In stark contrast, the new in-person absentee process has none of these protections in place. What is exposed in these videos is that voting is occuring in the extremely busy publicly accessible counter-space at the auditors' office, with a few make-shift voting booths in the corner.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/25da7569-14c7-45d3-aee1-cad0e64125fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
###### The "Teacher" directing a voter to the "polling place"
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e886de2b-f474-4d02-bdfe-4b02cfb55164?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
###### Later, the "Teacher" is caught on video filling out another voters' ballot
In some unrealistic utopian world, this disorderly environment is expected to be managed by the full-time staff of each county administrator. As the behind the scenes videos show, this expectation is grossly unrealistic. The election workers are properly stationed behind the glass to process absentee applications and accept ballots. In front of the glass, however, is a three-ring circus, with dominent members of the Somali community as the ringmasters influencing and directing the votes of the vulnerable members of their community. 2
### The Sanctity of the Secret Ballot has been Compromised
The entire concept of the "sanctity of the secret ballot" is premised on a controlled and structured polling environment. This framework is explicitly mandated by state law:
> "During voting hours no one except individuals receiving, marking, or depositing ballots shall approach within six feet of a voting booth, ballot counter, or electronic voting equipment, unless lawfully authorized to do so by an election judge or the individual is an election judge monitoring the operation of the ballot counter or electronic voting equipment."
In contrast, the new early voting process introduces systemic disruption. It should come as no surprise that this level of chaos invites opportunists, intimidaters 3, and potential fraud into the voting process. The Sherburne County investigation offers a rare glimpse behind the curtain of secrecy maintained by state officials. Like the Great Oz, the illusion of stability presented to the public diminishes once the curtain is pulled back.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f52cab94-e97e-45e4-a99b-c10f7d3f9a92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
###### The Man in Black "escorts" voters into the polling place
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9bdde525-a0d5-45ab-9eb1-3f2fa6126260?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
###### Man in Black hovers over voter
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e51a80b6-c0c0-41a7-9171-f486be24c962?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
###### The Teacher and the Man in Black oversee Double Vote
### Voter Assistance Chaos Forced upon County Auditors
How is it possible that the "Teacher" and the "Man in Black" were even allowed inside the polling place? This situation arises from an expansive and obscure interpretation of Minnesota law advanced by State officials, which has been imposed on county auditors across the state.4 Minnesota law 5 defines 'Individuals allowed in polling place as, ' including a person who is '...assisting a voter with a disability or a voter who is unable to read English..."
This "assisting a voter" designation is significant, as individuals, like the Teacher, are not legally recognized interpreters. Yet, the Teacher and his associate, the Man in Black are claiming interpreter status. Minnesota law defines "Official Interpretive Services" as a distinct role designated by the county as election officials, who are required to wear a name tag or badge identifying that position. The Teacher and the Man in Black do not meet this definition and should not be afforded the special treatment or deference reserved for official interpreters. By improperly adopting the interpreter label, they have co-opted this perceived authority to exert control over the polling place and intimidate voters.
The Minnesota County Election Administrators [Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/ff28a42e-a617-4828-8a2c-199c46c76efd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (p.89) provides further guidance on, "Authorized Persons and Activities in The Polling Place" which includes, "**Persons helping a voter who is disabled or unable to read English (only while helping a voter). " **This guide further explains, **' People may not gather or linger in the polling place.' **
The absence of such safeguards creates a pathway for individuals to access polling places under the guise of providing assistance, without meaningful oversight or accountability.
No clear-minded Minnesota citizen can review these photos and videos and conclude that early voting locations in Minnesota have not been compromised and infiltrated with mischief.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3540620e-7fe4-4155-8644-74e71cadd2e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
### **CALL FOR ACTION**
Fortunately, Minn. Stat. 204C.06,_allows jurisdictions to appoint_ 6 a sergeant-at-arms to keep the peace, or to otherwise assist election judges with polling place order and security. As detailed in the County Election Administrators [Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/ff28a42e-a617-4828-8a2c-199c46c76efd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) , "A sergeant-at-arms may be present or appointed at the polling place to help to keep the peace and assist election judges." (p. 19). Guidance encourages jursidiction to utilize this position in the polling place if there is a growing concern or an incident. Absence any change in Minnesota law, County officials must act to protect voters and the front-line workers in securing the early voting polling locations.
The footage obtained from the Sherburne County Sheriff's Office represents only a brief snapshot of two days of early voting activity. Even within that limited window, these videos reveal a clear instance of double voting, a false vote, and multiple examples of voter intimidation and violations of ballot secrecy. Under this early voting framework, vulnerable voters are being injected into a chaotic environement where their votes are not their own.
Sherburne County election officials reported that the Teacher alone had brought in "over a hundred" voters to this same location in just a two week timeframe. One of these same electon officials expressed frustration over the lack of oversight, ". . . there's so many people that we can't go out and call [them] out on it. We don't have anyone out there is my other concern."
County leaders must be confronted with this glaring evidence of polling place chaos. While state election officials project an image of calm and order, local election officials are left watching the disorder unfold before them. They deserve better--and, more importantly, the voters deserve better. Placing a sergeant-at-arms at early voting polling locations is a crucial stopgap measure that must be immediately implemented to secure the polling place.
State and national leaders must pull back from the failed experiment of early voting. Our polling places are secure and orderly _on Election Day_ --proof that the system works when properly controlled. It is time to recognize that early voting undermines those safeguards and return to a system that ensures integrity and public confidence.
1
[BREAKING: 384-Page Report](https://substack.com/redirect/4fa7426d-6b44-420f-8ed4-743f7bcd23cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) includes incident reports, search warrants, photographs and _**video footage**_**.**
2
This [approach ](https://substack.com/redirect/880de697-0ba7-4cbf-919a-c133e7d27c9f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)is similar to organized retail theft, which under Minn. Stat. § 609.522 occurs when two or more individuals act in concert as part of a coordinated enterprise to steal retail merchandise, reflecting a pattern of planned and collaborative criminal activity rather than isolated conduct.
3
Minn. Stat. §211B.075 prohibits intimidation and interference with the voting process.
4
According to Minnesota Secretary of State Steve [Simon](https://substack.com/redirect/ba088025-23aa-4680-8273-d19d790de465?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), under his broad interpreation of the Voting Rights Act of 1965, anyone in Minnesota can bring someone to help them at the polling place. "That can mean helping them with a physical disability, as I used to do for my late father... or it can be someone who needs assistance in a language. The critical thing, as everyone should expect, and this is the law is you can't influence a person's vote," Simon said.
5
Minn. Stat. § 204.06, subd. 2
6
Minnesota County Election Administrators [Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/ff28a42e-a617-4828-8a2c-199c46c76efd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (p.91).

clean_body: Call For Action: County leaders should take action to immediately secure the polling place. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Call For Action: County leaders should take action to immediately secure the polling place. | | | Apr 3 | | | | | | | | | | | | In 2023, the State of Minnesota converted from an "excuse-based only" absentee voting process, to a complex framework that allows absentee ballot drop-off (in-person, drop-box, or mail), absentee ballot voting in person, and early direct voting in person. For 45-days prior to election day, voters may utilize an in-person absentee voting process, which is as follows: To use absentee voting, a voter completes an application form and is issued a ballot by mail or in person. If they are voting in person during the first part of the 46-day absentee voting period, they are issued a ballot envelope and a signature envelope along with their ballot, just like by mail. After voting their ballot, they seal it in the ballot envelope, seal that in the signature envelope, and complete the certification form on the outside of the signature envelope. That sealed signature envelope is securely stored by the elections office, unopened, just like those returned by mail or dropped off. Front Line Election Workers Impacted Unfortunately for the front-line election workers, the full extent of this new in-person absentee process was not realized until the 2024 election was held. Based upon the video footage and interviews obtained from public data requests1 we now know that Minnesota early voting locations have been converted into a three-ring circus. These locations have virtually no protections for voter privacy and have been infiltrated by outsiders directing the show inside polling locations. As reported in my previous , Sherburn County election officials reported a 2024 double-voting incident, which lead to an in depth investigation by the Sherburn County Sheriff's Office. | | ---|---|--- The Teacher described as "acting as a director in the polling locaton" When you enter a polling place during election day, there is an expectation of structure, security, and privacy established by processes and procedures. In stark contrast, the new in-person absentee process has none of these protections in place. What is exposed in these videos is that voting is occuring in the extremely busy publicly accessible counter-space at the auditors' office, with a few make-shift voting booths in the corner. | | ---|---|--- The "Teacher" directing a voter to the "polling place" | | ---|---|--- Later, the "Teacher" is caught on video filling out another voters' ballot In some unrealistic utopian world, this disorderly environment is expected to be managed by the full-time staff of each county administrator. As the behind the scenes videos show, this expectation is grossly unrealistic. The election workers are properly stationed behind the glass to process absentee applications and accept ballots. In front of the glass, however, is a three-ring circus, with dominent members of the Somali community as the ringmasters influencing and directing the votes of the vulnerable members of their community. 2 The Sanctity of the Secret Ballot has been Compromised The entire concept of the "sanctity of the secret ballot" is premised on a controlled and structured polling environment. This framework is explicitly mandated by state law: "During voting hours no one except individuals receiving, marking, or depositing ballots shall approach within six feet of a voting booth, ballot counter, or electronic voting equipment, unless lawfully authorized to do so by an election judge or the individual is an election judge monitoring the operation of the ballot counter or electronic voting equipment." In contrast, the new early voting process introduces systemic disruption. It should come as no surprise that this level of chaos invites opportunists, intimidaters 3, and potential fraud into the voting process. The Sherburne County investigation offers a rare glimpse behind the curtain of secrecy maintained by state officials. Like the Great Oz, the illusion of stability presented to the public diminishes once the curtain is pulled back. | | ---|---|--- The Man in Black "escorts" voters into the polling place | | ---|---|--- Man in Black hovers over voter | | ---|---|--- The Teacher and the Man in Black oversee Double Vote Voter Assistance Chaos Forced upon County Auditors How is it possible that the "Teacher" and the "Man in Black" were even allowed inside the polling place? This situation arises from an expansive and obscure interpretation of Minnesota law advanced by State officials, which has been imposed on county auditors across the state.4 Minnesota law 5 defines 'Individuals allowed in polling place as, ' including a person who is '...assisting a voter with a disability or a voter who is unable to read English..." This "assisting a voter" designation is significant, as individuals, like the Teacher, are not legally recognized interpreters. Yet, the Teacher and his associate, the Man in Black are claiming interpreter status. Minnesota law defines "Official Interpretive Services" as a distinct role designated by the county as election officials, who are required to wear a name tag or badge identifying that position. The Teacher and the Man in Black do not meet this definition and should not be afforded the special treatment or deference reserved for official interpreters. By improperly adopting the interpreter label, they have co-opted this perceived authority to exert control over the polling place and intimidate voters. name: Ken Burns
subject: NC stands at another crossroads
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
body:
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)
| | | |
---
Ken Burns here, friend. I’ve said this before and it’s now more relevant than ever: The power rests in our hands to secure the future of the Senate.
**_[I have more to say, but if you want to use that power in your own hands, and have a few bucks to spare, please consider donating to Roy Cooper’s campaign today. Winning his race is absolutely critical if we’re going to flip the Senate, so I hope you’ll join me.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8350?t=8&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)_**
Across this country, people are feeling the strain in ways that don’t always make the history books – but shape lives all the same. The cost of groceries that are too high. A lifesaving prescription that forces a difficult choice. A paycheck that doesn’t just stretch as far as it once did.
These are the quiet pressures that define a moment.

Roy Cooper has spent much of his life as a public servant working to ease those burdens.
Not seeking attention, but doing the work. Expanding access to affordable health care. Investing in public schools. Defending the idea that government, at its best, is not distant – but present, steady and accountable to the people it serves.
It is the kind of leadership that rarely makes noise. But over time, it leaves a mark.

There are those who would take the state in a different direction – who see division as a strategy, who mistake power for purpose. They are organized. They are well-funded by dark-money groups.
**_[We can beat them back. This work matters, and we won’t stop fighting. So please, will you chip in now to help elect Roy Cooper for the U.S. Senate?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8350?t=9&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8350?t=10&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)
---
History has been written in moments like this – when people choose not to sit back, but to take part.
If you can, _[**give today**](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8350?t=11&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)_. Help ensure that the next chapter of North Carolina reflects the very best of what this state has always tried to be.
Thank you for doing your part,

Ken Burns
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8350?t=12&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=4&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=5&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=6&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=7&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=13&akid=928%2E124072%2ELPvnh-)

name: Don Jr.
subject: Can I ask you for a favor, Peter?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| Donald Trump Jr. here.
I know you get a lot of messages asking for your time, money, a favor or two.
And to be fully transparent, I'm about to ask you for just a few minutes of your time.
But here's the deal, I've [NEVER](https://links.republicanswinseats._UWffVnzzS81UAuFUK7D7DMDEqJlboVA) been presented with an opportunity like this. One that could singlehandedly keep the America First movement in the House - and thus, our entire country \- on the right track and chugging at full speed.

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Bill Maher
body:
[ https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1001&akid=2434%2E135344%2EI4VFbO ][IMG]

Stop. *Record scratch. Freeze frame.*

You may be wondering how this girl:

IMAGE: Elissa Slotkin as a toddler

Ended up here:

IMAGE: Elissa serving her first tour in Iraq as a CIA analyst

Serving my first of three tours in Iraq as a CIA analyst in Iraq, working to understand terrorist and militia groups that were targeting US forces and Iraqi civilians and plotting against the U.S.

It started on 9/11. One of the big moments that changed my life.

I was 24 years old, and I happened to be in New York City on my second day of grad school. By the time the dust had settled, I knew that I wanted to go into national security and protect my country.

Several months later, the CIA came to campus and my favorite professor encouraged me to hear what they had to say. Not wanting to disappoint him, I went. I applied, got the job, and after a lengthy background check, I started in Langley as an analyst.

It wasn’t long before I found myself in Iraq, my first of three deployments.

Going from the national security world to politics was a major culture shock. For 16 years, I didn’t talk publicly about my work—when I posted on Facebook that I was thinking about running for Congress, people asked me if I’d been hacked. One thing I definitely hadn’t done was ask people for money.

To be upfront: Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources. A crazy amount. When you're running to win a seat in a swing state like Michigan, you can't take anything for granted.

If keeping Michigan's Senate seat blue this November feels worth it to you, that's the donation I am asking you to make to my campaign today.

DONATE: https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/921?t=1002&akid=2434%2E135344%2EI4VFbO

Thank you,

Elissa

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.elissaslotkin.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2434%2E135344%2EI4VFbO

name: Citizens Alliance New Hampshire
subject: 🚨 Take Action! Demand the Passage of Campus Carry as Written!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS ALLIANCE OF NEW HAMPSHIRE]()
body:
Time is short. The Senate Judiciary Committee can bury this bill or send it forward as written...

| | | | | [|
---](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=831e2ad78e&e=8c8e704ee6)
| | | | | | Peter,

**Join the fight to expand our Second Amendment rights!**

The fight for self-defense on New Hampshire college campuses is at a make-or-break moment, and we must act NOW to ensure House Bill 1793 receives the strong support it deserves.

HB 1793, sponsored by Pledge Champion Representative Sam Farrington, prohibits public colleges and universities from restricting the possession or carrying of firearms and non-lethal weapons such as tasers and pepper spray on campus.

**After passing the House with strong support for real self-defense rights on college campuses, the bill will now have a**[ hearing in the Senate Judiciary Committee](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=240111bb43&e=8c8e704ee6)**on Tuesday, April 14th, at 1:45 PM in Room 100 of the State House.**

Senators Bill Gannon (Senate Judiciary Chairman), Daryl Abbas (Senate Judiciary Vice Chairman), and Sharon Carson hold the key to moving this forward.

Without a vote to pass the bill as written, HB 1793 risks being stalled or weakened through amendments that would undermine its core purpose.

**We need every patriot in New Hampshire to contact these Senators personally and demand action.**

✔️ Tell them you support HB 1793 as written.

✔️ Tell them to pass the bill out of committee without amendments.

✔️ Tell them Granite Staters will not accept gun-free zones that leave students and faculty defenseless on public campuses.
**📧 Sen. Bill Gannon –** [William.Gannon@gc.nh.gov](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=906e82964a&e=8c8e704ee6)
**📧 Sen. Daryl Abbas –** [Daryl.Abbas@gc.nh.gov](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=5fb388c409&e=8c8e704ee6)
**📧 Sen. Sharon Carson –** [Sharon.Carson@gc.nh.gov ](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=f3e0594cbd&e=8c8e704ee6)
---
[|
---](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=730aed51f5&e=8c8e704ee6)
| [KEEP THE MOMENTUM ALIVE BY JOINING CITIZENS ALLIANCE OF NEW HAMPSHIRE TODAY >>>](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=433c6c81da&e=8c8e704ee6)
---
| | **Time is short. The Senate Judiciary Committee can bury this bill or send it forward as written.

**Reach out today to express your full and total support for the bill in its current form.

Urge them to advance the bill unchanged out of committee and ensure it receives a full vote on the Senate floor.

**Here are some talking points you can use in your email of personal support:**
* I believe law-abiding adults on public college campuses should have the right to carry firearms and non-lethal self-defense tools for their protection.
* Gun-free zones have proven ineffective at preventing violence and often make students and faculty more vulnerable.
* This bill respects the Second Amendment and Article 2-a of the New Hampshire Constitution while allowing responsible individuals to defend themselves if needed.
* As a constituent, I respectfully ask you to pass HB 1793 out of committee without amendments.
* Please give this legislation a full and fair vote on the Senate floor, so New Hampshire can lead the way in protecting campus safety through constitutional rights.

**Stand with Representative Farrington and our Pledge Champions.**

Let these Senators know that Granite Staters expect action to protect the right to self-defense on every public campus in our state.

We have momentum. Let's finish the job.

For New Hampshire,
---
[|
---](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=4e87535499&e=8c8e704ee6)
| | Daniel Gray
Executive Director
Citizens Alliance of New Hampshire

---
| | | | | [](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=b861be489c&e=8c8e704ee6)

name: Andy Roth
subject: OKFC and The "Empty Suit"
body:
| | | [](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjk18vO7wfT-2FWuWGj5qYFNqYx7X5ohQ4dCOx5p85so2pL2FWW_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerJ0HTJL2JEb3chPs5c6QW7C0LKgYC3EAMSYoJ4vS0MAASE9k9MYU-2BkKyWNJrGeoeTYDkjB596rkCgpB2dyXy1Llt1pQnIz66MV0MuKSIVLUMj4lThQILA09xkkcdwcvamcEoQK64aVGTaAp-2Fl4iS-2B-2F-2FZB9owcIf8HqkcUCtvBwcJ4BcNF1L45XQE0NPQuXRrxaRh7FmQuYvt00UCPetRLiOvcx-2BOg3ezi6jq-2B-2ByYHUnw-3D)
---
|
---
Dear Friend, What happens when politicians are forced to answer real questions, take real votes, and defend their records?This week, we got the answer.In state after state, Freedom Caucus members forced clarity and accountability from the political class. They exposed bad votes, challenged weak leadership, and proved that conservatives can be both right and effective.Here’s what happened.
---
|
---
**OKLAHOMA** This week, the **Oklahoma Freedom Caucus** hosted a gubernatorial debate for Republican candidates, and it made one thing clear.If you want to lead Oklahoma, you cannot ignore the Freedom Caucus. Candidates for the state’s top office showed up because they recognize the influence and credibility the Oklahoma Freedom Caucus has built with voters across the state.The debate was moderated by the Network’s own Oklahoma State Director, **Nathan Dahm** , and it looked very different from a typical political forum. This was not a media-run debate designed to protect candidates. It was a debate built around accountability.Dahm asked questions that forced candidates to take a stand. Here's one example:“Name at least 3 examples of bills passed by the Republican legislature that you would veto as governor for violating your principles.”That question cuts to the core.It forced candidates to choose between blind loyalty to the political establishment or standing on principle and acknowledging when Republicans get it wrong.That is exactly what a Freedom Caucus does.It forces politicians to tell voters the truth.And one candidate chose not to participate. **Attorney General Gentner Drummond declined to attend** , claiming concerns about fairness.So the Oklahoma Freedom Caucus gave him representation on stage anyway.An empty suit stood behind a podium in his place.It was a fitting visual.The Oklahoma Freedom Caucus is not just participating in state politics. It is shaping it.
---
[](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjowcw-2BzQZxYDL-2FYWD-2BQ4IxHwMTpBoNoTEohdczyUO9j4u0hmfyRcWW5DNbpyYfDFRw-3D-3De61X_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerJ0HTJL2JEb3chPs5c6QW7C0LKgYC3EAMSYoJ4vS0MAASE9k9MYU-2BkKyWNJrGeoeTYDkjB596rkCgpB2dyXy1Llt1pQnIz66MV0MuKSIVLUMLaZ-2BI5ECjUUZHaHKT20eZDk9zEf3QufbdfZfhk5Jly4qO6hnbqwlDzWQh5tXqY-2BPGe4w2XUfmu05QQmp4j3PMcUJlTNitIuwMfsszard5LPoxlJUIkkCZyZVi5jQNYHY-3D)
---
|
---
**WYOMING****Wyoming Freedom Caucus** **member** **Rep. John Bear** laid out a simple framework this week for how to tell if conservatives are actually being effective. [Read the full op-ed here](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjmUEc0KtFmxyqQAYhSepmdTPdYA41b6Vj3fozKID0U02UqVHoqnTFuVJlsVjkjVDL3Ow7Gm3AJ-2F-2F7xtYW4UsC4HTbVHjvnK-2BRlOm1mDt4Ftfixy1ehupjsy-2FRssA9lRPHPwY9OkyYfuHM5-2Fpp-2B0W0A4-3DaZYO_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerJ0HTJL2JEb3chPs5c6QW7C0LKgYC3EAMSYoJ4vS0MAASE9k9MYU-2BkKyWNJrGeoeTYDkjB596rkCgpB2dyXy1Llt1pQnIz66MV0MuKSIVLUMoxBUu6sliy6FOW8blrwHjjXs8StMKxS5DPdbJaqoErpzuvaWMYCTPKfIxqRG5Qo0vQoQBcNL1Z8iilaSMheKyg4qGAGLooQlft5fzyvmoGI6d2ATl0aX2g5KX1CWJZRg-3D).For years, the GOP Swamp has claimed that Republicans can be principled or effective, but not both.Bear says that is simply not true. In fact, he argues that backlash is often the clearest sign that you are doing exactly what you were elected to do.He lays out three signs that you are being effective:Big government Republicans attack youThe media starts lying about youThe deep state pulls out all the stops to stop youIn other words, if the establishment is upset, you are probably getting results.As Bear put it:“You know you are effective AND right if you represent the people, you do what you said you would do when you campaigned, and the weaksauce Republicans start screeching.”That is the Freedom Caucus model in plain English.
---
|
---
**RADIO CLIP OF THE WEEK** From our weekly radio show ([download here!](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjnlwydldIbeMnt9XR4xTcbhEYzH5L62bvLlU1GRpuOaKwW6jtyyBL2FuUO7E1EH99SGqACyf9W3bjU1RSsP9NUJIYQLlUQJkdOJuuSvIwHYbTami_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerJ0HTJL2JEb3chPs5c6QW7C0LKgYC3EAMSYoJ4vS0MAASE9k9MYU-2BkKyWNJrGeoeTYDkjB596rkCgpB2dyXy1Llt1pQnIz66MV0MuKSIVLUMwOx1GwgTDXXv46yJr85HgjkiHkM8YVI90AqaiIB4UHxYiKwAitqImqRK5xfSf7pXN51orNc-2FCgwbXq-2BJM7Rca6yxbuNu-2FdgfU2wSjYGbWiq9iggSRTrtl7G7mtYd4pzw-3D)), **South Dakota Freedom Caucus Vice Chair** **Sen. John Carley** explains how South Dakota passed legislation to ensure that only American citizens can vote in their state elections.It is a simple principle. Only American citizens should vote in American elections.Some Republicans actually joined the Democrats to oppose it, but the SDFC forced everyone to vote and they passed itMeanwhile, Congress continues to stall on the SAVE America Act. South Dakota is represented by Senate Majority Leader **John Thune** , who has the authority to move the bill forward but is dragging his feet.The contrast is clear.State Freedom Caucuses are delivering results while Washington makes excuses not to fight. **Subscribe on** [Spotify](http://give.statefreedomcaucus.org/ls/click?upn=u001.SSCAglCEkhp55PDWKhWTjnlwydldIbeMnt9XR4xTcbhEYzH5L62bvLlU1GRpuOaKwW6jtyyBL2FuUO7E1EH99SGqACyf9W3bjU1RSsP9NUJIYQLlUQJkdOJuuSvIwHYbPwq4_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVBZyx1SQGGYhOdwcjZYtHerJ0HTJL2JEb3chPs5c6QW7C0LKgYC3EAMSYoJ4vS0MAASE9k9MYU-2BkKyWNJrGeoeTYDkjB596rkCgpB2dyXy1Llt1pQnIz66MV0MuKSIVLUPlpiP9F02Fz-2FTpF-2BnI-2B3DhFkmavI0vIoKSsxBCEYHody7qNxVNLkdKqW0aur2WwO47CRNX3aqSDXJGTrZvWkVB5bOs3uXqccikjlGpLSDZrgNCExrlXMCQ3-2FBozex8wm0-3D) (or on your preferred podcast platform)**Follow us on X** \-
