clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair Fellow Republicans, There's a definite shift in the atmosphere as the May 12th primary approaches. The NEGOP is helping key districts to set up Days of Action. Yard signs are being printed and distributed. Mailers are being designed and readied for posting. The election cycle has a definite rhythm, and this year is no different. Preparation is key and the NEGOP has been in preparation mode for several weeks to help campaigns and candidates in a variety of ways. Our walk app and data software are offered to and to available all Republican candidates without charge. We continue to offer training on a variety of topics. We're helping candidates with printing and mailing. County candidates are also contacting us for help with mail rates, yard signs, and information. Ongoing county conventions are resulting in some leadership changes and onboarding new county chairmen is critical. We have several counties with very experienced chairmen and several with less experienced leadership. Assuring counties can navigate ways to help their candidates is crucial. Building relationships is a big part of politics and the NEGOP is reaching out to potential new constituencies who are frustrated with the Democratic Party. For years, Democrats have made diversity their rallying cry. But when faced with a candidate who doesn't fall in lockstep with their extreme agenda, they make their position clear: diversity of thought, especially pro-life thought, is not welcome in the Democratic Party. In contrast, the Nebraska Republican Party is and will remain, a big tent party that respects differing perspectives and trusts Nebraskans to think for themselves. All the while, we're preparing for our State Convention. We're contacting speakers, sponsors, candidates, officeholders and more. Delegates and Alternates are still being selected by their county delegates, and all the election results are being sent to the NEGOP so we can begin our credentialing process. I am very proud of the work effort accomplished by the NEGOP staff and volunteers. We have a dedicated group of committed individuals who keep their eyes on the goal of electing Republicans. Fortunately, many excellent, hardworking candidates have been recruited and are out knocking doors and speaking to voters. I encourage all our readers to find a way to engage in this important election cycle. We cannot allow complacency to set in. Walk with a candidate, make calls for a candidate, and/or donate to a candidate. Midterms are tough and we must be vigilant to keep radical Democrats who want to appear moderate from gaining ground in Nebraska. As always, the NEGOP also appreciates your support so that we can continue offering "free" apps and services to our candidates. And so that we can continue our mission of sustaining a party structure for all Republicans in Nebraska. Together, we win! For Nebraska, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party Follow us: == | ==| ==| == Donate today: Support the NEGOP at == For more information, visit == | Update from Political Director Joe Hagerty... GOTV is underway -- and we need all hands on deck. The NEGOP and local county parties are going to be running door knocking days of action in key legislative districts across CD2, and between now and May 12th, our volunteers are the most important asset we have. We're on the ground connecting with Republican voters, making sure they know when, where, and how to vote in the Primary -- because an informed voter is a voter who actually shows up. These legislative races are close. The margins are tight. And in cycles like this one, volunteer-driven turnout operations are what separate the wins from the near-misses. A few hours of your time between now and Primary Day can make a real difference for our candidates and for Nebraska. Not sure where to vote or need to check your registration? # Are you ready to join us?
---
| | Dear supporter,

We are excited to launch our official **voter outreach program**!
Campaigns are not won by candidates alone. They’re won by people!Every conversation had, every phone call made, every door knocked; that’s what actually turns the tide for an election. Volunteers are the reason messages spread, momentum builds, and voters turn out.
**We’re currently seeking dedicated volunteers to support our outreach efforts through phone banking and door-to-door canvassing.**
That is why will be hosting several Zoom training sessions now through the June primary. And we are**requesting YOUR attendance.**
Yes, _yours_!

To register for our upcoming trainings, click one of the buttons below:

name: Sara Jacobs
subject: Bye, Pam!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em?amount=25]
Attorney General Pam Bondi was fired yesterday. Good riddance.
Pam Bondi didn’t give a damn about the Epstein survivors — as evidenced by the fact that she couldn't even look at them sitting right behind her during her congressional hearing.
Under her leadership, the DOJ has been orchestrating a cover-up of Epstein’s crimes, protecting Trump and the powerful people in those documents while putting the victims and survivors at further risk.
This sends a loud and clear message: Public outrage can change this administration’s behavior. They’re not immune to pressure. When people refuse to look away, when people refuse to stay quiet, it can make a difference.
So let's keep going. It’s a good thing Pam Bondi is out. Next up: let’s handle Pete Hegseth, our reckless, misogynistic, incompetent Secretary of Defense.
If you agree Pete Hegseth should be the next to go, add your name to my petition right now demanding he be fired just like Pam Bondi and Kristi Noem. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Wos-4UoQ1UG83wE1O2Vp9w2]
ADD YOUR NAME [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Wos-4UoQ1UG83wE1O2Vp9w2]
Justice doesn't happen by accident. It happens when people refuse to look away.
–Sara

# [PARADE VOLUNTEERS NEEDED!](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2026/04/03/parade-volunteers-needed/?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup)
---
By **Elizabeth Farnham** on April 3, 2026
---
| | Let’s March Together in Chambersburg!
---
As America celebrates its 250th anniversary, Team Beth Farnham for Congress seeks to join the Franklin County parade sponsored by the Franklin County Visitors Bureau on April 18th at 12:30PM because we absolutely are fighting for this Democracy.
---
This battle for the soul of our nation is not waged with firearms, but with VOTES for CANDIDATES. Please help the people of Franklin County recognize Beth Farnham as the candidate to unseat our unpopular, unresponsive, multimillionaire U.S. Representative, John Joyce, so she can do the business of the American People, instead of Trump’s harmful agenda.
---
We won’t be doing anything fancy, just walking together holding banners, flags, and yard signs.
---
Free navy t-shirt with pink Beth Farnham for Congress logos.
---
Please sign up from this link: [https://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/welcome-volunteers/](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=46a7383e5fcfb168d7a90ac6413dbcf1ffe1ecbf5ae43f502be805c25a86d916&blog_id=213069660&post_id=6756&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=a14c5dd99c3eba552ccb3e40a1a75a50&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9iZXRoZmFybmhhbWZvcmNvbmdyZXNzLmNvbS93ZWxjb21lLXZvbHVudGVlcnMv&email_id=feb052992d24bd642922b9b0f155eca8)
---
Thank you so much in advance! Together, we CHOOSE DEMOCRACY!
---
---

name: Josh Shapiro
subject: Can you help me pull this off?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
I’ve run in a lot of close elections throughout my life

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128710881/612119572/-1368017556?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_040326_short&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjliMzMzZS03OTJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mzv6KVPhQYGc3fcdvYt6Qu_wjN8vnql7BBEnBSDeVl0=) Derek, I promise I’ll keep this short. I’ve run in a lot of close elections throughout my life. **But this one is unlike any other.** Here in Pennsylvania, we’ve rejected the chaos, cruelty, and corruption that defines Washington right now. But if we fall short on Election Day? That harmful brand of politics could come straight to our front door. [_**Derek, I know we can pull this off — as long as folks like you step off the sidelines and get into the game. Can you chip in and help us reach undecided voters all across Pennsylvania?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128710882/612119573/-1368017556?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_040326_short&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjliMzMzZS03OTJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mzv6KVPhQYGc3fcdvYt6Qu_wjN8vnql7BBEnBSDeVl0=) I’ve always believed that no race can be taken for granted. Today, that's truer than ever before. We cannot rest until this fight is won. – Josh Shapiro

name: Hidden inside building - Jacob Davis | FIU
subject: Do you know the name of this building? ∕ Friday, April 3, 2026

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Take a close look at the image below. Hidden inside the blueprint of this tower is a that shouldn't legally exist. It involves a "ghost asset" that most Americans have never heard of, yet it’s the reason this tower stands 20 stories taller than its neighbors. name: Pennsylvania Forward Party
subject: PA FWD Party April Newsletter
body:
Ready to Launch!

| [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u8ausHb8gHep-OVLSbBg7yqDsp1nGB_fAcwZgBTG9BUSVy4IgwL7htiSs9wARY3Qkg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=1) In honor of the 250th Anniversary of the founding of the United States, we're very excited to invite you to our 2026 convention. It's going to be a great day of speakers, panels, discussions and important party business. After all the hours of video calls, we're very excited to get everyone together in King of Prussia (near Philadelphia). Get your ticket now, and let us know if you'd like to join the _Convention Planning_ _Committee_ to make this event even better! | [](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u8ausHb8gHep-OVLSbBg7yqDsp1nGB_fAcwZgBTG9BUSVy4IgwL7htiSs9wARY3Qkg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=2 "Click here for Convention Information") [Click here for Convention Information](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u8ausHb8gHep-OVLSbBg7yqDsp1nGB_fAcwZgBTG9BUSVy4IgwL7htiSs9wARY3Qkg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=2)
---
* * *
## Endorsement Announcement
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=s9-xbJ9sz3bHEgiwz34eSeP_9PVXxrs7OtvmmZwVwC8&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=3)
Election season is heating up. We're excited to announce our endorsement of Chris Gambino for PA house district 143. You may have heard from him on a recent statewide call or seen him on social media. Please check out his website [GambinoForPA.com](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=s9-xbJ9sz3bHEgiwz34eSeP_9PVXxrs7OtvmmZwVwC8&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=4),to learn more (and how you can help).
* * *
### Training Opportunity: Become a Treasurer
2026 candidates like Chris will need support. This means knocking on doors, going to events, donating, and gathering signatures. For independent candidates, it also means finding an experienced Campaign Treasurer. This role isn't difficult, but it takes a responsible person who can commit to filing the paperwork. It's a great opportunity for people who want to help an independent candidate without the pressure of talking to voters. _(Independent introverts unite!)_ It can even lead to paid roles down the road.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=BaB4xvCKLCz8qa3CFjrPn_ruO5tIYY30uiDDdkzVz-E8wMrIKoRR0AGSJ0IImY7V&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=5)
_Lead PA_ is holding a training for campaign treasurers April 27. It's online and free; you just have to [RSVP](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=BaB4xvCKLCz8qa3CFjrPn_ruO5tIYY30uiDDdkzVz-E8wMrIKoRR0AGSJ0IImY7V&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=6) by April 24. If you think you'd be willing to help a campaign in this way, please consider attending this training.
* * *
### Special Election Updates
In March, there were two more Special Elections held for State House. Both were won by Republicans which brought the balance of the house within 2. There was also another resignation of a Republican in Western PA, [District 12's Rep. Stephenie Scialabba](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=CYwohtJis91tvx14XyQMHm5CvWx10Yw2-rmaLOoGT15tJhwhAmtMibke5vlInqA36NXR7cVHcd-Zoyio2scS-TW9Srq56rU44BeZhtxNXeUMi9Xo_sP8jUBCKNvcZrBb&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=7). A special election for District 12 has not yet been scheduled, and the current break down of the PA house is 102 Democrats and 99 Republicans.
The next special election is very important to us because we have a horse in the race. It will be held May 19, also known as Primary Day!
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=lRFe1ojb2I3keveG6F1SNMpqnyA5DC-f4K2CG-ffZH4&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=8)
On [January's statewide call](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=c1vIqT8LaeJ1yAWpG61iLl6fQsq-0_vrqRWgviHRXbWlMZEVxl0MBTeRVtDkSuMbFF0LNKsSEAr_F4dfjE1u3w&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=9), we heard from recently-announced Forward affiliate [Ron Ruman](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=lRFe1ojb2I3keveG6F1SNMpqnyA5DC-f4K2CG-ffZH4&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=10). He told us about his plan to run as a Forward Democrat for the PA State House in the 196th district (York County). On January 29, Seth Grove announced his resignation, triggering this special election.
In this situation, Pennsylvania's antiquated closed primary system is especially relevant. Ron is relying on support from independent voters to win his race, but independents don't normally vote on primary day (because closed primaries shut them out), so turnout of independent voters might be low. **Ron needs help getting the word out to the independents in his district that THIS ELECTION is a chance to have their voices heard.** Please reach out if you're interested in helping.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u9pL5MpT6VqtFQJKvKaK-Psj1JvZSZJ74P4vpjukEWbdXU_enpX-JHXnROnH_6B1Gg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=11)
Join us for our monthly call. It's the best way to follow all the things happening with the PA Forward Party.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u2f82VcN49yJ3Wou-X6QZ0g70bqPJqYFWfd4IYotXLWRKQ7fywqPCPzVxQ-taqGUXQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=12)
Also remember to join your regional calls to work with others near you.
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u2f82VcN49yJ3Wou-X6QZ0gwN4noXh8hGBSWG7CdGttNr-N6lZJpxIQkgxgyGnxT8Q&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=13)
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u9pL5MpT6VqtFQJKvKaK-Ps09gVQ-d49uotEnTmCWK95zpKlr0eN8WSEgK75ZsIc6A&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=14)[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u2f82VcN49yJ3Wou-X6QZ0gV1J-mlg5CDsXW7C89o4Re-gSK9ct8yKfiin5tLdv5mA&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=15)
* * *
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u2f82VcN49yJ3Wou-X6QZ0hHTlTGAfungZkW13poetMnvObV0npALdZaBViPkWFHcQ&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=16)
Would you like to [run for office](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=MtBLw57MCBnd28lIl741u2f82VcN49yJ3Wou-X6QZ0hCrtoxosErjJZ-WOhV7ZNg-GRO_z0YjnCrE2d313L6Cw&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=17)? Do you know someone who would?
* * *
**Click below to see more**
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=c1vIqT8LaeJ1yAWpG61iLgPFP6eqkFaMhx6kY8TZhA24FXRGPP1YGXFQNlIvEhGkZbD671xXfIF5QnYSgD0VRg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=18)
[](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=2rNb3p2_LHGjdQcH8tjpDPEcvPAlrop1PCFhyWzC0wL8l3UluRn4Py6JexTUyNX_iny71Z0RzCiEE3x5nmpA_Q&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2026_april_newsletter&n=19)

clean_body: Ready to Launch! | In honor of the 250th Anniversary of the founding of the United States, we're very excited to invite you to our 2026 convention. It's going to be a great day of speakers, panels, discussions and important party business. After all the hours of video calls, we're very excited to get everyone together in King of Prussia (near Philadelphia). Get your ticket now, and let us know if you'd like to join the Convention Planning Committee to make this event even better! | "Click here for Convention Information" Endorsement Announcement Election season is heating up. We're excited to announce our endorsement of Chris Gambino for PA house district 143. You may have heard from him on a recent statewide call or seen him on social media. Please check out his website learn more (and how you can help). Training Opportunity: Become a Treasurer 2026 candidates like Chris will need support. This means knocking on doors, going to events, donating, and gathering signatures. For independent candidates, it also means finding an experienced Campaign Treasurer. This role isn't difficult, but it takes a responsible person who can commit to filing the paperwork. It's a great opportunity for people who want to help an independent candidate without the pressure of talking to voters. (Independent introverts unite!) It can even lead to paid roles down the road. Lead PA is holding a training for campaign treasurers April 27. It's online and free; you just have to by April 24. If you think you'd be willing to help a campaign in this way, please consider attending this training. Special Election Updates In March, there were two more Special Elections held for State House. Both were won by Republicans which brought the balance of the house within 2. There was also another resignation of a Republican in Western PA, . A special election for District 12 has not yet been scheduled, and the current break down of the PA house is 102 Democrats and 99 Republicans. The next special election is very important to us because we have a horse in the race. It will be held May 19, also known as Primary Day! On , we heard from recently-announced Forward affiliate . He told us about his plan to run as a Forward Democrat for the PA State House in the 196th district (York County). On January 29, Seth Grove announced his resignation, triggering this special election. In this situation, Pennsylvania's antiquated closed primary system is especially relevant. Ron is relying on support from independent voters to win his race, but independents don't normally vote on primary day (because closed primaries shut them out), so turnout of independent voters might be low. Ron needs help getting the word out to the independents in his district that THIS ELECTION is a chance to have their voices heard. Please reach out if you're interested in helping. Join us for our monthly call. It's the best way to follow all the things happening with the PA Forward Party. Also remember to join your regional calls to work with others near you. Would you like to ? Do you know someone who would? Click below to see more** Help support these events from our partner organizations. And with other PA Forward supporters on Slack! This social workspace is the best way to learn about projects, events, and opportunities. Pennsylvania Forward Party -=-=- Forward Party · 1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States

body:
################################# | Fellow American,

Our party’s position is getting stronger and stronger ahead of the midterms.

Polling shows Republicans have an **8-POINT LEAD** over radical far-Left Democrats.

On top of that, Senate Republicans **OUTRAISED** Senate Democrats by $8 MILLION in 2025!

Given the strong financial position our party is in, we’re not going to ask you for money.

** Instead, we’re laser-focused on securing our lead by focusing our time and resources on the ONE THING that actually wins elections: _[Votes!](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=f126bb0d7cbe463a85d26b342c867730&_e=LgPPBDZ837vAVz-blIIJ8txskxp0BgRbGHhCLmmqrGyx_TuiuEo8WzvKbFpAQV_iez8sXRyN7A8SxY6ObUe3Gm5EKJY2bcVusYOGWByJu0CiJdXUxRnNgssNhOtH03-PQ7Q6Qrg9F1T4H_QOH2rIqMjQBvLSxBK0doFJ4zrRfCexCooM_MwLRf8LcwNHPdS0DGFs9deDH1YwXAsadaSpC-ZJ3SWMykxTlqMNdVh9RJvF3OT3LIL4o9YBgQNSVjczf0CMxPmGAzxvnjG61IgCQr-yBzSJM8r0v5rmz63joe7JSuyoAazNrn2X5uYpY3q6MStvL9S1aRXcW2r0fda5aSdSUlnoLmTw5ZKERfkEyMmSAK3Db04m_glJJilcf2Y7tFi70zSCtZRqEcsdODKDzJxwR4D1YHmMShyXq4-oshNzIRGo_7tVMOZ2N4vdjIo2QDfnJ452o9c4B9uV_tpBpjcUOETllnaIYlw9B1Q0l6VSEJzMQ1iZb5NDyzSB7E5-NxCVhDMxNPjy6WWHgJRCeBNvJIpUP-OJbzpOMLh9Q8qoGf-ECG31K2c2QTg8pK5tZjpXJ1rx839347YTXlEg8W_c4EEsrvPHUTVM7tWi_0odWQD2ng-bf97hWYjlqk_orkUOLGAx6r2WKHj70PkbaJCorGezpUfadkVub1nj_TK_GG0rwXH9aXOVpssck-ojyHoqo2M6-OOM9hTcLXpNhTCJmDrVgrsszAO-XftmIDUPFMb3v0cgz2UFOnKi8pyfqO3GbhBg0QAAqHjxAOllMv68Sr0GObGRHqUfmxoEGEWt68OqqCL28Jghh4SHiPnEVH971U0dm23ZUR0oS7k4sQ%3D%3D)_ **

Polling shows Republicans have an 8-POINT LEAD over radical far-Left Democrats. On top of that, Senate Republicans OUTRAISED Senate Democrats by $8 MILLION in 2025! Given the strong financial position our party is in, we’re not going to ask you for money. Instead, we’re laser-focused on securing our lead by focusing our time and resources on the ONE THING that actually wins elections: We can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter profile from every Republican, we’ll still be in danger of LOSING to the Democrats. subject: People have the power — we always have

body:
We have what it takes to defeat this power grab and preserve our democracy.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128711819/612121944/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1MGFhMzcxLTdjMmYtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WGAMNmi0rNlidriDIl93hNFhn2WoP2Z97WPWWI_NShI=&emci=91f4a087-6e2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=e50aa371-7c2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, no one should ever underestimate the power of a fired-up American citizenry. In fact, it’s what President Trump and his Republican allies fear the most right now. This relentless power grab hinges on bypassing democracy itself — silencing voters, bending the law, and hoping that no one can hold them accountable. They know that they don’t deserve the power they have. Their desperation is clear. And in the face of extreme actions and anti-democracy attacks, our institutions have failed us. The Executive Branch has failed us. Congress has failed us. The Supreme Court has failed us. **The only thing that’s going to save this nation — that’s going to save democracy as we know it — is the American people. An engaged, focused, committed American people.** And Peter, any student of history can tell you that when the American people take action together, we are a mighty force. No matter what the other side wants us to believe, **we still have that power. ** Saving democracy from those who want to break it isn’t something any of us thought we’d need to do, especially not in the year that our country celebrates its 250th birthday. But none of this is new. Every generation is faced with enormous, unprecedented, unfair attacks on their rights. It’s our turn. And I believe with my whole heart that our movement, our organizing, and our unity will prevail in the end. This shameful attack on democracy will fail. [**That’s why I’m personally asking you to rise to the occasion and help prove that democracy still belongs to the American people — make a donation to NDRC today and let’s ensure that the will of the people is heard, always.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128711820/612121945/359562654?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AGEOMNOR_email_20260403-NDRC-Tier1-AGEOMNOR_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260403-NDRC-Tier1-AGEOMNOR_&utm_campaign=AGEOMNOR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU1MGFhMzcxLTdjMmYtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WGAMNmi0rNlidriDIl93hNFhn2WoP2Z97WPWWI_NShI=) In solidarity, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States | = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply

_Trump thinks that firing Bondi will distract from her disastrous handling of the Epstein files and her refusal to comply with a congressional subpoena, which raised serious questions about a potential cover-up._

But we won't look away.

**As Ranking Member of the House Oversight Committee, I meant what I said: Pam Bondi is still legally required to testify under oath. And we are continuing our investigations — into Bondi, into this administration, and into anyone who thinks they can abuse power without consequences.**

[**If you believe no one — not even a former Attorney General or a President — is above the law, add your name to my petition calling on Former Attorney General Pam Bondi to testify >> **](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128711969/612122273/1406599549?refcode=260403_RG_bondi-fired-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM4ZWIyNy03ZDJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qYLnR-R_k1BiJ-NJMJxTdyFMf2N4wo8AOn8kbj2UR9Q=&emci=f8d24ebb-6b2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=cb38eb27-7d2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=16877361)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128711970/612122274/1406599549?refcode=260403_RG_bondi-fired-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM4ZWIyNy03ZDJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qYLnR-R_k1BiJ-NJMJxTdyFMf2N4wo8AOn8kbj2UR9Q=&emci=f8d24ebb-6b2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=cb38eb27-7d2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=16877361)
This is bigger than one firing. This is about whether the truth comes out at all.

They want this story buried. They want people to move on.

We won’t.

[**Add your name today to help us hold them accountable and demand the transparency the American people deserve.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128711971/612122275/1406599549?refcode=260403_RG_bondi-fired-pet&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjM4ZWIyNy03ZDJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qYLnR-R_k1BiJ-NJMJxTdyFMf2N4wo8AOn8kbj2UR9Q=&emci=f8d24ebb-6b2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=cb38eb27-7d2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=16877361)
Thank you,
Robert Garcia

## ICYMI: The redistricting war: Texas gains 5 seats while Democrats fight back in Virginia...
[](https://substack.com/redirect/689f25f0-6bdb-45a2-a95c-77f50e1ce28d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/707513a6-e391-4c35-b4a4-8fa458f805d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I am excited to reveal that my 5th book is now available for pre-order: Trump 2.0
This is the first book to examine the consequential impact of Trump's non-sequential terms in office. His ability to come back to office after 4 year of planning and plotting -- the difference that the people, process and policies of Trump 2.0 will make and why they will be historic.
This Substack is reader-supported. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..Lp7fY6_LUnKfL_9H51dNyCGcdHoORJsdCAJMW1v_KwA?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=192978470)
I am honored that President Trump offered to write the foreword for the book -- I am excited to share it with you.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6ca47a7e-dc81-495b-9f1e-d5eebf8dbeae?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I was able to show President Trump the cover of Trump 2.0 in the Oval Office.
It is available for pre-sale now -- just click the link below. Pre-sales are critical to a book's success so your support is super helpful. Thank you!
[Preorder HERE!](https://substack.com/redirect/fc1c331a-253f-4d2d-b8fb-b34658bd7ffa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

My weekly radio new show, _**Full Court Press with Sean Spicer,**_ airs every Sunday from 10 to 11 am on one the most iconic and influential radio stations in the U.S., WABC Radio.
You Can tune in live on 77WABC, stream via the station's website at [www.wabcradio.com](https://substack.com/redirect/a01e3355-8c69-429d-a5a7-a37f05b5e69e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the 77WABC App, or access show highlights on demand.

## An Easter message...
On Good Friday as we head into this Holy Weekend, I want to wish everyone a blessed Easter.
It is easy to get wrapped up the news cycle of politics and current events, but it's important to slow down and be reminded of what really matters.
I invite you to pause and take time to reflect on the sacrifice of our Lord.
Today we remember His passion, but in three days we celebrate:
He is Risen!
I hope that everyone has a blessed Easter weekend.
See you back on Monday at 6pm for the Sean Spicer Show.

name: Dr. Maxine Dexter
subject: Trump’s latest cowardly power grab
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q2?refcode=x_260403_trumpvotebymail_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q2?refcode=x_260403_trumpvotebymail_act]
Trump signed a new executive order this week in his latest attempt to control Congress and hold onto power through the midterm election.
Trump’s White House wants to weaponize the U.S. Postal Service by only sending mail-in ballots to people on their designated voter list. This will have serious, wide-reaching consequences for voting access across the country—and especially here in Oregon.
I won’t stand for this—together we can fight back. You can support our people-powered movement by contributing today >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q2?refcode=x_260403_trumpvotebymail_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q2?refcode=x_260403_trumpvotebymail_act]
Donald Trump tried something similar last year, but federal judges struck it down as unconstitutional.
Trump will keep trying to disenfranchise voters because he knows he can’t win without cheating and is desperate to hold onto power. We need to vote his enablers out of office—they are stripping away our rights and protecting their own corrupt interests over American families.
Our founding fathers and the Constitution were clear: States set their own elections. That is exactly what stops despots like Donald Trump from going off the rails.
It’s time to vote the Republicans who sell out our country out of office. 2026 is a midterm year, and it could be one of the last chances we have to fight back against these cowards. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-26q2?refcode=x_260403_trumpvotebymail_act]

name: Team Baldwin
subject: This is a gut-punch
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Many Americans plan to cut food to afford health insurance.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5313%2E35263%2EpPq2ZX)
Peter, When a parent in Wisconsin says they're skipping meals so their kids can keep health insurance, that's not something to celebrate —** _it's a crisis._** A recent PBS poll confirms this tragic reality: many Americans are being forced to cut back on food and other essentials just to afford ACA coverage. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-apr26.zut75R&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260403_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5313%2E35263%2EpPq2ZX) Meanwhile, the priorities in Washington are completely backwards. In just three weeks, Donald Trump spent as much on his unconstitutional war as it would cost to extend the _Affordable Care Act_ tax credits for an **ENTIRE YEAR.** It costs approximately $1 billion a day for Trump’s war in Iran. That money should go toward hospitals in rural communities, affordable health clinics, and medical staff keeping our families safe and healthy. We cannot accept a system where billions are spent on overseas operations while families at home are forced to choose between eating and staying healthy. Those same billions could stabilize marketplaces across Wisconsin and ensure no family is left behind. **[We’re asking you to give what you can today to help Tammy fight back against this administration.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-apr26.zut75R&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260403_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5313%2E35263%2EpPq2ZX)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=stb-em-apr26.0nKLzm&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260403_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5313%2E35263%2EpPq2ZX)

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: The price is wrong
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
Feel like you’re being ripped off? That’s because you are!
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?refcode=&t=1&akid=4359%2E898137%2EWhYT1_)
Hey,
Ever feel like companies are screwing you but you can’t quite put your finger on it? You swear you looked up the price of a flight last night and it was lower, a lot lower. Today it costs so much more.
Or you’re standing outside waiting for your rideshare to get home. It costs how much to go just a few miles home? But your phone battery is low and hell, you need to get home, so you book the ride.
It’s not your imagination. It’s a predatory business practice.
Companies are using algorithmic pricing tools to study your personal data and charge you exactly what they think you’ll pay — a practice called surveillance pricing. It means companies can charge you _completely different prices for the same thing_. Even things like ride-sharing trips — if the app reads that your phone battery is low, they might _double your price!_
And it’s not just happening to consumers. Some companies are now using similar algorithms to track workers and decide their wages, hours, and schedules. Even track their locations.
**[Check out this video I made to explain how it works, and what I intend to do to stop it, then share it with your family and friends →](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-surveillancepricing.miOJQr&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260403_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=4359%2E898137%2EWhYT1_)**
[](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-surveillancepricing.miOJQr&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260403_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=4359%2E898137%2EWhYT1_)
It’s a high-tech rip-off. And we can’t let companies get away with it.
**[The economy shouldn’t be a rigged game. In the US Senate, I’ll introduce legislation to stop this. Click here to learn more about my plan to combat surveillance pricing.](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-surveillancepricing.miOJQr&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260403_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4359%2E898137%2EWhYT1_)**
[WATCH HERE ▶️](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-surveillancepricing.miOJQr&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260403_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4359%2E898137%2EWhYT1_)
---
Thanks,
Mallory

name: Andrea Salinas
subject: Taking the next step
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Andrea Salinas for Oregon
body:
The outcomes of November’s elections are not something we can just sit back and witness.

Team, With the support of grassroots Democrats like yourself, we hit our first End-of-Quarter fundraising goal this year. [**Your support made this possible, and I couldn’t be more grateful to have such an incredible team behind me._Thank you._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128714010/612128679/-1315607773?refcode=email_040326_tysurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ViYjIzYy03ZjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHk4iaOKELVtOTk6FB_R-eTKPb5lcfDA-5U1oWqETBI=&emci=cd941567-dd2d-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=77ebb23c-7f2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=5643047) But our fight is just getting started. The outcomes of November’s elections are not something we can just sit back and witness. We have to play an active role in shaping them, and that starts right now. _**[As we head into the most consequential election of our lifetimes, I want to make sure I’m focused on the issues that matter most to Oregonians. So I’m asking: Would you take a moment to fill out my campaign's 2026 priorities survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128714012/612128681/-1315607773?refcode=email_040326_tysurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ViYjIzYy03ZjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHk4iaOKELVtOTk6FB_R-eTKPb5lcfDA-5U1oWqETBI=&emci=cd941567-dd2d-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=77ebb23c-7f2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=5643047)**_ | | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128714013/612128682/-1315607773?refcode=email_040326_tysurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ViYjIzYy03ZjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHk4iaOKELVtOTk6FB_R-eTKPb5lcfDA-5U1oWqETBI=&emci=cd941567-dd2d-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=77ebb23c-7f2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=5643047)
---
I know that at times it seems like our country is moving backwards, not forwards.
But I want you to know — no matter what obstacle Trump or his MAGA allies throw our way — I am still fighting for you.
It’s why I’ve hosted town halls and have met with constituents from all walks of life to hear what’s on your mind this election year, and elevate Oregonians’ voices in Washington. And it’s why I’m reaching out to you today.
_**[With less than seven months until Election Day, it’s more important than ever that every Oregonian from Newberg to Salem has a voice in shaping what comes next. So please, if you haven’t already, will you take a moment to fill out my 2026 priorities survey? Your response will play a key role in my fight to defend OR-06 and flip the House in Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128714014/612128684/-1315607773?refcode=email_040326_tysurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ViYjIzYy03ZjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHk4iaOKELVtOTk6FB_R-eTKPb5lcfDA-5U1oWqETBI=&emci=cd941567-dd2d-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=77ebb23c-7f2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=5643047)**_
| [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128714015/612128740/-1315607773?refcode=email_040326_tysurvey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ViYjIzYy03ZjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHk4iaOKELVtOTk6FB_R-eTKPb5lcfDA-5U1oWqETBI=&emci=cd941567-dd2d-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=77ebb23c-7f2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=5643047)
---
Thank you for your help,
— Andrea

| This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to **[unsubscribe, click here](https://action.andreasalinasfororegon.com/a/unsubscribe?unsubscribedata=iynyr5do2twLvWxRuQYQP8KME1fS0M6ZTnPd00mEX0FVpkabO%2B73DzZTZeMq%2B5ixoRYIhiXLwOHJO%2F8RNcy2SlCGO7T5kaGktyWt9cY3dxP8sjdZEo9dnU7C91vSgOT96F1EziOSiJCv4ig7Hm47vSkvxgmPBEoKqydFa3zH6j0v%2BY%2FL1Tp0ZxfuxMHPOex%2FZDYY%2BI42y84zvByftR08BYDQ5nriPcb8FNe6Rr4MGjaPzRTY1mWCurj%2Fibl1nZt27kxCdFrK24OpsW%2F23ZvNAnB7VqCA994F5w39PLcjjuj5dBg%2FbZjP2due6fpDuiFnQWN6sWp%2Fv0BQV8AaQrEQRquy4G5GjF9BVXP5i3LrAAQCvQ968V2audwLnn7j4Fj8WY8Gdjhn%2Bjge%2FiWX098CGl%2FeZO%2BdJLJQFuPDkdf5%2BkI%3D).** | | [Donate →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128714017/612128796/-1080040549?refcode=email-footer&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3N2ViYjIzYy03ZjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xHk4iaOKELVtOTk6FB_R-eTKPb5lcfDA-5U1oWqETBI=)

name: Arizona Democratic Party
subject: A time for hope
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-header]
Hi there, I'm Monica from the Arizona Democratic Party finance team.

Arizona elections are famously competitive, with races being decided by just a couple thousand votes.

My job is to make sure Arizona Dems have the resources they need to run those races and keep fighting to reach every voter up until the very last vote is cast. I really like my job.

Tonight is our first quarterly fundraising deadline of the election year. The numbers we report tonight decide how we allocate those resources — from how many people we put in the field to talk to voters this spring to how much digital outreach we do.

Can you chip in right now to help us hit our end-of-quarter goal and keep voters engaged in this election?

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-q1-2026?amount=10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/azd-em-q1-2026?amount=10]

Thanks for standing with Arizona!

AZ Dems
Arizona Democratic Party
PO Box 36123
Phoenix, AZ 85067-6123
United States
info@azdem.org [info@azdem.org]

name: AOC
subject: If we do not demand — and not only demand, but win — unions, healthcare, wages, and ending endless war, then we will condemn ourselves to barbarism.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
I refuse to give up.

subject: Legislative Update and Upcoming Events
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY FRIENDS OF BRYCE REEVES
body:
What happened in Richmond?
| | |
---
| | [](https://gkbt4brd.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fbrycereeves.com%2F/1/0100019d544f6275-68929dd3-7afb-42f0-a5db-46639d7215b0-000000/uOEOqzoGVOhuJ-jdzSU0Q2Ui81s=472)
---
| Peter, We have officially wrapped up this year's legislative session in Richmond, and I'm now back in the district working hard to get caught up on constituent correspondence and to defeat [the upcoming April 21 gerrymandering amendment!](https://gkbt4brd.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.foxnews.com%2Fpolitics%2Fformer-virginia-governor-challenges-spanberger-debate-her-redistricting-flip-flop/1/0100019d544f6275-68929dd3-7afb-42f0-a5db-46639d7215b0-000000/7vZ94Ltg84ndX5PhtAcF91aw64Q=472)
---
|
---
| I wanted to give you a quick update on how legislative session went. I had 8 bills make it to Governor Spanberger's desk: a variety of legislation that will help our businesses, our military & veterans, and protect my constituents' access to clean drinking water. The Governor's deadline to sign, amend, or veto legislation is coming up quick - she has to take action by April 13th at midnight. Following this deadline, we will get together for a reconvene session, where the House and Senate will either uphold or overturn her vetoes and amendments - that's taking place on Wednesday, April 22nd. We did not exit our legislative session with a completed budget. Unfortunately, Democratic leadership was focused on infighting and could not come to an agreement on how they want to waste taxpayer dollars. The Governor has called a special budget session which will be held on Thursday, April 23rd - the day after the reconvene session. I am optimistic that we will find a path forward and be able to present the people of Virginia with a budget, though I cannot promise those in the Democrat majority will try to spend your money wisely.
---
| | |
---
| | [CHECK YOUR VOTING LOCATION HERE](https://gkbt4brd.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.elections.virginia.gov%2Fcasting-a-ballot%2Fearly-voting-office-locations%2F/1/0100019d544f6275-68929dd3-7afb-42f0-a5db-46639d7215b0-000000/tit1JmJSL3PGyWuDrXQuMP_-eLQ=472)
---
| I also want to take a moment to stress the importance of the upcoming April 21st election. Democrat leadership has decided that they disagree with the super-majority of Virginians that voted to take politics OUT of the redistricting process. They are working to silence rural voices in Virginia by posing a constitutional amendment that would allow them to gerrymander the state. They claim it is in the interest of “fairness”, but in reality it is a desperate bid for power. If you have not had the chance to vote yet, please do! Early voting is available in every locality across the Commonwealth, and casting your ballot early secures your vote and leaves you free on election day to volunteer or drive friends & neighbors to the polls.
---
|
---
| Before I leave you, I wanted to highlight a few upcoming community events. Tonight, you can take the whole family up to Warrenton for the first “First Friday” of the spring season! [Head to Main Street in Warrenton between 5:30 and 9:00pm tonight](https://gkbt4brd.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.allegrocsa.org%2Ffirst-friday-warrenton/1/0100019d544f6275-68929dd3-7afb-42f0-a5db-46639d7215b0-000000/B5Iuh5K3r15QZDHOjFQojNouU3E=472), April 3rd to check out local businesses, artists, and vendors.
---
| | |
---
| Orange County Parks & Rec. staff have been hard at work planning their upcoming “[Diamond Dayz](https://gkbt4brd.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Forangecountyva.gov%2F302%2FEvents/1/0100019d544f6275-68929dd3-7afb-42f0-a5db-46639d7215b0-000000/CV14twhSHWN_g7kqEv1nvF5aIrE=472)” event - a whole week's worth of baseball and softball related activities that the whole family can enjoy! They're doing an MLB pitch, hit, and run challenge, a “Sandlot” movie night, and much more starting Monday, April 27th. Think you have what it takes to be a baseball pro? Prove it on the diamond! Don't ever hesitate to reach out to my office - my staff and I are more than happy to assist you and answer any questions you may have. Yours in service,
---
| | |
---
| Bryce E. ReevesSenator28th Senatorial District of VASenatorReeves@Senate.Virginia.gov(540) 645-8440
---
|
---
| Have a wonderful Easter, from my family to yours!
---
| | | [](https://gkbt4brd.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2FBryceReevesVA/1/0100019d544f6275-68929dd3-7afb-42f0-a5db-46639d7215b0-000000/6G4a6IIlYwfhGwYv2uyvWqUb_ko=472)
---
| [](https://gkbt4brd.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fwww.instagram.com%2Freevesva%2F%3Fhl=en/1/0100019d544f6275-68929dd3-7afb-42f0-a5db-46639d7215b0-000000/oXRDcJUTaOb1dtSlDNo9JjHikUY=472)

---

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Another win
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26]
Folks, we just scored a major legal victory against the Trump administration:
After months of legal fighting, the U.S. Department of Energy has backed down from its efforts to slash funding for state energy programs.
The Trump administration is finally recognizing what my office has said all along: approved energy funding isn’t up for grabs.
This is a clear legal victory and a win for Americans. Keeping these programs will lower energy bills, create good-paying jobs, and modernize our infrastructure.
This is what holding the line looks like. Will you help continue this important work by making sure my re-election campaign has the resources we need to win in November? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-26?amount=50]
Thanks for helping power this work.
—Rob
Rob Bonta
Attorney General of California

clean_body: [] Folks, we just scored a major legal victory against the Trump administration: After months of legal fighting, the U.S. Department of Energy has backed down from its efforts to slash funding for state energy programs. The Trump administration is finally recognizing what my office has said all along: approved energy funding isn’t up for grabs. This is a clear legal victory and a win for Americans. Keeping these programs will lower energy bills, create good-paying jobs, and modernize our infrastructure. This is what holding the line looks like. Will you help continue this important work by making sure my re-election campaign has the resources we need to win in November? [] DONATE >> [] Thanks for helping power this work. —Rob Rob Bonta Attorney General of California [] CONTRIBUTE [] To contribute via check, please address to: Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026 c/o Deane & Company 1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201 Sacramento, CA 95815

body:

At Demand
Justice, we believe there is a real possibility of one — or even multiple
— Supreme Court vacancies this year.

This isn’t speculation we can afford to ignore. If a seat opens, we all
know exactly what comes next: Trump will move immediately to install
another loyalist, cementing a conservative supermajority for decades.

We’re not sitting back. We’re not waiting for confirmation. We’re not
waiting for the nominee to be officially announced.

Demand Justice is already leading the charge, building the infrastructure
needed to respond the moment a vacancy is announced.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55693?t=1003&akid=61325%2E1407376%2E00rob9 ]New York Times: A Liberal Group Warns That Trump Could Have Two More
Supreme Court Picks.

Our team is on the front lines: assembling a rapid-response task force,
coordinating nationwide grassroots pressure, preparing legal strategies,
and mobilizing supporters across the country.

Every step is designed to hit the ground running the moment a vacancy
opens, stopping another Trump loyalist from taking a seat on the highest
court.

But meeting this moment will take massive resources and the full strength
of our grassroots network. That’s why we’re coming to you.

name: James O'Keefe
subject: "Surrender your firearms." — The judge's order just got worse.
body:
I was live on air when the Palm Beach Sheriff walked in. No warning. No phone call. While my team and I were broadcasting to tens of thousands of people — a
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| James O'Keefe | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [ ](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35")
---
| Dear Friend,
**I was live on air when the Palm Beach Sheriff walked in.** No warning. No phone call. While my team and I were broadcasting to tens of thousands of people — a deputy came through the doors of OMG headquarters and handed me a restraining order. **Served live. On camera. For the world to see.** The person who filed it? **Matthew Tyrmand** — a former Project Veritas board member who [**admitted on hidden camera that he wants me dead.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35") [****](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35") **Let that sink in.** The man who said he wants to murder me ran to a Miami courthouse and filed a domestic violence restraining order against **ME.** **And yesterday, it got worse.** I stood before a judge in Miami. He extended that restraining order **until May 11th.** And then he asked me to **surrender all of my firearms.** I'm a journalist. I operate in dangerous environments — Minneapolis mobs, government whistleblowers, cartel country. My security team carries firearms because **the threats against my life are real and documented.** **Now a court is trying to disarm me.** I need your help to fight this. Will you chip in **$35** to my legal defense fund right now? **** | [ DONATE TO JAMES'S LEGAL DEFENSE → ](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35")
---
Here's what you need to understand about why this is happening:
**We are winning.**
In the past year alone, OMG investigations have generated over **1 million YouTube views** , triggered a **$9 billion Treasury audit** , and led to **$253 million in federal contracts being suspended**. Our hidden camera footage of FBI and DOJ officials has exposed corruption at the highest levels of the United States government.
**They cannot beat us in the court of public opinion. So they're trying to beat us in an actual court.**
This restraining order isn't about domestic violence. [**It's about silencing an investigative journalist who has caught too many powerful people on camera.** ](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35") Matthew Tyrmand served on the Project Veritas board — the same board that ousted me, sued me, and has spent years trying to destroy everything I've built.
**Now they're using the legal system as a weapon.**
My legal team **filed an emergency interlocutory appeal today** challenging this order. We're fighting back on every front — First Amendment, Second Amendment, due process. All of it.
**But legal battles like this cost real money. And right now, we need your help.**
**$35** helps cover one hour of my attorneys' time fighting this appeal.
**$50** funds the constitutional research behind our emergency motion.
**$100** covers court filing fees and legal review.
**$250 or more** helps us keep fighting this all the way to the top — and fund the next investigation while we do it.
**They want me disarmed, silenced, and tied up in court while they continue to operate in the dark.**
**I'm not letting that happen.**
****
[ CHIP IN $35 TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE NOW → ](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35")
---
You and I both know that if they can do this to me — served live on national television, stripped of my right to bear arms, buried under legal fees — **they can do it to any journalist who dares expose them.**
**This isn't just about me. It's about whether truth-telling journalism survives in this country.**
I've been through the raid on the journalist who had the Ashley Biden diary. I've been through Project Veritas suing me after throwing me out. I've been through the mob in Minneapolis who gave me **one hour to leave or be killed.**
**I didn't leave then. I'm not leaving now.**
But I need you in this fight with me.
Please give your most generous gift today — **$35, $100, $250** , or whatever you can — to the **O'Keefe Legal Defense Fund** hosted by Liberty Guard. Every dollar goes directly to fighting this unconstitutional order and keeping our cameras rolling.
****
[ DEFEND JAMES NOW — DONATE TO THE LEGAL DEFENSE FUND →](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35")
---

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** A former Project Veritas board member — a man who **said on hidden camera he wants me dead** — just got a judge to order me to **surrender my firearms**. I filed an emergency appeal today. **The hearing is May 11th.** If you've ever believed in what we're doing, I need you now. [**Donate to my legal defense and help me fight back.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35")
****
[ DONATE TO JAMES'S LEGAL DEFENSE → ](https://click.parlermailer.com/? "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35")
---

_You are receiving this sponsored email because you subscribe to Parler's newsletter. The views in this email do not necessarily reflect those of Parler, its leadership or staff. If you'd prefer not to receive these types of messages on behalf of our sponsors, you can click "Unsubscribe" below. _
---

(C) 2026 _Parler_ , All Rights Reserved.

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: This is a direct result of the choices Abbott has made.
body:
I promise to fight for a Texas we can be proud of.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
Like a lot of people born and raised in the great state of Texas, I was taught to love and have great pride for our home.
No matter where we fall on the political spectrum, we _all_ share the same pride.
Barbecue. Whataburger. H-E-B. Friday Night Lights. Bluebonnets. Our neighborhood schools and universities. Breathtaking landscapes and natural wonders, from the Gulf Coast to Big Bend. The feeling that Texas is our home.
But since Greg Abbott took office over a decade ago, Texas has fallen behind on the things that matter most to all of us, from education and healthcare to infrastructure. **Right now, Texas is ranked low in all of these categories on a national level.**
That is unacceptable, and none of this needed to happen. Texas’s decline is a direct result of the choices Abbott has made, again and again, to put corruption and his billionaire donors ahead of Texans.
Right now, I need to ask a hard question. _Is this the Texas we want — is it the one we’re proud of?_
This is not about left or right. **This is about the basics that every Texan deserves.** Affordable healthcare. Strong, well-funded public schools, not Abbott’s voucher scam. Safe roads and reliable infrastructure. Clean water that does not run dry. Communities that are supported, not torn apart.
There is a saying that everything is bigger and better in Texas. But for too many families, it has not felt that way in a really long time.
As governor, I promise to fight for a Texas we can be proud of. A state that works for working Texans, not politicians and billionaires.
If you believe Texas deserves better, I need you with me.
**[Please pitch in $5 or any amount today to support my campaign for governor and kick Greg Abbott out in November.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260403_1_pride.4StnRM&refcode=em20260403-868&amount=5&t=1&akid=868%2E299639%2ETyJzZO)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260403_1_pride.4StnRM&amount=5&refcode=em20260403-868&t=20&akid=868%2E299639%2ETyJzZO)
Thank you,
Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260403-1-b1&t=22&refcode2=868_299639_TyJzZO&akid=868%2E299639%2ETyJzZO)
[ Donate Monthly » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260403-1-b2&recurring=1&t=23&refcode2=868_299639_TyJzZO&akid=868%2E299639%2ETyJzZO)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_gov/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/update-your-information_gov/?t=24&akid=868%2E299639%2ETyJzZO)

name: Texas Organizing Project
subject: SURVEY: Tell us how would you fix healthcare in Texas / ENCUESTA: Cuéntenos cómo mejoraría el sistema de salud en Texas 📝 🩺💊
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/PNG%202023%20TOP%20Newsletter%20Header.png]
Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español]
We want to hear from you on healthcare
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Healthcare%20teal%20graphic.jpg]
You still have time to fill out our quick online healthcare survey. Take it today! [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfoc1OUiuz2TfuWAMFfFO2p2m3ti1xB9QGZzEjIya3BgLA9EA/viewform]
>From restricted healthcare access to health insurance premiums rising, we know it's not getting any easier to see a doctor or get affordable medical treatment in Trump 2.0.
Tell us what REAL healthcare looks like to you, and share your personal story.
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfoc1OUiuz2TfuWAMFfFO2p2m3ti1xB9QGZzEjIya3BgLA9EA/viewform [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfoc1OUiuz2TfuWAMFfFO2p2m3ti1xB9QGZzEjIya3BgLA9EA/viewform]
Team-building and strategizing with statewide legal reform allies
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/TOP%20R2J%20and%20coalition.jpeg]
This past week, TOP Right2Justice campaign staff and members joined the Texas Pretrial Justice Coalition for a preparatory meeting to team-build and strategize for the 2027 Texas legislative session.
The convening, held at the ACLU office in Houston, focused on grounding the coalition’s foundational values, reviewing lessons from 2025, and developing a strategic plan for policy shifts related to pretrial detention, probation, and incarceration reduction. The two-day event included strategy sessions, partner engagement activities, and opportunities for collaborative planning, all aligned with the broader Right2Justice initiative. The goal is to strengthen collective efforts ahead of upcoming legislative advocacy.
To learn more about our Right2Justice campaign efforts, email Dr. Doshie Piper at dpiper@organizetexas.org [dpiper@organizetexas.org] .
Come organize with TOP
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/We%20are%20hiring.png]
If you or someone you know cares deeply about social justice and transforming our state so Black and Latino Texans have the political power they deserve, then check out TOP’s current job openings. [https://organizetexas.org/about-top/employment/]
Please let us know of any talented and passionate community members you feel would be a good addition to our team!
Email recruit@organizetexas.org [recruit@organizetexas.org] with any questions or to apply.
TRUMP TRACKER:
He's turning back the clock on our justice system and legal reforms
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Use%20this%20-%20Justice%20matters.jpg]
In this week’s Trump Tracker, where we use Critical Ignoring [https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/blog/misinformation-desk/202511/critical-ignoring-a-strategy-for-information-overload] to fight MAGA’s "flood the zone" [https://www.npr.org/2025/02/07/1229744815/its-been-a-minute-trump-flood-the-zone] nonsense, we're hitting on the justice system and legal reforms, which POTUS has (predictably) been unraveling through backwards policies.
Donald Trump — convicted of 34 felony counts in case you forgot — is doubling-down on a failed and discriminatory "tough-on-crime" approach in his second term. He and his loyalists at the Dept. of Justice (bye, Pam Bondi!) are working to reverse, weaken, or in some cases just ignore justice reforms that were implemented by previous administrations.
Just as the Prison Policy Initiative states, "The American criminal legal system has always been terrible, but what has happened in recent months is different." [https://www.prisonpolicy.org/federaltracker.html]
Trump has dished out executive orders to threaten federal funding for state and local governments that have ended the use of cash bail, seeking to force a return to more unjust pre-reform policies. In addition to undermining bail reform, his regime has renewed and accelerated the use of the federal death penalty, with plans to expand the types of crimes punishable by death.
And with the increasing criminalization of immigrants by ICE and Border Patrol, our nation's mass incarceration problem has only gotten worse.
Here are five criminal justice issues to watch for this year from the Vera Institute. [https://www.vera.org/explainers/five-criminal-justice-issues-to-watch-during-trumps-second-year-in-office]
Español
Queremos escuchar tu opinión sobre la atención médica
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Healthcare%20teal%20graphic.jpg]
Aún están a tiempo de completar nuestra breve encuesta de salud en línea. ¡Llénenla hoy mismo! [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf1bY_DlK7WwjhHEWsdJhb8yQSqAUdL3z_EEH_QepPF2HeAEw/viewform]
Desde el acceso restringido a la atención médica hasta el aumento de las primas de los seguros de salud, sabemos que cada vez resulta más difícil ver a un médico u obtener un tratamiento médico asequible en la era de Trump 2.0. Cuéntennos qué significa para ustedes una atención médica REAL y compartan su historia personal.
https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf1bY_DlK7WwjhHEWsdJhb8yQSqAUdL3z_EEH_QepPF2HeAEw/viewform [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSf1bY_DlK7WwjhHEWsdJhb8yQSqAUdL3z_EEH_QepPF2HeAEw/viewform]
Desarrollo de equipos y elaboración de estrategias con aliados estatales para la reforma legal
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/TOP%20R2J%20and%20coalition.jpeg]
La semana pasada, el personal y los miembros de la campaña Right2Justice de TOP se unieron a la coalición Texas Pretrial Justice Coalition para una reunión preparatoria con el fin de fomentar el trabajo en equipo y definir estrategias de cara a la sesión legislativa de Texas de 2027.
El encuentro, celebrado en las oficinas de la ACLU en Houston, se centró en afianzar los valores fundamentales de la coalición, analizar las lecciones aprendidas en 2025 y desarrollar un plan estratégico para impulsar cambios normativos relacionados con la detención previa al juicio, la libertad condicional y la reducción del encarcelamiento. El evento, de dos días, incluyó sesiones de estrategia, actividades de vinculación con organizaciones aliadas y oportunidades para la planificación colaborativa; todo ello en consonancia con la iniciativa más amplia de Right2Justice. El objetivo es fortalecer los esfuerzos colectivos de cara a las próximas labores de incidencia legislativa.
Para obtener más información sobre las iniciativas de nuestra campaña Right2Justice, envíe un correo electrónico a la Dra. Doshie Piper a la dirección dpiper@organizetexas.org [dpiper@organizetexas.org] .
Ven a organizar con TOP
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Spanish%20-%20we%20are%20hiring.png]
Si usted o alguien que conoce siente un profundo compromiso con la justicia social y con la transformación de nuestro estado para que los texanos negros y latinos tengan el poder político que merecen, le invitamos a consultar las vacantes actuales en TOP. [https://organizetexas.org/about-top/employment/]
¡Por favor, háganos saber si conoce a algún miembro de la comunidad —talentoso y apasionado— que, en su opinión, sería una excelente incorporación a nuestro equipo!
Envíe un correo electrónico a recruit@organizetexas.org [recruit@organizetexas.org] si tiene alguna pregunta o para aplicar a una vacante.
RASTREADOR DE TRUMP:
Está haciendo retroceder el reloj de nuestro sistema de justicia y de las reformas legales
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Use%20this%20-%20Justice%20matters.jpg]
En el Trump Tracker de esta semana — donde empleamos la Ignorancia Crítica [https://www.psychologytoday.com/us/blog/misinformation-desk/202511/critical-ignoring-a-strategy-for-information-overload] para contrarrestar el absurdo de inundar la zona [https://www.npr.org/2025/02/07/1229744815/its-been-a-minute-trump-flood-the-zone] propio del movimiento MAGA — abordamos el sistema de justicia y las reformas legales, aspectos que el presidente (como era de esperar) ha estado desmantelando mediante políticas regresivas.
Donald Trump — condenado por 34 cargos de delitos graves, por si alguien lo había olvidado — redobla su apuesta por un enfoque de «mano dura contra la delincuencia» que ha resultado fallido y discriminatorio de cara a su segundo mandato. Tanto él como sus colaboradores leales en el Departamento de Justicia (¡adiós, Pam Bondi!) trabajan para revertir, debilitar o, en algunos casos, simplemente ignorar las reformas judiciales implementadas por administraciones anteriores.
Tal como señala la Prison Policy Initiative: «El sistema jurídico-penal estadounidense siempre ha sido terrible, pero lo que ha sucedido en los últimos meses es diferente.» [https://www.prisonpolicy.org/federaltracker.html]
Trump ha emitido órdenes ejecutivas para amenazar con retirar los fondos federales a aquellos gobiernos estatales y locales que han puesto fin al uso de la fianza en efectivo, buscando forzar un retorno a políticas anteriores a la reforma que resultan más injustas. Además de socavar la reforma del sistema de fianzas, su administración ha reactivado y acelerado la aplicación de la pena de muerte a nivel federal, con planes para ampliar la tipología de delitos punibles con la pena capital.
Asimismo, ante la creciente criminalización de los inmigrantes por parte del ICE y la Patrulla Fronteriza, el problema de encarcelamiento masivo de nuestra nación no ha hecho más que agravarse.
A continuación, el Vera Institute presenta cinco cuestiones clave en materia de justicia penal a las que prestar atención este año. [https://www.vera.org/explainers/five-criminal-justice-issues-to-watch-during-trumps-second-year-in-office]
