clean_body: [] Lea el boletín en español abajo [#Español] We want to hear from you on healthcare [] You still have time to fill out our quick online healthcare survey. Take it today! [] From restricted healthcare access to health insurance premiums rising, we know it's not getting any easier to see a doctor or get affordable medical treatment in Trump 2.0. Tell us what REAL healthcare looks like to you, and share your personal story. [] Team-building and strategizing with statewide legal reform allies [] This past week, TOP Right2Justice campaign staff and members joined the Texas Pretrial Justice Coalition for a preparatory meeting to team-build and strategize for the 2027 Texas legislative session. The convening, held at the ACLU office in Houston, focused on grounding the coalition’s foundational values, reviewing lessons from 2025, and developing a strategic plan for policy shifts related to pretrial detention, probation, and incarceration reduction. The two-day event included strategy sessions, partner engagement activities, and opportunities for collaborative planning, all aligned with the broader Right2Justice initiative. The goal is to strengthen collective efforts ahead of upcoming legislative advocacy. To learn more about our Right2Justice campaign efforts, email Dr. Doshie Piper at dpiper@organizetexas.org [dpiper@organizetexas.org] . Come organize with TOP [] If you or someone you know cares deeply about social justice and transforming our state so Black and Latino Texans have the political power they deserve, then check out TOP’s current job openings. [] Please let us know of any talented and passionate community members you feel would be a good addition to our team! Email recruit@organizetexas.org [recruit@organizetexas.org] with any questions or to apply. TRUMP TRACKER: He's turning back the clock on our justice system and legal reforms [] In this week’s Trump Tracker, where we use Critical Ignoring [] to fight MAGA’s "flood the zone" [] nonsense, we're hitting on the justice system and legal reforms, which POTUS has (predictably) been unraveling through backwards policies. Donald Trump — convicted of 34 felony counts in case you forgot — is doubling-down on a failed and discriminatory "tough-on-crime" approach in his second term. He and his loyalists at the Dept. of Justice (bye, Pam Bondi!) are working to reverse, weaken, or in some cases just ignore justice reforms that were implemented by previous administrations. Just as the Prison Policy Initiative states, "The American criminal legal system has always been terrible, but what has happened in recent months is different." [] Trump has dished out executive orders to threaten federal funding for state and local governments that have ended the use of cash bail, seeking to force a return to more unjust pre-reform policies. In addition to undermining bail reform, his regime has renewed and accelerated the use of the federal death penalty, with plans to expand the types of crimes punishable by death. And with the increasing criminalization of immigrants by ICE and Border Patrol, our nation's mass incarceration problem has only gotten worse. Here are five criminal justice issues to watch for this year from the Vera Institute. [] Español Queremos escuchar tu opinión sobre la atención médica [] Aún están a tiempo de completar nuestra breve encuesta de salud en línea. ¡Llénenla hoy mismo! subject: Colorado redistricting in jeopardy after new ruling

body:
| | | | | [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-3Poz7jZ_RFT2bFpQs1qzPnvtPXi_hy0lDS-1w-0FB8EkeNhDJYTlGgBqD_XRQWKYZOdoyiKu7obCO1P4b9W9L8cROpijOSkxphl8q1RWyq0Zfm-jGC1UtfZTVV_nil0Cnc2rwPPAEShPhzKbLUzxO0Au8jSYknf2WVjH-rZFSmGKuivZIYgaiGuA5NOPjR3BEYwMhCDpmM92vXatMH_cVxGmfaQS8vQ&c=aoynKpWxnpj97K0EhPBYEJCjGY2_MtxkqxvUXvwEoXsyRLkFkpqsbQ==&ch=Uo7dMKLjh8ticMLCepnavRYxzfWqs3twfuglVZwhU8U-uvFEqPMhFw==)
---
| Peter,
On Wednesday, our legal team stood in front of the Colorado title board and fought for our best shot at countering MAGA's election rigging scheme. The title board has final say over ballot measure language and the vote threshold required to pass.
Trump sent his own lawyer to personally argue against our ballot initiative.
The title board sided with Trump's lawyer, and shot down our best proposal.
The board left us two paths forward. Two separate initiatives, each needing a simple majority. Or one combined measure where we'd need to clear 55%. A threshold MAGA is banking on us never hitting.
Both paths are unacceptable.
---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-3Poz7jZ_RFT2bFpQs1qzPnvtPXi_hy0lDS-1w-0FB8EkeNhDJYTlGgBqD_XRQWKYZOdoyiKu7obCO1P4b9W9L8cROpijOSkxphl8q1RWyq0Zfm-jGC1UtfZTVV_nil0Cnc2rwPPAEShPhzKbLUzxO0Au8jSYknf2WVjH-rZFSmGKuivZIYgaiGuA5NOPjR3BEYwMhCDpmMgwpw_1vgISHkQGuut5Px6&c=aoynKpWxnpj97K0EhPBYEJCjGY2_MtxkqxvUXvwEoXsyRLkFkpqsbQ==&ch=Uo7dMKLjh8ticMLCepnavRYxzfWqs3twfuglVZwhU8U-uvFEqPMhFw==)
---

That's why we will be challenging the board's decision at the Colorado Supreme Court.
That means we will be taking on Trump's lawyer again, this time in front of the Colorado Supreme Court.
MAGA is going all out to stop our initiative because they know what will happen when we win--their election rigging scheme will completely crumble and their desperate powergrab will fail.
This will be a costly legal battle and we need to get out lawyers everything they need to win in the Colorado Supreme Court. So we're asking you today:
[Peter, we've come too far to back down now. Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help get our lawyers every resource they need to battle Trump's lawyer in front of the Supreme Court?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-3Poz7jZ_RFT2bFpQs1qzPnvtPXi_hy0lDS-1w-0FB8EkeNhDJYTlGgBqD_XRQWKRjbnCthb8knqfWYZGvo6jCQ16gG4mOjM7ybNnodzkXrBK07GFXHx-ucU_jiaPfc12zXFNWkryBd4RzqlY9YIC96TEUE3aByOt9o49URfCMwYNbBQAV3QntOJL1KF9vRY9jQ-jlqipB_tltRFqII4NamNWPu-0X7XAUWG5kV_AdM=&c=aoynKpWxnpj97K0EhPBYEJCjGY2_MtxkqxvUXvwEoXsyRLkFkpqsbQ==&ch=Uo7dMKLjh8ticMLCepnavRYxzfWqs3twfuglVZwhU8U-uvFEqPMhFw==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, On Wednesday, our legal team stood in front of the Colorado title board and fought for our best shot at countering MAGA's election rigging scheme. The title board has final say over ballot measure language and the vote threshold required to pass. Trump sent his own lawyer to personally argue against our ballot initiative. The title board sided with Trump's lawyer, and shot down our best proposal. The board left us two paths forward. Two separate initiatives, each needing a simple majority. Or one combined measure where we'd need to clear 55%. A threshold MAGA is banking on us never hitting. Both paths are unacceptable. | == That's why we will be challenging the board's decision at the Colorado Supreme Court. That means we will be taking on Trump's lawyer again, this time in front of the Colorado Supreme Court. MAGA is going all out to stop our initiative because they know what will happen when we win--their election rigging scheme will completely crumble and their desperate powergrab will fail. This will be a costly legal battle and we need to get out lawyers everything they need to win in the Colorado Supreme Court. So we're asking you today: == If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | == | Trump's lawyer flew to Colorado to stop us. subject: Trump just said the quiet part out loud

body:
Trump would rather spend billions on war than help working families in America. | | | Peter, In a press briefing on Wednesday, Trump admitted what we’ve known all along: he’d rather spend billions on regime-change wars than help working families in America.1 [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9u1A6_deEaKeMCWy8G6JayV3IYYLTg4FBwgqrqt9b-Xom72fOQNPnd_Qh8-HIoQt7rd3HZg1ahIUIOuLSiGwzFAVlfgldRhkCypA-6b1Vn-67iksI0JEJHZA8HUMTV6Jk_vGlZjmV4VdsPrqvEIEO6E_hGe422qUdSekC9X_YWqU57GggqB8-42Zg3Rz0gBOHwwerZWRKPcjNezcppzPzw_1nv197J_uunrUDfvA6mND1jv7gd0-MxdhTZg-BznJRrq07O0hm68c5XuKSAroY61mHkrKqq2NdhGHP7RkOv-NcKiqNBQ_khCxFe5YQjUfXWWsfFKjIanZcEK3wSMB_VpF9LLrfjMfN6jDrVEx8EGY/4ph/Cec51267R0uPY2s_0iVVbg/h0/h001.kuKyjLS68cZyYlCS0XhkqnTKlVVEJyb8i700macbHl0) The GOP is even debating cuts to health care _AGAIN_ in order to free up the $200 billion they want to spend on this war with Iran.2 **They’re not even trying to hide their plan. And all the while, Congress STILL refuses to shut down the war. It’s time to clean house.** [Pitch in today: help us vote out these warmongers in Congress and build a different kind of political party — one that fights for health care, not bombs.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9u1A6_deEaKeMCWy8G6JayV3IYYLTg4FBwgqrqt9b-Xom72fOQNPnd_Qh8-HIoQt7J3SHpFOTn7vSOW3NupkImi1p7Cu1_9T0ROwEYSPTHR78VrZ8EJBsoE857MpVikAiG1ppjJQxN1ASB5TQ6YVXnTRyAAsHS2GGXVBgZyb4JvJHfLp9erasGPij3KXPPAPRUia2cF4SstghNDcDkWytjaOUrmzWKtg0uEkblO7pxEAonVxcgRcc50yCInMkudoNkrU0zE-OUyYqVc8har5a4yoEMwL1C1S3EMcTCP47whW605dQuGUs6kqK_yn9ABZx-JHrwtUothI2bpOtp7aK-7COwHOVoNsLx0zv3e1hi_w/4ph/Cec51267R0uPY2s_0iVVbg/h1/h001.us-IzDCTBQxDrDmzLR64SZh3mWBixY3gndobdGHWhGI) **[Donate »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquqxZ_WMtWQ5nsYnjR236T9u1A6_deEaKeMCWy8G6JayV3IYYLTg4FBwgqrqt9b-XoHOUc5rveExkVTq2pLOY9FGVVa_z0P19xO1XUlXLw-hY_Cz6Y47FgwzVJeWB7JZB2tIIYBivOjMyF5MRltkMZzG3GRVEbiGzYfhgHmVZTpdkDuyaDUoTl1BKH1ti9-N7uwiyk4NwRl8xQnBNcNsgV_p6cL9aIJxAoTAiGylb3p9NPiJPxqmF0DCOGB0lSbYj8bOUwoWX8XN0M0PO9UZ_ANu-FwdZ3nz_T0D2JISKTYtxVtt32_2R8CJw_KBQLRb4FftuVv52XWNsPS0Ec9LkTJVpz9kGTET6OwxLd3oK_u6yTr4V6x6MiIE1WOhGXuiHI/4ph/Cec51267R0uPY2s_0iVVbg/h2/h001.9u_PccqIRQbd9fN-IZ_svnpKkkXAKUGBTxpbWiey6BA)** $40 billion has already been spent on Trump and Netanyahu’s disastrous war with Iran since it began on February 28th.3 That money could pay for a YEAR of free school lunch for nearly 30 million children. Or provide Medicaid or Section 8 housing to more than 3 million people.4 Instead, we’re bombing hospitals, schools, and holy sites in a country that’s on the other side of the world. Meanwhile, families at home can barely put food on the table, fill up their cars, cover their electric bills, or pay rent on time. Enough is enough. We can and must do better. clean_body: Trump would rather spend billions on war than help working families in America. | | | Peter, In a press briefing on Wednesday, Trump admitted what we’ve known all along: he’d rather spend billions on regime-change wars than help working families in America.1 The GOP is even debating cuts to health care AGAIN in order to free up the $200 billion they want to spend on this war with Iran.2 They’re not even trying to hide their plan. And all the while, Congress STILL refuses to shut down the war. It’s time to clean house. $40 billion has already been spent on Trump and Netanyahu’s disastrous war with Iran since it began on February 28th.3 That money could pay for a YEAR of free school lunch for nearly 30 million children. Or provide Medicaid or Section 8 housing to more than 3 million people.4 Instead, we’re bombing hospitals, schools, and holy sites in a country that’s on the other side of the world. Meanwhile, families at home can barely put food on the table, fill up their cars, cover their electric bills, or pay rent on time. Enough is enough. We can and must do better. In solidarity, Team WFP Sources: 1\. , NBC News, April 2, 2026 2\. , Axios , March 30, 2026 3\. , April 3, 2026 4\. , Center for American Progress , March 24, 2026 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . name: Ro Khanna
subject: Thank you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
I’m humbled by the overwhelming support our people-powered campaign has received since a handful of tech billionaires recruited someone to challenge me last month.
Thanks to you, we raised over $500,000 from nearly 30,000 grassroots donations, surpassing our first-quarter grassroots fundraising goal.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP50/1/103205/images/NoPAC-ThankYou-2%20%281%29.jpg]
You’re making it possible for us to take on the Epstein class, the billionaires, and corporate interests trying to buy this race. We’re making it clear that we won’t back down.
I don’t take PAC money.
I don’t take corporate money.
I don’t take lobbyist money.
That means I couldn’t do this work without you.
Thank you for your support, your activism, and all that you do. I’m grateful to have you in my corner.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

name: Greisa, United We Dream
subject: The power of neighbors helping neighbors
body:
Your support for the Defending Our Neighbors Fund today will create a lifeline for impacted families. | | | In this moment of deeply alarming attacks on our immigrant neighbors and loved ones, you have shown up for our communities, Peter. Across the country, we’re witnessing the impact of hyper-militarized mass deportation operations, where families are being targeted and torn apart without due process. **We know that the only antidote to these threats is community.** That is why we continue to grow the **Defending Our Neighbors Fund**. Our goal is to ensure that no one has to face an unjust, punishing immigration system on their own. Access to a lawyer can be the absolute difference between whether a family stays together or is separated indefinitely. [**Can you make a donation to the Defending Our Neighbors Fund today? Your support will reach immigrant families and the trusted organizations that are providing legal representation, ensuring that no one has to face this system alone.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzadU9N9RNMkN_aPwx_gUWMyhrdkC01LWf7qDIV-X_SfNT1mpyRhipiKDWZuKh9G2xnm3a8Q_ZTLc3CbCqOIqOOnsZRWBl5Vygub9BDAd4aMXKiEojjrEIqvCBZwbAhC9P8glmC0jvLg0k6oxl8prcfql-DjhBNIvhI9bE87QStiSMxtD-Udc7tvJr71l5NzrSc7A2JXwdjKfhqFO-xJwS9Xb9N2w88vkvPKmG3-IfNQzQ_nMtz3GdEb0wc9OghYt6DgfWaM83ct8WJ_QsBCdAr15kqIki0SUCTt9-vo5fPNWB8FV-4kFV-WjF14_OZVhrwXsl9PTORE0g_-6T_0jCF5zKC7Qx2ddLexCSWQLiGxj7pe48eC6l2F1SrkPh8zmw/4ph/7gxa1nnXRu69T8XQKbexWg/h0/h001.HrmMcpC2bNUAfvIHizyDza16hqbhmUY66KQZxf1B_8g) | | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzadU9N9RNMkN_aPwx_gUWMyhrdkC01LWf7qDIV-X_SfNT1mpyRhipiKDWZuKh9G2xnm3a8Q_ZTLc3CbCqOIqOOnsZRWBl5Vygub9BDAd4aMXKiEojjrEIqvCBZwbAhC9P8glmC0jvLg0k6oxl8prcfql-DjhBNIvhI9bE87QStiSMxtD-Udc7tvJr71l5NzrSc7A2JXwdjKfhqFO-xJwS_BgT8jOfFKa_mxVXwgavg7a0MqJVUARV2pOYnhxjS_Otgj93QH6fOh8vib-KqnU5zyXkXAEQivNZiNbYmbzziF6PhQDHkxkHCsi3x45V5QW3N82lLbVoCW-D_YV10rnALugVJXa74tytmfinerD3NX_26cB8D8iVOTsvseWr2wTw/4ph/7gxa1nnXRu69T8XQKbexWg/h1/h001.76aJ_PlOIsxKlSOdk3sVFfc7REoUX0KOguR98qvWQYU)

The data is clear: legal support makes a profound difference. Over the past five years, **62% of immigrants without a lawyer were deported** , compared to only 27% of those who had legal aid. When a loved one is separated and wrongfully detained, legal support becomes a family’s most urgent need.1
Our community understands the stakes.
_"Because if we don’t have empathy and humanity and we do not love thy neighbor, then we are lost."_
_"I gave because everything I was taught in school about America—the rule of law, due process, fairness, and equal justice for all—is at stake."_
_"I gave because EVERYONE deserves due process."_
[**Peter, this is about neighbors helping neighbors. It’s about making sure our families stay together and ensuring no one faces this system alone. Will you stand with immigrant families by making a contribution today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hWzadU9N9RNMkN_aPwx_gUWMyhrdkC01LWf7qDIV-X_SfNT1mpyRhipiKDWZuKh9G2xnm3a8Q_ZTLc3CbCqOIqOOnsZRWBl5Vygub9BDAd4aMXKiEojjrEIqvCBZwbAhC9P8glmC0jvLg0k6oxl8prcfql-DjhBNIvhI9bE87QStiSMxtD-Udc7tvJr71l5NzrSc7A2JXwdjKfhqFO-xJwS8GTe8dmuQRMjcynqxHPD6umM0uppfob3SjX7evyWdvP2OuLDHq-YH7DN4ApqHDnITjlUJiBbwcy1m7ltQWOA1oEXmESNCqVC2uYyApU57TjVd1lJLqbBqP7x2vuyf_hNaPg4KRy0VFb36T7QuPMEMLO8d9UxU0z3pDv_2U-cSMeA/4ph/7gxa1nnXRu69T8XQKbexWg/h2/h001.XFNP8IQaX7ZQvxKinVjASNkAIvEo011xr_DiwVkerbU)

— Greisa, United We Dream

name: Voting Rights Fund
subject: We Endorse Stacey Travers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Voting Rights Fund and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
| | |
[](http://links.votingrightsfund.org/s/c/-yI0mm2r2yFa3IbUKI-82g1vuhHL8lIC_CkW_0NC25Xoc_vhvY2-yRiYB4OM_XaOnOTDUddDVbBo_69MMgMthRr4QQracAkfakGTvHf0VFWoHzILvcVivNAGvfbYl-nEtpNF9i7Sd62H9lIjjqK6XrasPv9LIfMwd83dgT_1FNazFfHdGsIGlsT8EK-UuyG_zXO9EygosPlgDIqXGMoVFpPc7A_3ETsaA5HpE_Cpv8DTeFD2beWriqw-yz6Ijg5JXRKKehrZ_ujPrsrRhig7U0-PMnQTHYpvvQP8mu8kQp6wNRsuLlozxWXXy4O9cUOMqjUch-6wj5uTItC_R80hne9-tUcfU9StzngJQMPh9eDznq0EJLqOFNUuEuTCm0o6E-NIhf-KGAeihFPvqPxMooTIOb0RvJzhTkkJeYT8Ir-4hyLEjEGNZOYD4cp0aDvNlUdVt08t25slrrJEOOL7SI62inDuPuQTUj-9x-sZpYudxXXDJ0pKIlGWJRE0cqIXe336LqqCHAZ12LcgUZerGS-yyfKRhqO5FI8E_X1DbyzMDZbWyIHvtAo00xWT-6gGw0c5Sh238BEMm7sxogw3IppzhTOf6R1zJsK0PaiC-lvJgdU5eClxe-WeIudU9EdQ7CjvcnNwTJNBnPH80KZJnum4eY7ygKsPbbuWNdCpTutiuaZ6TLHiy9bBYWHVHetEWrCUZ-GhsdBlAP9V6TxdSrdy3l361mShdFpIFOvls6vFjL6OKXtqHijAQ0_xpR8VNeFwQKi2CDvLeuGKr5ZZzsO6v4h92MrTVySdFIY_UwBGmtp9ZkOPrdlCZPRGeBfM--KZYzy4yuUwAXHApzN4qj9rgSrBYM6ebKUZnQHRSABoLzqqeecsU6bUV5rDYIQ-dvju9XjdFNZd5rOZEImd/KDf81FTPhxRpWhOL3dGrRC8InWPJowup/19) Hello, Voting Rights Fund is proud to announce our Arizona primary endorsements for the 2026 midterm elections. At VRF, we identify and support champions of democracy, equipping them with the resources they need to protect voters across the country. **Stacey Travers is a stalwart defender of democracy and champion for voting rights.** She has made accessible voting a public issue commitment and has prime-sponsored automatic voter registration and same-day registration. In addition to her staunch support of voting rights issues, Stacey is a steadfast supporter of education expansion in the state. We at VRF recognize the strong connection between democratic participation and a well-educated public, and Stacey’s commonsense support for improving public education is imperative. Since she began her tenure in the state legislature, Stacey has repeatedly attached her name to bills expanding registration access and lowering procedural barriers. Her consistency in her advocacy speaks to her sincerity as a champion of democracy and voting rights for her constituents. **A three-time endorsed candidate, we are proud to stand behind her and her message to the people of Arizona.** [](http://links.votingrightsfund.org/s/c/T2eYz2QZzkMAhP5iy3poX2Y9SGXKSQ8T0KQ2Q3NZGuYC5PPDk2SQIzBus4-zC-OtPXfOWC6L8-TN3v4UIHLT84vd0TqlJw7kxULcDtefygrx3hMngWk_W5ur7iMbVfQ7oWn6kMP5tt7ulqzmQoLYvv_GfYe5T5EBsLPpbia96ywu5wfXhN3ivMhLUuuuw-qR_vlwbJGtuk9157_iVFEFT-hg7oDjdvrrw3-etvLjp8awwvY5ibjs-qeDUMuk0WraOJWKa-bRlb_JQopGR216py4k9AMtqVAOQumsqeo1gXNCSa5ksnREciGJ3IjN6e29DdSyc742xhKSiYba3GJGIpbA4fi5NHyQ5hdR6UAfKM1Ic2FYTlHgy3KGWMg-FjspFlb8G1d1NZ2kzmiMKjbKu8Crf2wTOIUdYExsmslaNf3GtdmI1xQDSnhXw_tnf3wdpoQ1vNiEVU3KdfB_xMlspIaulQAfR7f9qNYKhk6VcmG6erBzqby2FbKLyfg3b5I9uxYqydEKb0ol8x5O14NaTR6laOHFOnsMacGPPex7so_Th4SvCvCLt8OwQuuhDGNPP6FoFpsShKh1akEizDC-lgRp2prlosCr-WWXZuQduXwdpMqeclEC53hcQDc-QU9xK1DevSasZEwNHNtwbBW6ujlN33JpVSI7kkETAUN-3tK4FVbCLnXWhDLwK7hAyKES9tJT9d-6HPyeFvhhhOkasOFILhemw7pzTWlxZDJjksQTuZFQ97U2RfZMD2m8bkjJGtAxOzdmrqUxhQVSXlkvL1gC9DatsAwVY0zkD7uIoK2b8I8NbX3wmsCkiQAf9wLQewIL2VJLFXLJqjY2ZBd-mtiGORJOdiZtn8An_b9AXXTervqCGgwXFNr_Z1Jme_AyfNx4hnHF7iV0EWmzuV16/Vst47gCi77EvYh-6DLhVl_k-wFpB-WES/19) **From Stacey Herself** _I was born in the birthplace of democracy, Athens, Greece, to a U.S. military father and Greek mother. A family with a history of military service, I served our country proudly as a Russian Intel Op in the U.S. Army. I earned my BS in Geology from U of A. I met my husband John, a small business owner in the UK. Back in the U.S., I became an advocate for homeless and disabled veterans, a cause I am still deeply committed to. I have two girls and love raising them in Arizona, a state that prides itself on fierce independence, love of country, and strong sense of community._ _Strong voting rights are the foundation of a functioning democracy because they ensure that political power reflects the will of the people. When citizens can freely and fairly participate in elections, governments are more likely to be accountable, transparent, and responsive. This legitimacy builds trust in public institutions, which is essential for maintaining social cohesion and political stability._ _Democracy, when supported by broad and equal access to voting, also plays a critical role in shaping economic stability. Policies that emerge from inclusive systems tend to address a wider range of societal needs, from education and infrastructure to labor protections and fair taxation. This reduces inequality and economic volatility, creating a more predictable environment for businesses, workers, and investors._ _Looking ahead, future economic prosperity is closely tied to how well democratic systems protect participation and representation. Societies that empower their citizens politically are better equipped to adapt to economic challenges, invest in innovation, and sustain long-term growth. In this way, safeguarding voting rights is not just a political priority, it is an economic one, deeply connected to shared prosperity and resilience._ **Why Stacey’s Voice is Critical** Arizona’s system of free and fair elections is facing growing, coordinated pressure. In recent weeks, the FBI issued a subpoena for voting records in Maricopa County—another effort chasing claims of fraud that have been repeatedly investigated and disproven. Despite this, the Trump administration continues to amplify false narratives about widespread voter fraud. Now, these efforts are escalating. Donald Trump's executive order directing the creation of a federal voter database under the Department of Homeland Security would likely be used to disenfranchise voters in the future. The order also seeks to further limit access to mail-in and absentee voting by imposing new restrictions and separate eligibility requirements. Taken together, these actions—pushed forward without prior congressional approval and tied to the deeply unpopular SAVE America Act—are rooted in the same baseless claims about election integrity. Rahm Emanuel is back on the national stage, doing a public relations tour, appearing on podcasts, giving interviews, testing the waters for a 2028 presidential run. The usual suspects in the media are already trying to paint him as the reasonable, moderate Democrat who can save his party from its worst excesses and the "fix" America needs.
They point to his tough talk, his fly-fishing hobby, and go out of their way to highlight his occasional criticisms of the far left as proof that he's somehow a "different" Democrat from the Mamdani's and the AOCs.
[| | | | | The Fifth Column 🖐

| 7:37 PM * Mar 31, 2026 * 54.9K Views67 Replies * 329 Reposts * 1.28K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/5cdfdfb1-a34b-4112-8e75-a0c4fb9cd74e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Those of us with longer memories know better
This is the same Rahm Emanuel who served as Barack Obama's White House Chief of Staff -- the man who helped steered his agenda aimed at "fundamentally transforming the United States of America," (and aren't we all just loving that Obamacare? It turns out we really did **["have to pass it to find out what was in it"](https://substack.com/redirect/81781b61-c5bb-4267-b2b0-c19a1c29a974?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**) Emanuel was the ultimate insider, the enforcer, the hatchet man who made sure the Obama machine ran smoothly. **[Chicago and Democrat politics forged him](https://substack.com/redirect/5b63985d-1155-4c9c-8bc7-4a6f4c733821?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** : ruthless, vengeful, and deeply connected to the city's infamous machine.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1359204f-7aae-46a9-a626-f825d54cf95c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

The **[stories](https://substack.com/redirect/0a878f35-f39e-4353-b969-cbb4fa7df9b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** of him mailing a dead fish to someone who annoyed him, screaming at Tony Blair and reciting the names of people who he believed were traitors to the party while stabbing a table with a steak knife during his time in the Clinton White House are not urban legends -- they are emblematic of the man. When Rahm gets angry, he doesn't debate. He destroys.
Now he wants us to believe he's the pragmatic adult in the room? Leopards don't change their spots and radical Democrats do not "mellow out."
* * *
* * *

# [Insane Cards Charging 0% Interest Into 2027 (Some With Welcome Bonuses Up To $250)](https://substack.com/redirect/6be3880a-aabd-4781-958b-9355abe3f8bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6be3880a-aabd-4781-958b-9355abe3f8bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* If you have outstanding credit card debt, getting a new 0% intro APR credit card could help ease the pressure while you pay down your balances.
* Our credit card experts identified top credit cards that are perfect for anyone looking to pay down debt and not add to it!
* Some are even offering generous welcome bonuses up to $250! Click through to see what all the hype is about.
[Get yours now](https://substack.com/redirect/6be3880a-aabd-4781-958b-9355abe3f8bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

* * *
* * *
The **[Politico profile](https://substack.com/redirect/a263b468-3feb-4aa8-8846-9fa912f0e65f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** tries hard to sell the image: a battle-tested moderate pushing back against the worst impulses of his party. But voters in Virginia already know how this story ends. Abigail Spanberger ran as a "moderate," won her seat, and once in office went hard left -- criminalizing lawful gun ownership, pushing to rig election rules under the guise of "fairness," and slapping new taxes on everything that moves. The pattern is depressingly familiar. Democrats campaign as centrists and govern as radicals. Rahm Emanuel is no exception.
## [Virginia should never have elected a CIA spook as Governor](https://substack.com/redirect/d68df59e-cc4e-4a22-86a5-89204be71014?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [The Capitalist](https://substack.com/profile/333697867-the-capitalist)| | *
---|---|---
| Feb 21
[](https://substack.com/redirect/d68df59e-cc4e-4a22-86a5-89204be71014?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication](https://substack.com/redirect/d68df59e-cc4e-4a22-86a5-89204be71014?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/d68df59e-cc4e-4a22-86a5-89204be71014?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Even in the **[sympathetic Politico piece](https://substack.com/redirect/a263b468-3feb-4aa8-8846-9fa912f0e65f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , when pressed on his record as mayor of Chicago, Rahm pivots and tries to deflects in a vain attempt to appear moderate in the face of proof of his actual record.
* * *
_**" As mayor in 2016, Emanuel closed a loophole in the city's human rights ordinance that required people to show a government-issued ID when accessing public accommodations like bathrooms -- which critics argued [discriminated against transgender people](https://substack.com/redirect/c9940947-8573-47a4-9f83-d6a24ee4f197?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). "Can I say it's a problem? I don't know that individually," Emanuel said at the time. "[But] this has been a request of the transgender community, and we're gonna make the changes to reflect our values and to make sure there is no discrimination in the city of Chicago, whether it's washrooms in the city, but also in our schools."**_
_**I asked Emanuel about that about-face.**_
_**" I've always...." he started. "Here's, here's the thing. I mean, just uh, look. As I said before, and I'm gonna say it again, way too much about bathrooms and locker rooms and not enough about classrooms. Now, in 2016, did I deal with bathroom access? Yes, I passed the bill. But I never lost, never took my eye off the ball on reading scores, math scores and graduation rates, and they continue to rise."**_
* * *
The reality is that Emanuel governed as a loyal foot soldier for the hard left when it suited him. He knows how to talk and look reasonable on television, but his instincts and loyalties lie with the same progressive machine that has spent years tearing at the fabric of American life.
Let's be very clear about what a Rahm Emanuel presidency would actually mean because its blindingly obvious. It would be Obama's third term -- slicker, more media-savvy, and far more ruthless. He would happily oversee the Democrats' revenge agenda: expanding government control, institutionalizing identity politics, weakening law enforcement, and continuing the slow erosion of traditional American values while using the power of the state to hound anyone attached to the Trump administration be they in government or supporters. It would make the Biden years and impeachment trials look positively pedestrian.
The moderate mask would last exactly as long as it took to win the election and then the purge would begin.
Voters need to stop falling for the same tired playbook. Democrats are not interested in returning to 1990s Bill Clinton liberalism. They are pro-wealth redistribution, pro-Gaza activism, pro-trans ideology in schools and sports, and willing to say whatever they must to appear moderate long enough to get your vote and then flip the script on you.
Rahm Emanuel is a master of that game. He is a dyed-in-the-wool Obama world operative who understands power, loyalty, and payback. The idea that he would suddenly become a bulwark against the radical left is pure naive bipartisan fantasy of the highest order.
Those of us who remember Chicago politics, the dead fish, the bare-knuckle tactics, and the Obama years are not impressed by the new packaging. We know exactly what kind of leader Rahm Emanuel would be.
It isn't moderate and anyone who tells you otherwise is lying.
* * *

body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1966%2E251025%2E3MIjpY ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1966%2E251025%2E3MIjpY ]Abdul for US Senate

Peter, I got yelled
at in church, and you’ll never guess why.

Let me tell you the story:

A lovely woman came up to me and said, “Abdul, you keep saying the same
stuff.”

I told her, “That’s usually a good thing... right?”

She said, “No! You’ve gotta come up with something new.”

And I thought about it for a second and said, “Well, the same problems are
still here.”

Peter, we’re
still dealing with a healthcare system that makes it way too hard to see a
doctor.

We’re still dealing with an economy where working people are getting
squeezed while corporations rake in record profits.

And we’re still dealing with a political system where billionaires and
corporate PACs get a louder voice than everyone else.

So yeah, I'm not going to stop talking about these issues until we fix
them. But I can't do this without you.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260403-1-ak.p1zmOo&amount=10&refcode=em20260403-1962&t=1004&akid=1966%2E251025%2E3MIjpY ]Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can to support our campaign
and help elect me to the U.S. Senate so I can fight to solve these
problems?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20260403-1-ak.p1zmOo&amount=10&refcode=em20260403-1962&t=1023&akid=1966%2E251025%2E3MIjpY ]Donate $10 ››

Thank you,

Abdul

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: My grandpa and my dad
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
Are you with me?

| | | | | | | | | | | My grandpa served in WWII.

My dad served as an Army Green Beret in the Vietnam War.

I was a Navy Helicopter pilot.

I’m married to a Ret. Navy pilot.

And now, I’m a proud Navy mom, too.

Peter, service isn’t just important to me – _it’s in my blood._

That’s why I decided to find a way to serve after my military career was done. I used my GI benefits to become a Geriatric Nurse Practitioner and take care of the Greatest Generation.

Now, as a Congresswoman, I am still prioritizing care for our veterans. I have never, ever turned my back on my fellow veterans, and they deserve the best care our country has to offer.

_Unfortunately, the values of honor and integrity have gone completely missing in the Democrat Party, and they’re spreading lies that I don’t care about veterans –**Can you believe how low they’ve stooped?**_

My life has been shaped by service to our country, but I need you to have my back here.
---
| | **[Please sign my petition if you trust me to take care of America’s heroes – ones just like my grandpa, my dad, and my husband:](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNDAzX01ZLVhBLjExMDExN190MTg2Mjg4OS0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDQwM19NWS1YQS4xMTAxMTdfdDE4NjI4ODktMjA2OCJ9/zoyuhvEqdyGkeLpdqDhccg)**

---
| | We can’t let Democrats get away with these lies and go unchecked. I’m demanding we hold them accountable and set the record straight – _together_.

Thank you SO much...!

Jen Kiggans

I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America’s success!

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I hope I’ve made you proud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter —
The night I was elected to the U.S. Senate I made a promise to serve with integrity, humility and honor — and to give everything I had to ensure Georgia's interests are represented in the U.S. Senate.
I hope I've made you proud since then, because I am going to need your help as we enter the heart of what will be a very difficult reelection campaign.
Here’s the situation:
Election analysts like _Cook Political Report_ and _Inside Elections_ agree: This race is a “TOSS-UP.” And even though my opponent isn’t set in stone, the polls agree: this race will be decided by just a few percentage points in either direction.
And no matter who ultimately wins the GOP primary, sending another MAGA lackey and Trump loyalist _(which ALL of these guys are)_ to the Senate would be a disaster for Georgia and for our country.
[**So I am asking you to support my reelection campaign by making a contribution — of any amount — today.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260403-1-f&t=1&akid=2009%2E5691347%2Efu7UzI)
You may be thinking it’s too early to donate to a U.S. Senate campaign.
But the truth is no, it is not too early. In fact, early donations to a campaign are more important than a donation at any other time.
These early donations are what allows my team and I to build the strong foundation our campaign needs to win. So please. I wouldn’t ask if it wasn’t truly important, Peter.
[**Can I count on you to make a $5 contribution to my reelection campaign in Georgia? We’ll put your donation to work right away building a campaign and a movement that’s ready to WIN.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-april26.1MDdBw&refcode=em260403-1-f&t=2&akid=2009%2E5691347%2Efu7UzI)

| | Friend, I want to tell you about a race in Georgia that deserves your attention.
Shawn Harris is running for Congress in Northwest Georgia. He's a retired Army Brigadier General, a Marine veteran, a farmer, and someone who came home after decades of service because he believes public service doesn't end when you take off the uniform.
This district has spent years represented by noise instead of leadership -- by spectacle instead of service. And now, for the first time in a long time, there's an opportunity to change that.
[But Shawn needs your help him win the runoff election, which is why I'm reaching out personally. Can I count on you to join me in supporting Shawn by chipping in $5, $10, or more right now? Together, let's bring back real leadership to Northwest Georgia.](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jWOcAaNeGbGsZ2If-Zf0TCkTwEagRoLFCPkE_YLWaTERzzxZrdX5NOyeAFtDT3o_79BV8StmlSCjX_f9WbPdV3tKo3wkklT_iDQbCP4ne6NvNVxWTeNP6Np3xqdG_KJ0D7cQAS_doKJUUN6tfVhvoiMTiNHrXcVV5uo59ZnFYwY2mGO-dLBXB6afiQAPQUE4gepQ7xAVefOjMqxYCdy3wqPdhfaKK7MSGTUgGh6d3aGzUWB1r-IrltvGWw65_AJFl_3J8uTtFfk=&c=tnyoYciEzRy3AYuPZHD0hBjvAx3yBa06q6udF-TTkLe68g7oXTXhkQ==&ch=h8IGdgwHyGq2EybtkAoYfAh5Y7LlCrbfTQS0BzSM7qD2pVt4P1kjMA==)

| | [DONATE OTHER](https://zzejj9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jWOcAaNeGbGsZ2If-Zf0TCkTwEagRoLFCPkE_YLWaTERzzxZrdX5NOyeAFtDT3o_PKjdZMEY3OFxBR_pW3yHWOmeGJWdpKuBjGNcWgYUU9RS3bsRI90lxMf_piXlfetsXNmuILAlQzPMD_qWBU86t64Q2HyQYD5_ma4ot4r4s08Mm_uqo_i5y00ptTUm_iHaPLEM9ObIGkgTImakDEQ8c6uU0xFTxECVyDvaC7VLKcR98TdQM52FCg==&c=tnyoYciEzRy3AYuPZHD0hBjvAx3yBa06q6udF-TTkLe68g7oXTXhkQ==&ch=h8IGdgwHyGq2EybtkAoYfAh5Y7LlCrbfTQS0BzSM7qD2pVt4P1kjMA==)
---
| |
Shawn grew up on a Georgia farm. He enlisted after high school. He led troops in combat, served during the Ebola crisis, and spent a lifetime carrying responsibility for others.
When that chapter ended, he didn't chase television cameras -- he came home to raise cattle, support his community, and listen to his neighbors.
What he hears every day is familiar across America: veterans struggling to get care, families squeezed by rising costs, rural communities feeling ignored, and people who work hard but don't feel like anyone in Washington is working for them.
Shawn is running to change that and to bring steadiness, decency, and real problem-solving back to Congress.
That's why I'm asking you to help Shawn Harris today.
[If you believe Congress should be a place for serious people doing serious work -- and that leadership should look like service, not performance -- please consider making a contribution right now. clean_body: | | | | If you believe you've received this email in error, you may unsubscribe below. | | | | | | | | == | | Friend, I want to tell you about a race in Georgia that deserves your attention. Shawn Harris is running for Congress in Northwest Georgia. He's a retired Army Brigadier General, a Marine veteran, a farmer, and someone who came home after decades of service because he believes public service doesn't end when you take off the uniform. This district has spent years represented by noise instead of leadership -- by spectacle instead of service. And now, for the first time in a long time, there's an opportunity to change that. == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | Shawn grew up on a Georgia farm. He enlisted after high school. He led troops in combat, served during the Ebola crisis, and spent a lifetime carrying responsibility for others. When that chapter ended, he didn't chase television cameras -- he came home to raise cattle, support his community, and listen to his neighbors. What he hears every day is familiar across America: veterans struggling to get care, families squeezed by rising costs, rural communities feeling ignored, and people who work hard but don't feel like anyone in Washington is working for them. Shawn is running to change that and to bring steadiness, decency, and real problem-solving back to Congress. That's why I'm asking you to help Shawn Harris today. == | | == | == | == | == Thank you, Pete Buttigieg | | == | SHAWN FOR GEORGIA | P.O. Box 1688 | Cedartown, GA 30125 US | | | | | |

name: Mary Peltola
subject: Mukluk telegraph

|

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128716685/612135927/-951542880?refcode=WUEFHP06_20260403_PeltolaSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1058252&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzBhOGE2Yy04NjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOiR_acv73Y0RKKuj3sXNEhv8Z3TeoelTNQ-WhbHtJA=) Peter — Here’s my plan for how we win this election:

This is a ground game. This is person-to-person, human-to-human, mukluk telegraph.

For those in the Lower 48, mukluk telegraph is a saying we have in the Bush that basically amounts to gossip.

It’s passing along a message through our conversations with one another,_which is the only way information can really spread in some parts of the Last Frontier!_

In a state as vast and rural as ours, there really is no other way to reach every Alaskan. That’s why it’s so important for us to travel to their communities and have those person-to-person conversations.

There are over 585,000 square miles in this state — bigger than Texas, California, and Montana combined. And we’re going to criss-cross it in its entirety.

But to be honest with you, reaching every community will be expensive.

More than 80% of our communities can only be reached by plane, boat or snow machine. And when we are able to drive, gas up here costs much more than it does in most of the Lower 48!

But we don’t have another option. I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for all Alaskans, and I’m committed to bringing every borough into this fight with me.

That’s why I’m asking for your support today. We need to take our message across Alaska, and we can’t do it without your help. [**So if you’re with me, please split a donation today between EMILYs List and my campaign for U.S. Senate in Alaska. No matter how much you’re able to contribute, every donation counts because it all adds up when we chip in together.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128716686/612135928/-951542880?refcode=WUEFHP06_20260403_PeltolaSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1058252&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzBhOGE2Yy04NjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOiR_acv73Y0RKKuj3sXNEhv8Z3TeoelTNQ-WhbHtJA=) | [DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128716687/612135929/-951542880?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFHP06_20260403_PeltolaSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1058252&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzBhOGE2Yy04NjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOiR_acv73Y0RKKuj3sXNEhv8Z3TeoelTNQ-WhbHtJA=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128716688/612135930/-951542880?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFHP06_20260403_PeltolaSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1058252&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzBhOGE2Yy04NjJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iOiR_acv73Y0RKKuj3sXNEhv8Z3TeoelTNQ-WhbHtJA=)

clean_body: | = Peter — Here’s my plan for how we win this election: This is a ground game. This is person-to-person, human-to-human, mukluk telegraph. For those in the Lower 48, mukluk telegraph is a saying we have in the Bush that basically amounts to gossip. It’s passing along a message through our conversations with one another,which is the only way information can really spread in some parts of the Last Frontier! In a state as vast and rural as ours, there really is no other way to reach every Alaskan. That’s why it’s so important for us to travel to their communities and have those person-to-person conversations. There are over 585,000 square miles in this state — bigger than Texas, California, and Montana combined. And we’re going to criss-cross it in its entirety. But to be honest with you, reaching every community will be expensive. More than 80% of our communities can only be reached by plane, boat or snow machine. And when we are able to drive, gas up here costs much more than it does in most of the Lower 48! But we don’t have another option. I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for all Alaskans, and I’m committed to bringing every borough into this fight with me. That’s why I’m asking for your support today. We need to take our message across Alaska, and we can’t do it without your help. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I’m so grateful for your support. Together, we’re going to win this! Thanks so much, Mary | = | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Inbox overcrowded? Sign up to get less email . We'd hate to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving all email, unsubscribe . Have a question? Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Four districts. One ask.
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260403-2113-foote&t=1001&akid=2113%2E342411%2ETKdOGU ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

FOUR seats to defend. FOUR leaders to power. FOUR districts counting on
progressive change.

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida are on the front lines every day —
championing bold ideas to fight for our communities and drive economic,
social, and racial justice.

They’re working to create a government that puts working people first
rather than powerful interests.

But standing up to entrenched power isn’t easy. Bold leadership comes with
challenges, but our movement knows what this moment demands.

That’s why we’re asking you to step up with YOUR four,
Peter.

Every dollar raised from this grassroots team fuels the work that powers
this movement. From organizing communities on the ground to reaching
voters directly, your support makes sure our leaders can keep delivering
real results for the people they serve. The Squad doesn’t take corporate
PAC money — because their fight is for working people, not wealthy
insiders.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260403-movement.TPYfm8&refcode=em20260403-2113&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=2113%2E342411%2ETKdOGU ]Whether it’s $4, $14, or $40, your contribution today helps protect
these four seats, support our four leaders, and fight for our districts
that deserve fearless, accountable leadership. So, will you chip in $4 or
more today to help keep this movement going?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260403-movement.TPYfm8&refcode=em20260403-2113&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=2113%2E342411%2ETKdOGU ]Contribute ››

Thanks for stepping up,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2113%2E342411%2ETKdOGU

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Sue AnderBois
subject: Thank you — and a quick April update🌍
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of AnderBois
body:
| |
---
|
---
Hi friends, I just wanted to say thank you.

Whether you’ve donated to help us reach voters and stock our campaign office, shared an email, came to an event, or simply stayed engaged reading these emails this quarter, it truly means a lot to me. This campaign is powered by people like you, and I’m so grateful to be building it together.

If you didn’t get a chance to give before the deadline but are able to now, we could still really use the support as we expand the campaign and keep this momentum going: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/anderbois_email#chip-in](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqv4_gAZ_PeyVWOO5HP-pHiWEYVNGT2hiz1pI6XNR1JV3oH3i2tWavnSfIW8lWN2_a_iNXhdK_BMJN70_Me1wJlDNbM4bh7BMxHGAmxd4t2ckAssi9txPkgQVUehXtU12VGdwpwNVG0EZS9KD00kXBuN0qFtpTMqR1TeiufqoyrOuB9X4tZqqz5NXIMYb26F2xd-_14Hx89DkHf4GBzH202ycRrzRfSK3wv2GMFKGI8zoWLZNgnnmGRUjsC9_LBvfFm7OI-XfDGg_Gj1V25NV9CsRC32SCk4Z7RuT8sMmpr_Makl0B1Qv02w1hCOXfEyQilXQE1jERciEBVsjTZpNO_52jw9lQitIO8zcMiaFGZ3NXPxNEFpkXw_2mlqwhjyGZM/4ph/sYwLfdjHTA280ZRKSnQ5FQ/h0/h001.zwm6E_DOg6N3RR2P51OOwi2iPhkUGaXlTS-qOmwWERA)**

I also wanted to share that we’re heading into Earth Month — something that’s always been close to my heart. In fact, a few days ago, I held a Town Hall with CARI. Here’s how it went: CARI’s President named me the only real climate champion running for statewide election in RI, I addressed one of my top issues: our state’s energy struggles with utilities, and I shared my vision for what we can achieve on Climate in RI and why we don't have a moment to waste.

| |
---

|
---

This campaign is grounded in building a more sustainable, resilient Rhode Island that works for all of us, and I’m excited to share more in the weeks ahead about what we can do to get there.

Thank you again for being part of this.

With gratitude,

Sue
| Join Sue's journey to build a government that isn’t afraid to take on big challenges, that has your back, and will take responsibility for fixing things that are broken.

name: Tommy Tuberville
subject: This is bigger than politics
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
body:
Faith. Family. Freedom. | [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=343fb6bffcbc4b41ae9ce3651bb77888&_e=5OM-hHKOkNGdYdjVpLQGnP6qr3NZfhybJlbteAOz2Y04hzrres-FFCL198QXK2w3XniCPjyqlfi9adQIvQ3suYnkR5zJyE3bWPNLA1Mbjy0QZ5W0URXkzCHpdVEm6prBsDtMBXPRxXxwny6qmhopm8gumCFUrLjYhngFYjk9ecTlSo_mSCGIYG-4U53aIG7K8Lj4d_XPp7s5ycN_Sn4A-IDo48hv5SqXElvCncNOf7M6hT9oEVUZXx07FSS_1h6B3PH-QVliqEh8aIALtsj5S3wgbwYLzmIbKdx9-eNPHN8INFpuoy2L_ghcPK-TK1Tf_3XVCFZRC98ZYnYOEWJF6JqE-WRFGuhdrjaJmhGosuU%3D)
---

Peter,

Easter has always meant something deeper to me.

It’s not about politics. It’s not about headlines.

**It’s about faith.**

I’ve leaned on my faith my entire life—long before Washington, long before the spotlight. Back when I was coaching, there were moments you just couldn’t fake your way through.

_Tough losses.
Injuries.
Young men searching for direction._

And more often than not, what grounded us wasn’t a playbook.

**It was faith.**

We had chaplains around our teams. We bowed our heads before games. Not because anyone forced it, but because we knew something bigger than football was at work.

That mattered.

_It gave players purpose.
It built character.
It reminded us who we are and what we stand for._

And I’ll be honest, I think we’ve lost some of that in this country.

**We’ve pushed faith out of places it used to live naturally. Schools. Locker rooms. Public life.**

Not because people stopped believing, but because they were told to keep quiet.

I don’t agree with that.

**Faith isn’t something to hide. It’s something that shapes you—how you treat people, how you lead, how you handle success and failure.**

Easter is a reminder of that.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=343fb6bffcbc4b41ae9ce3651bb77888&_e=5OM-hHKOkNGdYdjVpLQGnP6qr3NZfhybJlbteAOz2Y04hzrres-FFCL198QXK2w3XniCPjyqlfi9adQIvQ3suRDuxsSEMR70fbQWjFHkeObQOepMt7Bse2_LHIECS8Sc83g0pJFHrJtrQwMBKZjOnwKmcxmO8aeBvrHWqEl2ZcfYYaikGpXWS_yaMa12x8-HJJg4lUi6qHTLKd5UR6YTUjDkdQFCjck08xNhazKII4iUVRc_DWV9ioIDgzZy4rbdZmZ9Yf5ssQGF978r9fvvYpzA9Rz_RlM23V8NcWnlXBesJLnTx6rg4LIER3JZ8OcKGU-1xMksfIdxgk1LUrFgxhDv8gRDD3BU1YqO6LEOHAY%3D)
_It’s a reminder of sacrifice.
Of hope.
Of second chances._

And no matter what’s going on in the world, those things still matter.

They always will.

**I hope you take a moment this Easter to slow down, spend time with your family, and reflect on what really matters.**

Because at the end of the day, that’s what carries us through.

God Bless,
Tommy Tuberville

| PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC
PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243

---

name: VoteVets.org
subject: They Said Iran Was Finished. Now an F-15 Is Down.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
#
The administration says the war in Iran is "nearing completion." The wreckage of an American F-15E says otherwise.
Right now, a high-stakes Combat Search and Rescue mission is underway in hostile skies, putting even more airmen at risk to save their own.
[**Gen. Paul Eaton (Ret.) breaks down the USAF "two-hour window," the vulnerability of our rescue helicopters, and the dangerous gap between what we're being told and what’s actually happening on the ground.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/19756?triedRedirect=true%3Frefcode%3Dem260403-2-120&t=1&akid=35059%2E3013755%2EXuLdB1)
| [READ MORE](https://act.votevets.org/go/19756?triedRedirect=true%3Frefcode%3Dem260403-2-120&t=2&akid=35059%2E3013755%2EXuLdB1)
---
With Trump and Hegseth in charge, the newscycle about their blunders can be hard to follow. If you're looking for a reliable source of information right now, VoteVets is here for you on Substack.
We have been publishing articles on Substack about this war for a couple of months now, and we're going to keep going as long as we need to.
[**If you’d like to hear more updates from us on this conflict and the Trump administration from Veterans' points of view, use this link and read on.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/19756?triedRedirect=true%3Frefcode%3Dem260403-2-120&t=3&akid=35059%2E3013755%2EXuLdB1)
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Big update, Peter!

Last week at the Denver Assembly — where local Democratic Party members
gather to select candidates for the primary election ballot — Justice
Democrats challenger Melat Kiros won an astounding 67 percent of the vote,
while the corporate-backed incumbent just barely made the ballot!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260403-mk.0M6cCd&refcode=em20260403-37638&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=37638%2E1203867%2E2Lkqhk ]Tweet from @eluning: 'BREAKING: 15-term Democratic Rep. Diana DeGette
makes #CO01 primary by skin of her teeth, with 32.8% of the delegate vote
to challenger Melat Kiros's 67.2z5 (needs 30% at assembly) #copolitics'

In a close call, 29-year Rep. Diana DeGette was just 7 votes away from not
even making it onto the ballot for this June’s Democratic primary election
— she cleared the 30 percent threshold by the skin of her teeth.

Meanwhile, Melat, a progressive first-time candidate, won 2x the votes and
will be at the top of the ticket for Colorado’s 10th Congressional
District on June 30!

This is a clear sign that Melat has the momentum to win, but she’s
counting on grassroots support from folks like you to get her over the
finish line in 3 months.

Like Melat said, "Every advance this party has ever made was because
someone was willing to push past what was settled, safe, and familiar."

Let’s give it our all to elect a progressive champion for working people
who will do just that in Congress.

— Justice Democrats

name: Can I vote?
subject: MAGA election meddling causing mass confusion among key voters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE
body:
Chaos, confusion, and fear is the MAGA plan to hijack elections. Education and information are the antidote.
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nThBLk3IQBsaCgXD6DkVdTsUjYB9KK3QZnRbJhpSosfi6fYlmaHhhHB9W3909YxdDrWQREKM-Rs2a_l9OFn9K7Gysd3pDNdVpSudhn_ubt5qHnPLnaLcE2YJbYd_na_r4gZpBD7Lovv_Hjsw74F6rL0_VTDbeu6Y0H0nXQ8mK01jT9V3ZLQGwQmTo53aDXAp6ZXnuXuoy2P1kkZXiGspnXf-35pa_9WZVzfQcMgBzNs=&c=Lp5gpFlz3Hao16Aub_tKIE1JP9stk6vfgUun0tUvgFtoFs_WSkbPgA==&ch=xP3ZSZp6vLACFGjaVY0bNjgHc9ashSQbXckVtQkY8mF3qgX41gnV2Q==)
---
|
Peter,
It's only April and voters are already confused about what they need to vote.
We know this because Defend Our Courts is talking directly with thousands of Wisconsin voters ahead of the April 7 Supreme Court election.
And one issue keeps coming up again and again:
"Do I still qualify to vote?"
That confusion isn't an accident.

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nThBLk3IQBsaCgXD6DkVdTsUjYB9KK3QZnRbJhpSosfi6fYlmaHhhHB9W3909YxdDrWQREKM-Rs2a_l9OFn9K7Gysd3pDNdVpSudhn_ubt5qHnPLnaLcE2YJbYd_na_r4gZpBD7Lovv_Hjsw74F6rL0_VTDbeu6Y0H0nXQ8mK01jT9V3ZLQGwQmTo53aDXAp6ZXnuXuoy2P1kkZXiGspnfNDn_OIFJjtMBV7olSfwQU=&c=Lp5gpFlz3Hao16Aub_tKIE1JP9stk6vfgUun0tUvgFtoFs_WSkbPgA==&ch=xP3ZSZp6vLACFGjaVY0bNjgHc9ashSQbXckVtQkY8mF3qgX41gnV2Q==)
---

For months, the Trump Administration and its allies have been flooding the zone with proposals and threats designed to blur the rules and scare voters:

* A federal takeover of elections

* Strict new ID and citizenship requirements under the SAVE Act

* A national voter eligibility database controlled by the federal government

Whether these policies pass or not, they're already achieving their goal: Chaos. Confusion. Fear.
And when voters are confused, turnout drops:

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nThBLk3IQBsaCgXD6DkVdTsUjYB9KK3QZnRbJhpSosfi6fYlmaHhhHB9W3909YxdDrWQREKM-Rs2a_l9OFn9K7Gysd3pDNdVpSudhn_ubt5qHnPLnaLcE2YJbYd_na_r4gZpBD7Lovv_Hjsw74F6rL0_VTDbeu6Y0H0nXQ8mK01jT9V3ZLQGwQmTo53aDXAp6ZXnuXuoy2P1kkZXiGspnTHCKNTxmvV-JoJi2sz-sLE=&c=Lp5gpFlz3Hao16Aub_tKIE1JP9stk6vfgUun0tUvgFtoFs_WSkbPgA==&ch=xP3ZSZp6vLACFGjaVY0bNjgHc9ashSQbXckVtQkY8mF3qgX41gnV2Q==)
---

This is how elections get rigged without changing a single vote. Even in Wisconsin, where strict voter ID laws have been in place for years, voters are now questioning whether they'll be allowed to cast a ballot.
That is exactly what MAGA wants.
Defend Our Courts is cutting through the confusion--educating voters, answering questions, and making sure people understand what's at stake in this election.
But with only 4 days to go, time is running out.
There are still tens of thousands of voters we need to reach before Election Day--voters who are confused, uncertain, and at risk of staying home. That's where you come in:
[Can you chip in $50, $25, or whatever you can spare to help us cut through the chaos, educate voters, and secure a pro-democracy majority in Wisconsin through 2030? Every dollar helps us reach more voters before it's too late.](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001nThBLk3IQBsaCgXD6DkVdTsUjYB9KK3QZnRbJhpSosfi6fYlmaHhhHB9W3909YxdVxbIh4q_0zof_mdxmsuqfWj0Q9mQ8lt1S2Tyss4LuM7g0hofRN4EdsH3ocgoR6ZCJEWyIhj3TC0laOTPmwwCgnmh-DPwbd0OTYnSm2IC7_3oO_Tj9CqShIP0ujz06Uc8rEKDDE2IypVuBshvgSE7BWgfCMc5QejrpQ130zDxTnEeie_trupGvfu05JvtTlII&c=Lp5gpFlz3Hao16Aub_tKIE1JP9stk6vfgUun0tUvgFtoFs_WSkbPgA==&ch=xP3ZSZp6vLACFGjaVY0bNjgHc9ashSQbXckVtQkY8mF3qgX41gnV2Q==)

clean_body: Chaos, confusion, and fear is the MAGA plan to hijack elections. Education and information are the antidote. | | | | | == | Peter, It's only April and voters are already confused about what they need to vote. We know this because Defend Our Courts is talking directly with thousands of Wisconsin voters ahead of the April 7 Supreme Court election. And one issue keeps coming up again and again: "Do I still qualify to vote?" That confusion isn't an accident. | == For months, the Trump Administration and its allies have been flooding the zone with proposals and threats designed to blur the rules and scare voters: A federal takeover of elections Strict new ID and citizenship requirements under the SAVE Act * A national voter eligibility database controlled by the federal government Whether these policies pass or not, they're already achieving their goal: Chaos. Confusion. Fear. And when voters are confused, turnout drops: | == This is how elections get rigged without changing a single vote. Even in Wisconsin, where strict voter ID laws have been in place for years, voters are now questioning whether they'll be allowed to cast a ballot. That is exactly what MAGA wants. Defend Our Courts is cutting through the confusion--educating voters, answering questions, and making sure people understand what's at stake in this election. But with only 4 days to go, time is running out. There are still tens of thousands of voters we need to reach before Election Day--voters who are confused, uncertain, and at risk of staying home. That's where you come in: == | | | == | == | == | | | == | == | == | | | | == | MAGA is counting on confusion to win. Let's make sure they're wrong. -- Team Defend Our Courts | | | | | | | | | | == | | | | | == | | | | Mail checks to: | | | | Defend Our CourtsP.O. Box 45569 Philadelphia, PA 19149 US | | | | | PAID FOR BY DEFEND OUR COURTS, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE.

Don't Let Her Skip Testifying About Epsteain!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f038a61-ec1b-43fa-867c-b3f3604986f6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Attorney General Pam Bondi has been subpoenaed to testify before Congress about the Epstein affair, including the Justice Department’s handling of documents related to it. And she indicated she would do it (maybe), but does not want to do it under oath. Are you ****ing kidding me? If she is not under oath, she can pretty much make up whatever nonsense she wants to. But lies to Congress under oath can result in criminal charges, and jail time. Trump and his entire administration tell more lies each day than all the previous presidents did combined. Bondi’s behavior with the Epstein files has been absolutely atrocious, and a nonstop source of pure, 24-karat BS. If she is not under oath, the odds of us getting the full story are essentially zero. She must testify under oath, like real human beings do on a regular basis. Congress must demand this. **[Add your name: “Demand Pam Bondi Testify Under Oath.”](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8695d12-8df5-4f8e-baad-4a89269fd12f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

body:
This isn't how it's supposed to work| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128719559/612141961/-569431239?refcode=260403em-save-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExODZiYy04ODJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW2KCOEcfx2AEhx0Tc54EXWJcnAwDddH0P-Phjvf6f0=)

| | Our democracy is under threat — and we can’t stay silent. **President Donald Trump and his allies are pushing the SAVE Act and other efforts designed to make it harder and more expensive for eligible Americans to vote.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128719560/612141962/-569431239?refcode=260403em-save-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExODZiYy04ODJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW2KCOEcfx2AEhx0Tc54EXWJcnAwDddH0P-Phjvf6f0=)
---
They’re attacking election workers. Spreading disinformation and lies. And trying to undermine trust in the very system that gives people a voice. **That’s not how democracy works.** As someone who’s spent years protecting the integrity of our public institutions, I believe we have a responsibility to speak out — loudly and clearly — against these attacks. **[So today, I’m asking you to add your name: Sign the petition to demand Congress reject the SAVE Act and protect free, fair, and accessible elections for every American.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128719561/612141963/-1452706978?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExODZiYy04ODJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW2KCOEcfx2AEhx0Tc54EXWJcnAwDddH0P-Phjvf6f0=&emci=23e138c4-772f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=82a186bc-882f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=30662126)**
---
[ **ADD YOUR NAME** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128719562/612141964/-1452706978?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExODZiYy04ODJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW2KCOEcfx2AEhx0Tc54EXWJcnAwDddH0P-Phjvf6f0=&emci=23e138c4-772f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=82a186bc-882f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=30662126)
---
**We need to send a message that voters — not politicians — should decide elections.** That our democracy belongs to all of us. And that we won’t stand by while anyone, no matter how powerful, tries to take that away. **[Will you stand with me? Add your name now and let’s get to work defending our democracy when it matters most.>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128719563/612141965/-1452706978?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzI2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MmExODZiYy04ODJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YW2KCOEcfx2AEhx0Tc54EXWJcnAwDddH0P-Phjvf6f0=&emci=23e138c4-772f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=82a186bc-882f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=30662126)** Thank you, Tobias Read

Something historic just happened, friends: In a race against 17 Republican candidates to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene, our campaign finished first and forced a runoff against Donald Trump’s endorsed Republican. Political analysts were stunned. National media started paying attention. Democrats across the country celebrated. But now...I’m staring at our fundraising numbers and honestly... _I’m confused._ Donations have slowed to a trickle. **_Meanwhile, Trump’s allies are already pouring money into this race to stop us before the April 7 runoff._** Did people stop paying attention? Do people think the hard part is over? Do people think someone else will step up? Republicans are unifying behind one candidate. MAGA money is coming in fast. And if we fall behind right now, we could lose all the momentum we just built. [I need grassroots supporters to step up immediately. Can you chip in $5 or anything you can right now, split between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia, to help us keep up with the flood of MAGA money coming into this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128719830/612142693/-446851852?amount=5&source=DPG_EM_FR_040326_B1_HARRISSPLIT&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjA3NTE0ZC04OTJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AIFqhAlSV0neCeYso-gSo5cck9YgoPXlHbZ7c62RGp0=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately to Shawn Harris and the Democratic Party of Georgia:_

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: "Trump is mentally unfit and must be removed now!"
body:
For the safety of our nation and its people, he needs to go NOW
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Trump's Speech Showed Why He is Not Mentally Fit to Be President](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7cac4433-2b4b-463e-a87c-0081fea20f2a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td9356e47-eb72-4e6b-9f1d-5553493c861c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | **[He’s getting worse, and he needs to be removed from office](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0adf2d96-7f18-4abb-bd92-dde077be3a62/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9).** We’ve seen evidence before, of course, but this wasn’t just “Trump being Trump,” this took it to a whole new level. He rambled and contradicted himself over and over again, seemingly unaware of what he had just said. He did not look well, physically or mentally. And yet there he was, threatening to use nuclear weapons, detached from reality, and one button push away from starting WW 3. The nation is scared, the world is scared, and he must be removed by any legal means ASAP. Yes, it’s going to be hard. But the alternative could be a hell of a lot worse. **[Add your name: “Trump’s speech showed he is not mentally fit to be president, and he must be removed NOW.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc40be9f9-6813-4007-9b08-1a80d697f483/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

name: Matthew Davis, LCV
subject: TAKE ACTION: Demand protection from chemical disasters
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTM2MDgzMjES1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjQ0MDAzMzEyNgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Tell EPA Administrator Zeldin:
Protect People From Chemical Disasters

The Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) is once again putting corporate profit
before the health and safety of people and the environment. Now, the EPA is
trying to gut the Safer Communities by Chemical Accidents Prevention (Safer
Communities) rule, also known as the Risk Management Program rule, which
protects workers and communities from extremely hazardous chemicals and chemical
disasters.

This rollback would endanger over 177 million people who live near and work in
facilities such as chemical plants and oil refineries, and inevitably lead to
more illness and death caused by chemical disasters. Tell EPA Administrator
Zeldin to do his job, protect people, and uphold the current Safer Communities
rule.

Tell Zeldin: Don’t gut the Safer Communities rule! https://links.messages.lcv. ADD YOUR NAME https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrBzjY_~ Peter, The Trump administration’s EPA continues to neglect its duty to protect people
and the environment. Now, the EPA is proposing to eliminate key safety
protections of the Safer Communities rule, which would endanger over 177 million
people who live near and work in facilities using extremely hazardous chemicals. Tell EPA Administrator Zeldin: We need Safer Communities, not rollbacks! https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/bxyvTVNLZ- This EPA proposal would first and foremost endanger workers on the job, who are
the first line of defense against a chemical disaster. It would end or weaken
protections from chemical fires, explosions, and other dangers, and would take
away solutions that are needed to help save lives, prevent injuries, and protect
families and children from toxic chemical exposure in their communities.
Weakening the Safer Communities rule will inevitably lead to more illness and
death caused by chemical disasters, and as such is opposed by a broad coalition
of labor, health, and environmental justice organizations. Trump and Zeldin’s new proposal would eliminate: Worker safety protections, such as stop work authority, anonymous reporting of hazards and non-compliance, and workers’ rights trainings. Safer technologies assessment for highly hazardous facilities, which identifies opportunities for reducing risk by substituting a safer chemical or technology in place of a more hazardous one. Specific requirements to assess weather hazards such as flooding, hurricanes, and wildfires, which can cause or worsen accidental chemical releases. Community emergency response notification requirements, which alert communities about emergencies and partner with local responders to ensure notifications are available in the primary language of all nearby communities. Transparency and information availability requirements, including requiring facilities make it public when they decline to implement safety recommendations, sharing facility information in locally spoken languages, and allowing the public to use a previously available mapping tool to determine what facilities are in their area. Add your name and demand EPA Administrator Zeldin stop prioritizing corporate profits over the health of people and our planet. https://links.messages.lcv. Thank you for taking action with LCV. Matthew Davis
Vice President of Federal Policy
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13608321&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQ0MDAzMzEyNgS2&spReportId=MjQ0MDAzMzEyNgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13608321&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQ0MDAzMzEyNgS2&spReportId=MjQ0MDAzMzEyNgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/7RYwsXR7-
