name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: We made history this weekend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Seattle took to the streets this weekend along with millions across the country, and the collective resistance I saw was incredible.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260403-6092-footer&t=1&akid=6092%2E420207%2EDpgIoi)
**8 million, Peter.**
8 million voices. All 50 states. One movement pushing back against an authoritarian agenda.
**I’ve been organizing for over 20 years now, and I know what real people power looks like. This is it.**
Movements that grow with the strength and grassroots energy like this one don’t just stop. They build, and build, and build. And then they channel that energy into organizing, and into the kind of people power that makes waves and secures wins for working people.
Believe me — this isn’t what Trump and the billionaires wanted.
They would have us believe that our collective nonviolent resistance is pointless and ineffective. That our determination is no match for their money.
But you and I know better.
We know that hope is only as strong as the people willing to act on it, and this past Saturday, millions proved that _we are those people._
And we proved something else important: this movement isn’t losing steam. It’s gaining momentum._
Momentum means everything as we fight back against Trump’s dangerous authoritarian agenda and build towards flipping the House this November. It’s the fuel that keeps us going.
[**If you’re with me, will you pitch in $3 to help keep up the momentum in the fight for our democracy? Your support is what makes all this possible. The organizing, the resistance, and needed wins in the tough fights ahead.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260403.UR9N4o&refcode=em20260403-6092&amount=3&t=2&akid=6092%2E420207%2EDpgIoi)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260403.UR9N4o&amount=3&refcode=em20260403-6092&t=21&akid=6092%2E420207%2EDpgIoi)**
The march was this weekend. The movement is _always_. Let’s keep it going.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260403-6092-footer&t=22&refcode2=6092_420207_DpgIoi&akid=6092%2E420207%2EDpgIoi)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Democratic governors are the guardrails
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:
[ stdin# ]Jocelyn Benson for Governor
Last week, I went on MS NOW with Ali Velshi to discuss the SAVE Act, a
Republican-proposed bill that would make it harder for millions of
Americans to vote.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3875?t=1001&akid=1580%2E181023%2EwqBZck ][IMG]

Right now, Trump is pressuring Congress to pass this bill before the
midterm elections. He knows he’s underwater, and now he’s trying to
subvert our elections to save himself.

But governors are the guardrails against these election deniers who want
to rip away our access to the ballot box. While Republican governors are
bending their knees to Trump, Democratic governors can fight these
policies in our state courts, our federal courts, and enact policies to
protect against a lot of the overreach and abuse of power that they’re
trying to enact at the federal level.

That’s why electing Democratic governors in battleground states, like
Michigan, has never been more important.

I’ve stood up for Michigan citizens as Secretary of State, and I’ll stand
up to anyone — even the President — to protect your voices and votes as
governor.

But I can’t do it alone. This governor’s race is one of the only toss-up
races in the country, and the polls show I’m in a dead heat with my
Republican opponent.

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3875?t=1002&akid=1580%2E181023%2EwqBZck ]If you’re ready to keep the governor’s office blue and elect a proven
fighter for our democracy and our elections, I hope you’ll make a
contribution to our campaign today:

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3876?t=1003&akid=1580%2E181023%2EwqBZck ]Donate $5 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3877?t=1004&akid=1580%2E181023%2EwqBZck ]Donate $25 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3878?t=1005&akid=1580%2E181023%2EwqBZck ]Donate $50 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3879?t=1006&akid=1580%2E181023%2EwqBZck ]Donate $100 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3880?t=1007&akid=1580%2E181023%2EwqBZck ]Donate $250 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/3881?t=1008&akid=1580%2E181023%2EwqBZck ]Other →

Thank you,

Jocelyn Benson

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.

name: Chris Pappas
subject: April 3, 2025
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
One year ago today, I launched this campaign for the U.S. Senate.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=5933%2E582294%2EpmM540)
Team, it's Chris Pappas.
**One year ago today, I launched this campaign for the U.S. Senate.**
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260403_1.ZGt4HN&refcode=em20260403-1&t=2&akid=5933%2E582294%2EpmM540)
Since that day we’ve been building something incredible here in New Hampshire.
We’ve traveled across the Granite State, had thousands of conversations, and grown a grassroots team that’s showing up every day to do the hard work necessary to win.
I’m proud of what we’ve built together, but this race is more about just us.
My opponent John Sununu has aligned himself with Donald Trump and has made it clear that he will rubber stamp Trump’s disastrous agenda.
**Granite Staters deserve better.** I’m running to stand up for working families, lower costs, protect fundamental freedoms, and put New Hampshire first — not corporate special interests and billionaires.
But right now this race is virtually tied, and national Republicans see New Hampshire as one of their top pickup opportunities.
**[So as we reflect on the past year on this campaign and look ahead to November, I have to ask: Will you chip in $5 — or whatever you’re able to contribute today — to help us keep building this campaign and win?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260403_1.ZGt4HN&refcode=em20260403-1&t=3&akid=5933%2E582294%2EpmM540)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260403_1.ZGt4HN&amount=5&refcode=em20260403-1&t=22&akid=5933%2E582294%2EpmM540)**
This past year has only been possible because of your grassroots support. In a race this close, every choice we make has the power to make a difference.
Thank you for being in this fight with me.
Chris
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**

body:

Peter,
In 2026, America turns 250 years old.
To celebrate this historic milestone, House Republicans are giving one patriot and a guest the chance to travel to Washington, D.C., for the Freedom 250 celebration.

name: Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: The reality is →

body:
There are just a handful of districts we can work in. Your support makes it possible. |
#
---
Folks, We’re looking at the 2026 map right now, and there are just a handful of races that will decide control of Congress. _Not dozens, but a handful._ Here’s the reality: We don’t have the resources to compete everywhere, so we’re making decisions right now about where our work makes the biggest difference. That’s why we’re reaching out today to ask for your support. Grassroots donations help power everything we do, like:
* **$10** — helps pay for materials for a new candidate or campaign staffer to attend one of our trainings this spring.
* **$25** — helps pay for phone calls following up with and reaching voters in key districts, so we can start organizing early.
* **$50** — helps fund digital ads that spread our message and reach as many people as possible in targeted swing districts.

**[The groundwork towards flipping the majorities in the House and the Senate to Democratic control is happening now. name: Katie Porter
subject: Grassroots contributions are how we stop him
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
I’m running to make sure California isn’t bought by the billionaires or corporate PACs.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41091%2E3422442%2EnSviBG)
Peter,
Tom Steyer, my billionaire opponent, recently poured even more money into his campaign—**bringing his self-funding total to _$112 million._**
Instead of winning people over with ideas, he’s blanketing the state in ads in an attempt to buy this election.
We can’t let that happen.
I’m running to make sure California isn’t bought by the billionaires or corporate PACs. Our next governor needs to work for working families, not the wealthy.
Grassroots contributions are how we stop him. People chipping in what they can, when they can powers our campaign.
Small-dollar donations have gotten us this far, and they will be how we win. I’ve counted on Porter Supporters to keep me in this fight my entire career, and I need you now more than ever.
**[Can you chip in $5 to my campaign today to help us keep up with the billionaire spending and win this race?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260403_1_ak.jZqjdj&refcode=em20260403-41091&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41091%2E3422442%2EnSviBG)**

name: Emma @ Josh Shapiro HQ
subject: This is a weird ask, I know. But it’s important
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
This email is going to be very different

Hey Derek, it’s Emma (again)! Fair warning: This email is going to be extremely different. [_**I’ll tell you why in a second, but first, I need to ask: Will you click this link to get redirected to Josh Shapiro’s donation form? Whether or not you actually donate from that page is secondary — what’s _most_ important in this email is just clicking the link and going to the form!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128729318/612166579/-1368017556?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_040326_emma&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjcxNzE2Zi05YzJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UC6onCI8SZtJIb_MZ_WKrUhN58XukfeAjWhCRWQC-mE=) I know that’s... a very weird ask. But I promise, there’s a good reason for it. The truth is, emails like these are one of the most effective ways we can reach supporters. But actually getting these messages out to the people we want to reach? Sometimes, it gets a little tricky. **That’s where you come in.** Every time you open one of these emails (or even click a link!), it helps us land in more folks’ inboxes — which ultimately gets more people on Team Shapiro! I know it’s a little complicated (take it from a digital director: it gets... extremely complicated at times), but just clicking a link from this email will help us contact someone we’ve _never_ contacted since Launch Day. Multiply that by hundreds — or even thousands — of supporters? **Your click will make a real difference.** [_**So what do you say, Derek? Can you click this link (and make a donation if you can!) to help us reach thousands of Pennsylvanians we haven’t been able to reach yet? Just one click makes a real difference for our campaign. And adding a donation on top of it? That’s a game changer.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128729320/612166588/-1368017556?amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&refcode=email_040326_emma&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNjcxNzE2Zi05YzJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UC6onCI8SZtJIb_MZ_WKrUhN58XukfeAjWhCRWQC-mE=) Thank you, thank you, thank you! 😊 Emma
Digital Director
Shapiro for Governor

name: The Permanent Campaign
subject: Blowout Jobs Report Boosts Trump, Hegseth Cleans House
body:
U.S. airstrikes leveled Iran's [tallest highway bridge](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckLHO2zAMhJ_G3mTIiuLYg4cu2dK1o0FJVMJWMQWRqfv4hds3-NcDvsPd9-OxPYAK7c_v8MaVRLbEaQuFD_7oTw7SsHLTwCwq2jZn3WSsN_ay1cZSMeo29mm9unHOc4_reLtdnZ9nd-tfa7J5Ga9LjAjRLZBDXHDxU0g4zznnuaf1LLTeXpz11k1DdgFGjx7DFKP3ofP2UxMoDrQLJZTIXCsXUooycHv2ZX2pVuku3zp379z9OI4h858dDxkiv8-EW0mdu1ODXYxCKShqQqP0RBO5FKiCYv4_xWQ-YoCaaKNfKOakjL4aguIuBt7YKMJuoBT6RykUAiXe-7amelApJNOt8_b5Birnhl6_bPb36v4GAAD__4kakpk) Thursday, toppling the B1 span linking Tehran to the western city of Karaj in a dramatic escalation of Operation Epic Fury.

|
Sponsored By:
[](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckMFqMyEYAJ9Gb1n00-jm4OEnPxsoJLQ0EOhlUVcTi8knarqvX_IKvc_MYS7H-WhTTo_ryd6DSa3NCy6zy7jis3-jazUUrN0htt56nYGB2jC5YWIuFVsJvs-cLmYLfIwjDYZrvQU5jqDpzXAJzO8iixF2WlkmRiE0V-B2VkepLE3mFWSSCWCSgRoiOMtlkMEp76V0RLJnWWwPQ3q0tITmEUvBnHrybcB6pdncei-NiH8EJgLTuq6DC49eQvW3weOdwAQHgMvX_rwnMF0-4eNwenvBYmpPx4n4f37f02qWsqacU1OaSHa925RfOu1_3vJj4DcAAP__cPJycA)
---
* * *
The Permanent Campaign is brought to you today in partnership with
Inside Scoop
Issue: 4/3/2026
* * *

Iran's Biggest Bridge Destroyed

U.S. airstrikes leveled Iran's [tallest highway bridge](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckLHO2zAMhJ_G3mTIiuLYg4cu2dK1o0FJVMJWMQWRqfv4hds3-NcDvsPd9-OxPYAK7c_v8MaVRLbEaQuFD_7oTw7SsHLTwCwq2jZn3WSsN_ay1cZSMeo29mm9unHOc4_reLtdnZ9nd-tfa7J5Ga9LjAjRLZBDXHDxU0g4zznnuaf1LLTeXpz11k1DdgFGjx7DFKP3ofP2UxMoDrQLJZTIXCsXUooycHv2ZX2pVuku3zp379z9OI4h858dDxkiv8-EW0mdu1ODXYxCKShqQqP0RBO5FKiCYv4_xWQ-YoCaaKNfKOakjL4aguIuBt7YKMJuoBT6RykUAiXe-7amelApJNOt8_b5Birnhl6_bPb36v4GAAD__4kakpk) Thursday, toppling the B1 span linking Tehran to the western city of Karaj in a dramatic escalation of Operation Epic Fury. The Pentagon says the bridge was a secret [missile supply route](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckDuynTAMhldjOp0xxjxuQZGG7qZNyfghQIlBHlvnsP0MRTaQRpX-1_fre_12lOjaf7oTZ6p1jRxXn_jmt_xmXwtmLuKZq1Qpq9FmAG1Bd2suXDMGWdsmzr1pp21qcG7HsTd2mszYHLPvXQwRh7HVbuz6ofv6aoPf-jY4jH6YGpofQ211Z7TVZnhtxrvWokU_hGCtV1a_c3SCL7oqRayBOWdOJBTqi8vepPkQyVV1P5RZlFnu-375giTeFXkFPpVZ_gmUWZ48ZRZtn2OefyfhACnvM0N-VsKHIjLwBlTcVeGg_cAq4AvFHUHep3-AQeT7gtuVq8Lp_iA4iOgSeNy4IJBUEGZITlCZpSlzzDelRHUYldX76Sg97Rr5b-qf2fwNAAD__087l8s) used by Iran's armed forces to shuttle weapons from Tehran to western launch sites. Trump celebrated on Truth Social: "The biggest bridge in Iran comes tumbling down — Much more to follow!" Iran's state media said the strike killed eight and wounded 95, and Tehran is now [threatening retaliation](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckDuu5CAQRVeDM1tQxp8JCCYh60kntPhUu2sGuxDQ7bf8J2_hJTe40v3o_H1sD0eJzv2PO9BQrVvkuPnEF7_bP_a1YObSPHNttZUNJMy91L0ct1y4ZgxtU100E6j1uXZo1LJMoNcVlu5lYME4PyXKRf9S0U24gpM6II7oZXCqI3MXSi1HkFrCPDzBO6VRo59D0NoLLd85uoYDnZUi1sCcMydqFOrAZe-SebWWqxh_C7AC7HVdw4lXPdzXEPi4HS4pCrB7Yu9Sc-m_ABv5dCn2rbyP3H8oIvdU3CnA3o8EWKlvAQGW7rCCSc3TIsB2xcR8UUpU50VouR-O0j3VtR8D_Bj4DgAA___IEYFk) against allied bridges across the Middle East. ★★★
Hegseth Fires Army's Top General

War Secretary Pete Hegseth forced out Army Chief of Staff Gen. Randy George on Thursday night, ordering the Biden-appointed four-star to [retire immediately](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckL2OnjAQAJ8GOiNjfMAVLtJ83aVNifyzhk0Ma3mXkHv76Iq8QPrRjDQ_PrYPjwWv_bs_wSHzlihtodBDt_ykwA0qNQlELCxtM9rMSlulp6024gpRtrFP7s2Ma157cOOyvBm7rmbpD7dmHWwaU8p-1us8-bi8j3nx4R3GySy5R_cl1FZPRltt5iGb4EcLFsIco7Whs_quyQsMeDEm4EhUKxUUjDxQ2_viDpHK3fStM6_OvJ7nGTL9ueDhIdLZmdc_vDMv385PFQ-ErFh8zopaggZJNRBsoPA8IaEXKJ_qgJ1BDhXpErxuYFXhEr_Tpfjwv-CufXOpPlgK8rx0Vu-nx_IV7eW_V_525m8AAAD___c9i90) amid the Iran war. Hegseth also removed two other senior officers — the commander of Army Transformation and Training Command and the chief of chaplains. A senior War Department official told Fox News it was simply time for a [leadership change](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyc0L2O4yAUQOGngc4WvmBDCopt3GXbLS1-rm1WxBcBmShvP8o8wvRHX3H-3be7Szldx1_3QJta2yLFzWd60bP_J98qFqrdE7Xeet1AwDIINQi5lUqtYOjbxKOdYTK74WgnrWdQxoDmp5VK-4A-OimFDl5ovPnowzTvajG3WfFkP6BQQoJQApZxB-8mhQr9EoJSninxLNF1HNPVUsQWiEqhnHoKbaR68GzP3ktj8g-DlcHaTzxTzmOgB4P1k4Y3gzXijldDButsJmlmMRx4YXV5qO6K7-FAqgcO9GwdK4OVVxvLK-Wc2qKZEsfDpR-U919v-rLwHQAA__-w6Xsq) in the Army. Gen. Christopher LaNeve, Hegseth's former military aide, steps in as acting chief. George served as senior military assistant to [Lloyd Austin](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyc0L2u4yAQBeCnwR0WHhPjFBTbuLvbbmnxMySzwhcEk1h5-5WLfYHbnO6cTzp_vvYvR5m-H7_dgZZ632OJu8_lLC_-W3xvWEtjX0rnzm0HBYtUWqp5r630ioH3aYj2BtOa1gHtZMwN9LqCGZ7WzFGjg7BO012bG5q70T4Ele56DpP3A9lrUGk1g9IKljGBd5NGjX4JQWsvtHrV6BhH-u4UsYdSai2ZmEIfS3sM2T6ZaxfzLwGbgO08z9E3JPau8RjKIWD7XxCwXZ6ATekrZgHbS3bp2vGR4UmYZEmys0tJNmRq2CWmhIHpjZKOAyM5xvwRsA3NxnpSztQXI7R6HI7y5Q384x_fFv4FAAD__3YNhfo) during the Biden administration — a fact that didn't help his standing with the new Pentagon brass. ★★★
Jobs Report Crushes Expectations

The U.S. economy added 178,000 jobs in March — nearly three times what [economists predicted](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyc0D1uhDAUBODT2B3IPIxhCxdp6DZtSuQ_FkeGZ_mZkNw-QrlBDjCj-ebjuTxNTPF4vZs96Ei0ePSLTXjhWT_RUgkZS7WIVKmWBQSoRshG9EsuSDm4unTc6wG6aZ140N04DiCnCUa-6XUcVjl5o4KXanAP1alHryA8YFrD6ASP-i4UUvQgpADVrmBNJ4MMVjknpWVSnNmbGtp4UPSBHGLOmGKNjlosL570Vmsm1r8xmBnM13W1K37bk-IRiFqHO4M5ODxw_2Ewn9TcruYP1uymuK25V_Cifb5iSpHUyKR47SamO87rv4_50vAbAAD__03NdvQ) — in a blowout rebound from February's 133,000-job loss. The unemployment rate dipped to 4.3%, and health care led all sectors with 76,000 new positions. Construction added 26,000, and transportation posted 21,000. The report landed on Good Friday with [markets closed](https://email.update.insidescooppolitics.org/c/eJyckD2unTAQRldjOqNh8Lv4Fi7S0L20KZH_AEeGsTwm5O4-YgtpvvI7OufX9_JtU07n9tMe0STmJVBYXKabrvabHNdYqDZHxI1bXRDwJUFJGJdSiUv0bRm6YL5w0Kvuohmm6QuV1jh1uwmjW6d3AFzjsA46Wj9qq95vGNDrUUOXzHMICkYEBfjqV3R2UFFF9_JeKScUXCXYFvt0cgqRPVEplFNLnnuqW5fN3lphMf4QOAuc7_vuXY2pOVtb7-kQOEdPJx0fgfODEziDemYUOD-O8rwOFytLPizvsu2Vrm2X8e-jZ1uik-UlWRb7qZQzy63SLd1HDpMGAIFzV00od8o58WsSCrbDpvzAu_bfUf8Y_BcAAP__YfCKHw), muting immediate Wall Street reaction. Economists caution that the full impact of the Iran war and surging energy prices hasn't hit the data yet, but for now, the numbers are a welcome shot of adrenaline for the Trump economy.

The Pentagon says the bridge was a secret used by Iran's armed forces to shuttle weapons from Tehran to western launch sites. Trump celebrated on Truth Social: "The biggest bridge in Iran comes tumbling down — Much more to follow!" Iran's state media said the strike killed eight and wounded 95, and Tehran is now against allied bridges across the Middle East. ★★★ Hegseth Fires Army's Top General War Secretary Pete Hegseth forced out Army Chief of Staff Gen. Randy George on Thursday night, ordering the Biden-appointed four-star to amid the Iran war. Hegseth also removed two other senior officers — the commander of Army Transformation and Training Command and the chief of chaplains. A senior War Department official told Fox News it was simply time for a in the Army. Gen. Christopher LaNeve, Hegseth's former military aide, steps in as acting chief. George served as senior military assistant to during the Biden administration — a fact that didn't help his standing with the new Pentagon brass. ★★★ Jobs Report Crushes Expectations The U.S. economy added 178,000 jobs in March — nearly three times what — in a blowout rebound from February's 133,000-job loss. The unemployment rate dipped to 4.3%, and health care led all sectors with 76,000 new positions. Construction added 26,000, and transportation posted 21,000. The report landed on Good Friday with , muting immediate Wall Street reaction. Economists caution that the full impact of the Iran war and surging energy prices hasn't hit the data yet, but for now, the numbers are a welcome shot of adrenaline for the Trump economy. Vance Heads to Hungary To Stump For Orbán Vice President J.D. Vance to rally with incumbent Prime Minister Viktor Orban just weeks before Orban faces voters in his country. Orban is a nationalist conservative and a close ally of President Trump. ★★★ Rahm Emmanuel Rips Dems For Going Woke Former Barack Obama Chief of Staff, and rumored 2028 Presidential candidate, Rahm Emmanuel slammed Democrats for having "lost the plot" by backing such as allowing biological men to play women's sports. ★★★ VA Conservatives Overturn RINO Election Conservatives in Warren County, Virginia, won a district appeal nullifying a where RINOs allegedly let Democrats vote, turned away conservative voters, and slashed membership to rig the outcome for a leftist-friendly chairman. Trump Slaps 100% Drug Tariffs Trump signed an executive order Thursday imposing on imported brand-name drugs — but companies that signed pricing deals or pledged to build factories in America can reduce or avoid the levies entirely ★★★ House GOP Revolts Over DHS Deal House conservatives erupted on a Thursday conference call after Speaker Johnson reversed course to back the Senate's two-track DHS plan he'd called "a joke" just days earlier. Hard-liners want ICE funded — but Thune says the reconciliation measure will stay "narrow and focused" on border agencies to move fast. ★★★ Hegseth Ends Gun-Free Bases War Secretary Pete Hegseth signed a memo Thursday on service members carrying personal firearms on military installations and directing commanders to presume approval of carry requests. The move ends what Hegseth called decades of unconstitutional "gun-free zones" on U.S. bases. clean_body: It’s now or never. | = Friends, in just four days, one of the most important early elections of the year will unfold: Arizona’s Salt River Project Board race. Like me, you may be wondering why all eyes are on this local utility. Let me explain: First: Turning Point — yes, that Turning Point, known for its hateful and inflammatory rhetoric — is spending hundreds of thousands of dollars to try to buy these seats. Second: We have a real chance to help shift power at the largest public utility in the country — to lower rates, hold data centers accountable, and fight for the public interest. Third: Arizona is a critical battleground state, and the outcome of this election could offer an early read on voter energy and momentum heading into November. Victory is within striking distance, but remember: voting power in this race is tied to land ownership, so a small number of property holders will decide who wins. That means every undecided voter our candidates reach between now and Election Day can truly move the needle. That’s why I’m turning to you one last time before our endorsed candidates head into the final and most important days of their campaigns.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = When bold climate leaders step up to change the system and take on a giant like Turning Point, they need people like you to help them meet the moment with people-power. Thank you for your continued support, Jane Fonda | Follow along: | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC,, with 99.23% from out-of-state contributors. Authorized by Sandra Kennedy, Casey Clowes, Kathy Mohr-Almeida, and Krista O’Brien. Not authorized by any other candidate or candidate’s committee. name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Signature Requested: Add your name to personally endorse Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friend,
In just a moment, we’re going to ask you to add your name and join the thousands of others who have personally endorsed Mark Kelly. Please, give us a chance to explain why your endorsement is so important.
Over the last year, Mark has weathered a number of storms. Elon Musk called him a traitor. Roger Stone called for him to be executed. Donald Trump accused him of sedition and demanded his arrest and execution. Pete Hegseth threatened him with court-martial, demotion, and a reduction of his military pension. The Department of Justice tried to indict him.
None of those things stopped Mark. He continues to fight, and he’s able to do so because of this team. No matter what’s happened, you have had Mark’s back. For that, he is incredibly grateful.
Personally endorsing Mark might seem like a small act, but it speaks volumes about what we’re trying to do here. We are building something more resilient, more impactful than anything Trump has behind him.
That’s the truth.
[**And if you’re still a part of that team, please: Add your name and personally endorse Mark Kelly. He’s going to need you with him for whatever Trump throws at him next.**](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-q22026-endorse/?source=em260403-1-f&akid=6405%2E6688874%2Eovw5XA)
**[HAVE MARK’S BACK](https://act.markkelly.com/signup/mek-em-q22026-endorse/?source=em260403-1-f&akid=6405%2E6688874%2Eovw5XA)**
Thank you,
Team Kelly

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=6405%2E6688874%2Eovw5XA).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

body:
U.S.-backed Israeli attacks on Lebanon are using the same genocidal playbook we’ve seen in Gaza. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWRR-3RrjDM7P1mEbF-PcSoFginD8iJ2jtM5HD64bLtjQ50NUDj3MnDV_PxdjbD18ev1w-j48HKU-Y_1eaN2y2FzBBEYJzfhItLy0knf9F5JpeXxfkT8c_MlnabsIweqY0QF8HxvfYA1TePAr6qUt_IEVtLqIibKFFkRiNG-xbGuLE5C4XKmIKWeJtm6FUXepueLznoEDMwny4i4d_03tGA_C3mF_w1VbexzwsmIN7MJ0eMMNY66uRkWem3jGq9vxlA3K7w3ryoFYOn0Fzn0oOhQ/4ph/4xN5IA0hRqyc2LRe0WJXSg/h0/h001.-ZW_j9nIPQKzy6VTXWVt-JER_4B2kTCiOOiT4oMdQic)

Friend, My Congressional district has the largest Lebanese community in the United States. During the latest U.S.-backed Israeli attacks, thousands of families in my district with strong ties to Lebanon have watched their family’s towns be completely destroyed, seen relatives uprooted from their homes, and lost loved ones. These attacks have killed more than 1,268 Lebanese people, including 125 children—wounding or killing children every day, including in classrooms. They’ve forcibly displaced more than 1.2 million people, including 370,000 children. The Israeli government has told them that they won’t be allowed to return, and leaders such as the defense minister are openly planning to occupy Lebanese territory. **These war crimes and crimes against humanity are funded by our tax dollars—and they’re only possible with U.S. support.** **Congress has the power to stop this, so I just introduced new legislation, including a resolution calling on the U.S. to force an end to the Israeli military’s illegal invasion of Lebanon—and a Lebanon War Powers Resolution** , which orders an end to the U.S. Armed Forces’ involvement in unauthorized hostilities in Lebanon. [**Please add your name to support these new policies and demand Congress stop the Israeli military’s genocidal ethnic cleansing campaign in Lebanon.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HWtiGz5LuqdYdydHcioHim5IEQYatb6Q98O8Cpy0TjJTRT6yU1JJvThwZ-ZFynI-2cmJH7HhzzzsrShJSkuHfpSJmOiIanrYDCDyT9I0IGUxVRVsCBYzlYaUHkCkfObiR9j8bxihVFjRA7XeR_8WgJvQudtstiBsMaGcqnxHFKqN2-F6BfGz-PNo_8X6OJM8k1A__VFd6M7kiqmngO9EEf6KRloBUq5Kw8ofBOCjDxZmTZ_-pxk31biYxk9nMdcdNA2p-p0XFwoEG2eQZmb-XpKiHRAnK_E5jP8GWusR6VNMQCynr5MRfWs172pf-UMBMtC77pIX_5hCIvEzjcGpNvBjZbA6Qg1DDhnBH75w1o1WdUQmlwZoWOgq_ndJsQOTT3yizCf0bLeOH66Tt9qTBp9zU1tOOKW5wfxcPUEkLw4yWr120WnoJCRU4sYzuNNisg6W0Cfu4AX2ZeCeMReklA/4ph/4xN5IA0hRqyc2LRe0WJXSg/h1/h001.Wl2s6O9ut3WdTvVq8A9iSMSh1gOJuOB-trQIqDKngSw) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HWtiGz5LuqdYdydHcioHim5IEQYatb6Q98O8Cpy0TjJTRT6yU1JJvThwZ-ZFynI-2cmJH7HhzzzsrShJSkuHfpSJmOiIanrYDCDyT9I0IGUxVRVsCBYzlYaUHkCkfObiBIQoteP8gTJmeew1ilJ9G4dwj7UmrSO2-nyW7jfvDPOfJkmsGm9ORv3vdHZIPicsThVd15qUqnGUFqjHFB4NF-aC_Qe1ieGquZNHvEOBocMVuvun5mhkKjzyXcnam4gH9o-uGnGoZNVmu8JBjsmIEreRet4S6RkOIQqiIdTWZ7mOuIG-xsNdiVjEonwvtngo4kLydnv3ir-T5evfbi8-TXfVsMGw5MjzTW7wrbVyba2UHPRr6bIOjcMm5bq5fD7CIdbYqtV2JZEIan_KfTBplh1iDUDw_xrEGvDW6jL4vTiHEJuwA9Ev1v2i9y0VYgAEXN_Rzpa23xCWdr1KX4Hj6Q/4ph/4xN5IA0hRqyc2LRe0WJXSg/h2/h001.BJDFkQEvoqitD_lFR6SR025Khn2nwFaWA5CWnu-LIRc)
---
Top Israeli leaders are openly celebrating and talking about using Gaza as a “model” for destroying Lebanon.
They’re using the same genocidal playbook, using U.S.-made bombs to carpet bomb civilian homes, refugees in tents, and 128 ambulances and medical facilities so far. The same military has bombed every hospital in Gaza. Just like in Gaza, the military is committing “double tap” strikes to kill first responders.
Israel’s military is also escalating its ground invasion and assassinating more journalists. The IDF recently revealed in a TV interview that they photoshopped a photo of Ali Soheib, a now-slain Lebanese journalist, to show him as a militant. This follows a pattern of lying about Palestinian reporters.
They’ve also fired U.S.-produced white phosphorus on south Lebanon’s residential neighborhoods—a banned practice that poisons the land and people, and can burn through skin to the bone.
These horrific actions are _all_ war crimes.
My new **House Resolution Standing with the People of Lebanon Against the Illegal Invasion, War Crimes, and Ethnic Cleansing Perpetrated by the State of Israel****** calls on the United States to:
* use its immense leverage to force an end to the Israeli military invasion
* reject threats of territorial expansion and the illegal occupation of Lebanese territory
* investigate and prosecute war crimes
* end U.S. support and participation in this invasion
* deliver unconditional humanitarian and reconstruction aid
* extend Temporary Protected Status for Lebanese nationals in the United States
* support the international right of return of all displaced Lebanese to their homes

[**Please sign on today to urge Congress to support the****Lebanon War Powers Resolution****and the****House Resolution Standing with the People of Lebanon Against the Illegal Invasion, War Crimes, and Ethnic Cleansing Perpetrated by the State of Israel****.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HWtiGz5LuqdYdydHcioHim5IEQYatb6Q98O8Cpy0TjJTRT6yU1JJvThwZ-ZFynI-2cmJH7HhzzzsrShJSkuHfpSJmOiIanrYDCDyT9I0IGUxVRVsCBYzlYaUHkCkfObiwbjfyiscgMNQzcYBzRN1oJVjnCyTD-IR-QyLTTqRXoUvnpc3BAxRpShjCFZc_fJzNoGP_xdy-Ik5dvW0HIVA5B0IglDvBTtyHbbTyb4J0OU039dm_rCZ5R6F891oWek40pgB3C_pWXJfM71hppPvYjuHjnEfvVOiGHjyan4aefL7rxBw8rMmMxdmDd3id5eO3xgRx_7DB8YCY7ex3yoqXS_3q7bLW1HP9c7v6JXHEURiHUnsWwReXZBPMHfxBW1bHAkWw9gmoDwpCtxkhjBRm8MLOIO8RVr_r8KwF1Ygg3iNHw0_OTNjffnmftsRZWzi1Sr2ecOjnEpkvHScXi7tJA/4ph/4xN5IA0hRqyc2LRe0WJXSg/h3/h001.t_LaLRUxdnlRiGP_AYKGunblKRsVxe60PE0NObwkt3U)
Thank you for taking action and continuing to demand a better world, with safety and freedom for all.
In solidarity,
Rashida

name: Team Rodriguez
subject: Do you have 30 seconds to take our survey?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ, DEMOCRAT, FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
We want to know what matters most to you. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128729875/612168063/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_SpringSurvey_040326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThmYTI1ZjktOWQyZi1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HZHhCH5VkK1iWfRdnSIMunXe4N9L7u7FqOjNxkUxB7w=&emci=42df3efa-6d2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=18fa25f9-9d2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=32374386)
---
Peter — Jose Javier has been hard at work on the campaign trail, and we know you have a lot on your plate, too. **[If you don’t have time to read this email, just take 30 seconds to complete our exclusive Spring Priorities Survey and let us know what issues matter most to you as a voter >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128729877/612168066/1801745339?refcode=em_JJR_FR_SpringSurvey_040326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThmYTI1ZjktOWQyZi1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HZHhCH5VkK1iWfRdnSIMunXe4N9L7u7FqOjNxkUxB7w=&emci=42df3efa-6d2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=18fa25f9-9d2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=32374386)** | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128729879/612168068/1801745339?refcode=em_JJR_FR_SpringSurvey_040326&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMThmYTI1ZjktOWQyZi1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=HZHhCH5VkK1iWfRdnSIMunXe4N9L7u7FqOjNxkUxB7w=&emci=42df3efa-6d2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=18fa25f9-9d2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=32374386) **
---
Jose Javier got into this race for one reason: to serve hardworking Floridians like you.
That’s why hearing directly from supporters across the state is so important. This campaign is about building a team and working together to fight for Florida’s future.

body:
The other day, I had the chance to sit down and have coffee with some moms in Bedford.

We talked about everything from the cost of groceries, to health care, to what's happening to our democracy — _the things that are really weighing on people right now._

I wish I could sit down with every single one of Granite Stater, but the next best thing is hearing directly from you about what matters most:

[**_Will you take a minute to fill out my 2026 Senate Priorities Survey? I'm hoping to collect 10,000 responses before 8:00 AM tomorrow!_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128730287/612169102/-1596320588?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2026.04.03_Senate-Priorities_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTI5OTdhYy05ZTJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfymuWcajZ99D7ZgXHFQSL9LDdzNz2f3lvuso00s80U=&emci=226a4a2b-ec2d-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=aa2997ac-9e2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=5452893) | | [ TAKE THE SURVEY → ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128730289/612169104/-1596320588?refcode=LOC_EM_SURV_2026.04.03_Senate-Priorities_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTI5OTdhYy05ZTJmLWYxMTEtOWE0OC0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wfymuWcajZ99D7ZgXHFQSL9LDdzNz2f3lvuso00s80U=&emci=226a4a2b-ec2d-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=aa2997ac-9e2f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=5452893)

**Trump-aligned tech billionaire, Peter Thiel, is dumping millions of dollars into a dirty — not to mention _racist_ — disinformation campaign to mislead voters about Virginia’s upcoming redistricting referendum.**
_This is a real crisis. Early voting is underway. Ballots are being cast as I write this. _
It shouldn’t surprise us that Republicans are going all in and stooping so low to try to scare voters. They want to prevent people from fighting back against the Republican power grabs in Texas, Missouri, and North Carolina.
**This referendum is designed to empower Virginians in the nationwide redistricting crisis — to give them a chance to respond and level the playing field for the midterms.[With less than 20 days until Election Day, we have to act urgently. Make a donation and help power this critical work in Virginia and across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128730990/612171579/359562654?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_NextInVirginia_email_20260403-NDRC-Tier1-NextInVirginia_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260403-NDRC-Tier1-NextInVirginia_&utm_campaign=NextInVirginia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImE5MzY2OTEzLWEwMmYtZjExMS05YTQ4LTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sonu947uNqQvHtS3-8jtj2n9XFSvYNsCZlnmp-L3brU=)**

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: 📬 Weekly Update from Senator Shawnna Bolick
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | | | [|
---](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=e688b244a9&e=a7ab36849c)
| | | | | | **📣 Weekly Update from Senator Shawnna Bolick****Campaign Update** On March 19th, I officially filed my signatures to qualify for the July 21st GOP primary ballot for State Senate. I’m deeply grateful to every volunteer who helped us meet this important deadline. Thanks to your hard work, my name will appear on the ballot.I recently stopped by a north Phoenix block watch, where I connected with community members and law enforcement officers who are working every day to keep our neighborhoods safe.If you are interested in volunteering with my campaign, hosting a meet and greet, writing post cards, or requesting a yard sign, please [email me](mailto:info@BolickforArizona.com?subject=I%20want%20to%20help%20Shawnna%20win&body=) and tell me how you’d like to help us hold this seat. The outcome of my race determines which party controls the State Senate. I hope you would like to help me be a linchpin in the process.
**Capitol Update** Last week, the House and Senate wrapped up our committee hearings for this current legislative session. This week, both the House and Senate held their final Appropriations Committee meetings. With that work complete, we’re hopeful that a budget appropriations hearing is coming soon.I’m proud to share that Governor Hobbs [signed](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=18d25d869e&e=a7ab36849c) my [Senate Bill 1211](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2158ccd033&e=a7ab36849c) into law last Friday. This legislation closes a dangerous gap that allowed repeat offenders to continue harassing their victims. SB 1211 expands Arizona’s lifetime injunction statute under Kayleigh’s Law to include felony aggravated harassment involving domestic violence.Victims deserve lasting protection — not temporary fixes. This bill was shaped by advocates who work directly with survivors, including leaders at [Amberly’s Place](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=7d17f56ef4&e=a7ab36849c), who saw firsthand where the system was falling short.On Monday, the governor signed [House Bill 2072](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=53aec6b64b&e=a7ab36849c), a bill I used as a strike everything as Chair of the Senate Committee on Regulatory Affairs and Government Efficiency to repeal Cesar Chavez day. You can read more about this legislative action in a Senate [press release](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=85bc0af81e&e=a7ab36849c).Yesterday, Hobbs signed [Senate Bill 1415](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=2aab0f3e9c&e=a7ab36849c), allowing experienced insurance adjusters already licensed in other states to get to work in Arizona without jumping through redundant hoops. The result of this bill means more qualified adjusters will be readily available to help when homeowners need it most. When your home is damaged, your business is hit, or everything’s on the line.. the last thing you should be doing is waiting unnecessarily for an insurance adjuster. On March 27th, I toured [VAI Resort](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=45a96c6d05&e=a7ab36849c), the most iconic resort, in Glendale with a handful of my fellow legislators. You may have read about this new hotel, entertainment, and culinary destination located near the football stadium. We got the chance to see one of the many hotel rooms being offered as well as the amphitheater. The owner allowed us to select a song to test out their $50 million state of the art stage and sound system. As a music lover and frequent concert goer, I selected U2’s “Desire.” Looking forward to experiencing VAI once it is open to the public.Later that evening, I had the opportunity to briefly address [The Federalist](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=842285f7ac&e=a7ab36849c) Forum in Scottsdale. In my brief remarks, I highlighted how Arizona’s Legislature has produced model legislation that other states have adopted — from school choice and Right to Try, to the civics test graduation requirement and election integrity reforms. Some here might view Arizona as the wild west, but we are a trendsetter when it comes to producing effective policy solutions.This morning I toured Madison Granite Supplies, an aggregate non metal mine providing quality landscape rock to the valley. Madison Granite is a homegrown company and one of the state’s largest granite mining operations in Arizona located in district 2. It is fascinating to see how their mine has increased its footprint grown over the years, supplying the Valley for residential and commercial landscaping projects.
**📺 Bolick in the News** _Protecting Victims Expanding Protections for Domestic Violence Survivors_ https://www.thecentersquare.com/arizona/article_6b89dcee-9963-408b-ac7b-9f24fbdc2654.html _New Pathway for Vet Techs_ https://www.kold.com/2026/03/12/arizona-bill-would-create-new-pathway-vet-tech-certification/_Requiring Faster Reporting for Missing Children_ https://azfreenews.com/2026/03/faster-reporting-crackdown-on-online-activity-for-child-trafficking-pass-arizona-senate/_Standing With Victims: Repeal of Cesar Chavez Day Moves Forward_ https://www.azfamily.com/2026/03/20/arizona-lawmakers-phoenix-union-consider-steps-remove-cesar-chavez-honors/https://www.themountaineer.com/news/national/arizona-republican-lawmakers-plan-to-end-cesar-chavez-day/article_5e6d51ca-c586-5849-9e02-ed9acda7dd00.htmlhttps://tucson.com/news/state-regional/government-politics/article_4adcbfaa-f92a-4b2a-b992-733b0efb6e42.htmlhttps://ktar.com/arizona-politics-news/cesar-chavez-day-repeal/5838180/_Protecting Consumers from Gas Price Spikes_ https://www.azcentral.com/story/news/local/arizona/2026/03/25/phoenix-gas-prices/89310741007/https://azfreenews.com/2026/03/arizona-senate-republicans-propose-legislation-to-reduce-gas-prices/_Housing Affordability Continues to Gain Momentum_ https://www.housingwire.com/articles/arizona-local-design-standards/_Antibullying Legislation in Our Schools Advances_ https://ktar.com/arizona-education/bullying-public-school-lawsuits/5839744/
As our community observes Passover, Good Friday, and Easter this week, I wish everyone a season of reflection, renewal, and hope. May these days bring peace and blessings to you and your loved ones.Best,
Shawnna

* * *
It was the kind of week that would be unbelievable in fiction. Trump fired Attorney General Pam Bondi -- with a "we love Pam" post and zero severance plan -- while Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced explosive war profiteering accusations after the Financial Times reported his broker tried to place multimillion-dollar bets on defense stocks right before the Iran strikes. Meanwhile, Trump claimed Iran's military was destroyed. U.S. intelligence says they still have half their arsenal. Then a US fighter jet got shot down.
But that's not all. Mike Lindell got slapped with yet another lawsuit over his election lies. Tiger Woods wrecked his SUV, called Donald Trump for comfort, then failed a field sobriety test and caught a DUI. Charles Barkley went on CBS and called out how immigrants are being treated in this country. And the AI clip of the week imagines the Trump Presidential Library -- complete with gift jets, the Lolita Express, and an "unwoke" casino. You cannot make this up.

That's what we're building. And you found your people. This is a movement. Teachers, nurses, veterans, parents, small business owners--all of us watching what's happening to this country and saying not on our watch. Every member makes us louder. Every member makes us harder to ignore. A membership isn't a transaction--it's you planting a flag. . That's less than half the monthly rate, and it tells us you're all in. Jump in. The water's warm and the company's good. We're in this together. -- Cliff It was the kind of week that would be unbelievable in fiction. Trump fired Attorney General Pam Bondi -- with a "we love Pam" post and zero severance plan -- while Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced explosive war profiteering accusations after the Financial Times reported his broker tried to place multimillion-dollar bets on defense stocks right before the Iran strikes. Meanwhile, Trump claimed Iran's military was destroyed. U.S. intelligence says they still have half their arsenal. Then a US fighter jet got shot down. But that's not all. Mike Lindell got slapped with yet another lawsuit over his election lies. Tiger Woods wrecked his SUV, called Donald Trump for comfort, then failed a field sobriety test and caught a DUI. Charles Barkley went on CBS and called out how immigrants are being treated in this country. And the AI clip of the week imagines the Trump Presidential Library -- complete with gift jets, the Lolita Express, and an "unwoke" casino. You cannot make this up. body:
U.S.-backed Israeli attacks on Lebanon are using the same genocidal playbook we’ve seen in Gaza. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWRR-3RrjDM7P1mEbF-PcSoFginD8iJ2jtM5HD64bLtjQ50NUDj3MnDV_PxdjbD18ev1w-j48HKU-Y_1eaN2y2FxZMj-ZuquGFKGjqv0GUcTICcudbqvGMjgTx4dG_SLKTNJepjOTZqkwt0x9qsXc_hm57tXhqPFpBUPaYZjC12VRn2Iym49B2c7rl4Ub_YkWBjjfhDZdocLNvbqx7dNxzKUDhuF0OG_URSw0YbBlW2vJEbSsZNqoKWp0vGIvby1YDIRUUrTeqdgbOCMVKX5RiTQ/4ph/srsbB22OSKORC3lImfoc8Q/h0/h001.goOrkm9cVvTXNT_5A4gXJRhXv3AGkadLLjlEP7JhJLw)
---
Friend, My Congressional district has the largest Lebanese community in the United States. During the latest U.S.-backed Israeli attacks, thousands of families in my district with strong ties to Lebanon have watched their family’s towns be completely destroyed, seen relatives uprooted from their homes, and lost loved ones. These attacks have killed more than 1,268 Lebanese people, including 125 children—wounding or killing children every day, including in classrooms. They’ve forcibly displaced more than 1.2 million people, including 370,000 children. The Israeli government has told them that they won’t be allowed to return, and leaders such as the defense minister are openly planning to occupy Lebanese territory. **These war crimes and crimes against humanity are funded by our tax dollars—and they’re only possible with U.S. support.** **Congress has the power to stop this, so I just introduced new legislation, including a resolution calling on the U.S. to force an end to the Israeli military’s illegal invasion of Lebanon—and a Lebanon War Powers Resolution** , which orders an end to the U.S. Armed Forces’ involvement in unauthorized hostilities in Lebanon. [**Please add your name to support these new policies and demand Congress stop the Israeli military’s genocidal ethnic cleansing campaign in Lebanon.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HWtiGz5LuqdYdydHcioHim5IEQYatb6Q98O8Cpy0TjJTRT6yU1JJvThwZ-ZFynI-2cmJH7HhzzzsrShJSkuHfpSJmOiIanrYDCDyT9I0IGUxVRVsCBYzlYaUHkCkfObiR9j8bxihVFjRA7XeR_8WgJvQudtstiBsMaGcqnxHFKqN2-F6BfGz-PNo_8X6OJM8k1A__VFd6M7kiqmngO9EEf6KRloBUq5Kw8ofBOCjDxZmTZ_-pxk31biYxk9nMdcdNA2p-p0XFwoEG2eQZmb-XpKiHRAnK_E5jP8GWusR6VPn3UlET-BdYuv-LKVVOkriSmpipfMw80ErlmI69_GThR5eDjUlLHVcj-xDz3Qrk02J37kyF3EcATYBhKovvtynLqV58yghiv0CZ8PWQeXtB8LOfmPmnEfS2N1bF2cSmpPgDfB-u5CHo4z7kBUTDWuk0avfzn6cB_JP0kDhnjiszQ/4ph/srsbB22OSKORC3lImfoc8Q/h1/h001.BfymoJt0rfR92DQLybpMdd0epCGRqMBfmHHoYhbbfCE) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HWtiGz5LuqdYdydHcioHim5IEQYatb6Q98O8Cpy0TjJTRT6yU1JJvThwZ-ZFynI-2cmJH7HhzzzsrShJSkuHfpSJmOiIanrYDCDyT9I0IGUxVRVsCBYzlYaUHkCkfObiBIQoteP8gTJmeew1ilJ9G4dwj7UmrSO2-nyW7jfvDPOfJkmsGm9ORv3vdHZIPicsThVd15qUqnGUFqjHFB4NF-aC_Qe1ieGquZNHvEOBocMVuvun5mhkKjzyXcnam4gH9o-uGnGoZNVmu8JBjsmIEreRet4S6RkOIQqiIdTWZ7le_7WqkiY9M6y1NnYSHavNB1w9qdzM2Vr2v-OJrvqoqZ0_FQYKT1HA9n0hRdujND7dJKywGco24m4T-KB08MkbztR6fZ1YhMPcwp5IVCUrqHfJClUjztFxqdmiNzzWVDCvvR8K6S9ev-pXFK5JL8GkC1dax2DZAPPIlilJdcWkpw/4ph/srsbB22OSKORC3lImfoc8Q/h2/h001.hESypE41Ae6vsjP7-6eHxFIKVArnmYOZzGU1DZqrmXI)
---
Top Israeli leaders are openly celebrating and talking about using Gaza as a “model” for destroying Lebanon.
They’re using the same genocidal playbook, using U.S.-made bombs to carpet bomb civilian homes, refugees in tents, and 128 ambulances and medical facilities so far. The same military has bombed every hospital in Gaza. Just like in Gaza, the military is committing “double tap” strikes to kill first responders.
Israel’s military is also escalating its ground invasion and assassinating more journalists. The IDF recently revealed in a TV interview that they photoshopped a photo of Ali Soheib, a now-slain Lebanese journalist, to show him as a militant. This follows a pattern of lying about Palestinian reporters.
They’ve also fired U.S.-produced white phosphorus on south Lebanon’s residential neighborhoods—a banned practice that poisons the land and people, and can burn through skin to the bone.
These horrific actions are _all_ war crimes.
My new **House Resolution Standing with the People of Lebanon Against the Illegal Invasion, War Crimes, and Ethnic Cleansing Perpetrated by the State of Israel****** calls on the United States to:
* use its immense leverage to force an end to the Israeli military invasion
* reject threats of territorial expansion and the illegal occupation of Lebanese territory
* investigate and prosecute war crimes
* end U.S. support and participation in this invasion
* deliver unconditional humanitarian and reconstruction aid
* extend Temporary Protected Status for Lebanese nationals in the United States
* support the international right of return of all displaced Lebanese to their homes

[**Please sign on today to urge Congress to support the****Lebanon War Powers Resolution****and the****House Resolution Standing with the People of Lebanon Against the Illegal Invasion, War Crimes, and Ethnic Cleansing Perpetrated by the State of Israel****.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9HWtiGz5LuqdYdydHcioHim5IEQYatb6Q98O8Cpy0TjJTRT6yU1JJvThwZ-ZFynI-2cmJH7HhzzzsrShJSkuHfpSJmOiIanrYDCDyT9I0IGUxVRVsCBYzlYaUHkCkfObiwbjfyiscgMNQzcYBzRN1oJVjnCyTD-IR-QyLTTqRXoUvnpc3BAxRpShjCFZc_fJzNoGP_xdy-Ik5dvW0HIVA5B0IglDvBTtyHbbTyb4J0OU039dm_rCZ5R6F891oWek40pgB3C_pWXJfM71hppPvYjuHjnEfvVOiGHjyan4aefL27U_FvrTzotoQtarlCsY7uQZ9S9GP5rJAcJA1Hie_A5x5e9co6YROxKXS3zwusdCKhtIVBQ4Pg2znZFA6fqV5HFZzlhUdPPdjB-GktHq7OfqSerucK9NHRIlI84vtwfn2FD9BpGDyN99-0aO23SGiE4OyoLboYTDxfAdwfcHT1A/4ph/srsbB22OSKORC3lImfoc8Q/h3/h001.pgW8F5aUYUgfd1S6LGNuW9Sdd_DfJW7-aCvIfz5fpCA)
Thank you for taking action and continuing to demand a better world, with safety and freedom for all.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: Peter, this is an astonishing result - but we have to make it permanent. | NPR & PBS win their lawsuit against Trump!! Trump’s executive order cutting off funding for public media violated the First Amendment! This means Trump is BLOCKED from retaliating against NPR and PBS for exposing his failed presidency. Peter, this ruling saves public media from destruction - for now. Sadly, we know that Trump will appeal this decision all the way to the MAGA-controlled Supreme Court. | There’s only one way to guarantee funding for NPR and PBS: Congressional action. Democracy On The Line –FORWARDED MESSAGE– Donald Trump just dismissed PBS and NPR as A WASTE OF MONEY! The quarter is over. The deadline has passed. I'm proud to say we made it through together. I won't bury the lede: Thanks to supporters like you, we hit our FEC End-of-Quarter fundraising goal. When that report goes public, every pundit, donor, and GOP strategist in the country will see exactly what this campaign is capable of. But here's the thing about deadlines: they're only meaningful if you use the momentum they generate. Q1 was about laying a foundation for 2026. Q2 is about proving we can win. That means ads running across Coastal Virginia. Volunteers knocking on doors in Virginia Beach, Suffolk, Chesapeake, and the Eastern Shore. Field staff training the team that will turn out voters across the political spectrum in November. The pressure of the first quarterly deadline is behind us. Now every dollar we raise goes straight to work, reaching the swing voters who will decide this race. **I'm asking you to help us hit the ground running this April. | We do things differently here in NH. **_No income tax._** **_No sales tax._** **_No capital gains tax_** **_No death tax_** That’s the New Hampshire Advantage — and it’s why families and businesses continue to move here. **But now, NH Democrats in the legislature are pushing a massive new state income tax that is higher than nearly half of all other states.** They even held a press conference on the State House steps announcing their goal of turning New Hampshire into an income-tax state. We can’t allow that to happen. **NH Senate Republicans introduced a constitutional amendment to require a supermajority vote to enact a broad-based tax.** **> >> Every Democrat voted against it.** **Another bill would have permanently banned an income tax.** **> >> Again — every Democrat voted no.** ****If they succeed, New Hampshire will start looking more like Massachusetts, Maine, or New York.**** Higher taxes.
Higher costs.
Everything will cost more.. We cannot allow that to happen. [Please help us defend the New Hampshire Advantage by making a contribution today.](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yOTc5NDE4Mzg2MTg3OTQ5MjEyJmM9dDJ3MyZlPTE5MjgmYj0xNTMxMzYwMDIyJmQ9eDJpM2QxbA==.IVk8QVQAPsNVk4YcGtgnIo-YKRUMjymIURd8ipqzRFU) Thank you, NH Senate Republicans

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | We do things differently here in NH. No income tax. No sales tax. No capital gains tax No death tax That’s the New Hampshire Advantage — and it’s why families and businesses continue to move here. But now, NH Democrats in the legislature are pushing a massive new state income tax that is higher than nearly half of all other states. They even held a press conference on the State House steps announcing their goal of turning New Hampshire into an income-tax state. We can’t allow that to happen. NH Senate Republicans introduced a constitutional amendment to require a supermajority vote to enact a broad-based tax. > >> Every Democrat voted against it. Another bill would have permanently banned an income tax. > >> Again — every Democrat voted no. **If they succeed, New Hampshire will start looking more like Massachusetts, Maine, or New York.** Higher taxes. Higher costs. Everything will cost more.. We cannot allow that to happen. Thank you, NH Senate Republicans | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | via NH Senate Republicans PAC | | | | | | Paid for by New Hampshire Senate Republicans PAC. Sharon Carson, Chairman | | P.O. A Medicaid provider flagged for overbilling is described as having "successfully argued down a $600,000 in improper payments to like a $23,000 fine," before continuing operations under a new structure. The same case is used to illustrate a broader concern that entities can "just rebrand the company and then start doing the exact same thing."

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0605aec8-1a09-4007-8874-17c676721774?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**I 'm not a career politician. I'm not a millionaire. I'm a dad and a football lover.**
So I never thought I'd have to defend our democracy from a violent mob inside the Capitol building.
I joined the Capitol Police because I wanted to serve and protect the place where our democracy happens. I swore an oath to protect the Constitution against all enemies, foreign and domestic.
**I could have never expected that oath would lead me to fight Donald Trump 's insurrectionists on January 6th, 2021.**
_For hours, I was immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, death, fear, blood, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, and bigotry as Trump 's violent mob attacked my fellow officers and tried to overturn a free and fair election._
Donald Trump did NOTHING to stop them. For three hours, he watched on TV while we were beaten bloody.
But I had confidence that I could stand strong. I knew that this is America, and here, **right matters.**
#### **[If you're ready to be on the right side of history with me, join our fight against Trump today. Chip in anything you can. Every dollar will help us take down his House Majority and defend our democracy:](https://substack.com/redirect/0605aec8-1a09-4007-8874-17c676721774?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[JOIN THE TEAM](https://substack.com/redirect/0605aec8-1a09-4007-8874-17c676721774?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_A lot has happened since that day in 2021._
I testified before Congress about what really happened. I spoke truth to power while some of the same people I protected tried to rewrite history and pretend it was just a "normal tourist visit."
I went before the Maryland Senate to support legislation that would ban Trump's pardoned insurrectionists from serving in prestigious government positions.
I've endured relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA supporters. They've called me every name in the book. They've threatened my family and me.
**But I still believe that right matters.**
Now, Donald Trump is back in the White House with unchecked power.
His MAGA enablers in Congress are letting him treat the Constitution like it's optional. They're ignoring subpoenas. They're refusing oversight. They're acting like Trump is a king instead of a president.
And I'm not going to sit back and let it happen.
**That 's why I'm running for Congress.**
Because my oath to protect and defend the Constitution didn't end on January 6th. It will never end.
Our country has lived through challenging periods before. We've overcome, persevered, and moved toward a more perfect union. We're in the middle of another fight for our country right now.
I still have faith that good can prevail over evil and that we can overcome these hard times. What is right still matters here... but only if we make it matter.
I'm ready to continue this fight in Congress. I know Trump and his MAGA machine inside and out. I've faced them before. I stood strong when it mattered most.
#### **[But I need you to stand with me now. If you're fired up to take down Trump's House Majority and hold him accountable, then it would be an honor to have your support.](https://substack.com/redirect/0605aec8-1a09-4007-8874-17c676721774?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN](https://substack.com/redirect/0605aec8-1a09-4007-8874-17c676721774?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Together, we're going to prove that right still matters in America.
Thank you for standing with me,
Harry Dunn
You're currently a free subscriber to [Standing Our Ground](https://substack.com/redirect/79f4cc8e-87fc-461e-b57b-58d228a5694a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). name: George Latimer
subject: Peter, I need your response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
Trump is making everything more expensive, and working families are footing the bill.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=nhhqpKqiNZQnuceHHZd76zK5%2BPoXep5xnxIr6MaVmgfZYb4t6UpDZnXl2dMaQFEvgkkTniCVkq%2FtCZBQmJofvpjjwEpTd7khW2zer4gpOhMQhmLaFQ2fToi84IY9L6wEdxdsTkPrnJ6lsG4fkZSeOswQE2NoPX4LihsLy6wJnWZgI21QslVi3RD30881ngrdp844ONfLpBWhZraYmaCXLIIiUGO58CXgpEqYaI2mvc%2FFwIP%2F8PBQRqiTEpb0UkG3AJCcKxQILwY%2B7fCwjNEGiWhmriJN0JZ5HiaOaJVqK8%2BYqExCSowcHl47QHmzIg6n5tASrdntf2BCk2QYaZCLpC1yIRQYNsvLFkq1E6O2Uccw0O%2Fljq2giZBbnGUTpeG8kGuXEtAdhYnbKmmL8RkxuDzmg41oE02K1zvEtKVR9xU29zVds6p2zwF7s4swh1u4)
---
| |
---
Peter, it's George Latimer. Right now, I’m hearing the same thing from families everywhere I go: costs are too high, and it’s getting harder to make the numbers work. There are far too many New Yorkers having the same conversation around their kitchen tables: whether they can afford another trip to the grocery store, another fill-up at the gas pump, or another unexpected bill. **While Republicans in Washington insist the economy has never been better, gas prices have now climbed above $4 a gallon nationally — the highest they’ve been at any point during Donald Trump’s presidency so far.** It might not mean much in Donald Trump’s gold-plated White House, but for working families, that’s more money out of every paycheck. **[That’s why I want to hear from you, Peter. Will you take a moment to share how Trump’s economy is affecting you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128733144/612178021/-1412561478?source=GL_EM_EN_040326_B1_Affordability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFmY2RkZmItYTgyZi1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4UalmgOPdDWMzUf_ApESiu54BDxDa6OYdY7TYhGm7OY=&emci=a1fcddfb-a82f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=aafcddfb-a82f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=21388742)** | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128733145/612178047/-1412561478?source=GL_EM_EN_040326_B1_Affordability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFmY2RkZmItYTgyZi1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4UalmgOPdDWMzUf_ApESiu54BDxDa6OYdY7TYhGm7OY=&emci=a1fcddfb-a82f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=aafcddfb-a82f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=21388742)
---
I’ve always believed that public service starts with listening to the folks I represent, and right now Republicans aren’t focusing on those who are most affected by Trump’s price hikes.
We need to have a serious conversation about affordability in this country. **[That's why I’m asking you, Peter: will you take a few minutes to complete our new affordability survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128733146/612178048/-1412561478?source=GL_EM_EN_040326_B1_Affordability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFmY2RkZmItYTgyZi1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4UalmgOPdDWMzUf_ApESiu54BDxDa6OYdY7TYhGm7OY=&emci=a1fcddfb-a82f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=aafcddfb-a82f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=21388742)**
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128733147/612178049/-1412561478?source=GL_EM_EN_040326_B1_Affordability&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWFmY2RkZmItYTgyZi1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=4UalmgOPdDWMzUf_ApESiu54BDxDa6OYdY7TYhGm7OY=&emci=a1fcddfb-a82f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&emdi=aafcddfb-a82f-f111-9a48-000d3a14b640&ceid=21388742)
---
I look forward to hearing from you,
George Latimer

clean_body: Trump is making everything more expensive, and working families are footing the bill. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by serving as your Congressman, representing New York's 16th District. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it's George Latimer. Right now, I’m hearing the same thing from families everywhere I go: costs are too high, and it’s getting harder to make the numbers work. There are far too many New Yorkers having the same conversation around their kitchen tables: whether they can afford another trip to the grocery store, another fill-up at the gas pump, or another unexpected bill. While Republicans in Washington insist the economy has never been better, gas prices have now climbed above $4 a gallon nationally — the highest they’ve been at any point during Donald Trump’s presidency so far. It might not mean much in Donald Trump’s gold-plated White House, but for working families, that’s more money out of every paycheck. | I’ve always believed that public service starts with listening to the folks I represent, and right now Republicans aren’t focusing on those who are most affected by Trump’s price hikes. We need to have a serious conversation about affordability in this country. I look forward to hearing from you, George Latimer * | | ---|--- = For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality. | = = Paid for by George Latimer for Congress George Latimer for Congress PO Box 789 White Plains, NY 10602 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: You can also =.

As a first-term senator who flipped this seat from red to blue in 2020, I know that National Republicans are eyeing this campaign to see if we have the strength to win again and help take back the Senate.
This seat has a habit of flip-flopping back and forth, and if Republicans win here in 2026, Democrats have virtually _zero path_ to retaking the Senate. So it's critical that we keep up the pressure and do everything we can to hold Colorado.

So it's critical that we keep up the pressure and do everything we can to hold Colorado. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Cheers! John | | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 300007 Denver, CO 80203 United States

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: We want your opinions and ideas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
We’re building a U.S. Senate campaign of, by, and for the people.
A big part of that is focusing on the issues that our communities care about most. We need to mobilize and persuade millions of Texans, and that means making sure our message speaks to the hopes and needs of the people.
James' biggest victories as a state lawmaker — from capping insulin costs, to funding our public schools, to bringing down the cost of housing and rent — were rooted in the experiences of himself and his neighbors.
So as we head into the general election, James wants to hear from you about what issues are most important to you and what motivated you to join this movement.
[**Can you take two minutes to complete our issue survey to share your priorities with us? It’s important that we hear from as many people as possible.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-apr26?source=em260403-1-ak&refcode2=559.1347274.9VyWMB?refcode=em260403-1-ak&akid=559%2E1347274%2E9VyWMB)

As James barnstorms the state, this is another way for us to get feedback from as many people as possible.
So even if you can’t make it to one of our events, we want to make sure you have a voice in this campaign.
[**If you have two minutes, take our issues survey today to make your voice heard. We are going to review the results with James soon. Your feedback will have a direct impact on our campaign.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/issues-survey-apr26?source=em260403-1-ak&refcode2=559.1347274.9VyWMB?refcode=em260403-1-ak&akid=559%2E1347274%2E9VyWMB)

# Newsom's Wife admits she gives sons dolls and gender-swaps bedtime stories
California "first partner" Jennifer Siebel Newsom admitted **[she gives her boys dolls](https://substack.com/redirect/07406934-7b6b-4efd-86e7-cb68410f967a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/07406934-7b6b-4efd-86e7-cb68410f967a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)to teach caregiving and **[swaps genders in bedtime stories](https://substack.com/redirect/07406934-7b6b-4efd-86e7-cb68410f967a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by changing "he" to "she" so her sons see women as the center of every story.
[| | | | | Breitbart News
---
@BreitbartNews
Gavin Newsom's wife Jennifer Siebel Newsom says she has tried to deprogram her boys on traditional sex roles by making them play with dolls and gender-swapping the heroes in books she reads to them
| 12:57 PM * Apr 3, 2026 * 110K Views1.57K Replies * 451 Reposts * 812 Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/c0c7d02d-b11f-4825-825e-34f9b0239834?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Dolls for Caregiving Role:** Siebel Newsom said she has given her boys dolls even if they tear the head off to learn that care and caregiving is not just reserved for women but also a responsibility of men.
* **Gender Swap in Books:** When reading a book with a male protagonist she changes "he" to "she" not only for her daughters but also for her sons because she wants them to see that women can be the center of the story and that women matter.
* **Deconstruct Gender Roles:** She described the effort as recognizing a place in history to deconstruct gender roles and ultimately be human, continuing her work to deconstruct limiting narratives about what it means to be a woman.
* **Newsom Children Ages:** The Newsom children range in age from 15 to 10, raising questions about why they are still playing with dolls amid the described household practices.

# Democrat lawmaker busted sneaking into Real Housewives bash amid DHS shutdown
Rep. Seth Magaziner, D-R.I., was caught on camera **[slipping into a premiere watch party](https://substack.com/redirect/16fd6301-f31f-4f6a-919b-02a9574d72bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for Bravo's Real Housewives of Rhode Island with reality TV stars as the partial government shutdown approached 50 days, leaving TSA workers unpaid and travelers facing long airport lines.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/16fd6301-f31f-4f6a-919b-02a9574d72bf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Side Entrance Entry:** Fox News Digital captured Magaziner attempting to stealthily enter through the side door of the upscale event at The Elliotte on Park in Cranston, R.I., where he hobnobbed and posed for photos with the cast while wearing a blue jacket and white collared shirt.
* **Co-Hosted with Democrats:** Magaziner co-hosted the 7:30 p.m. party featuring hors d'oeuvres, specialty cocktails, and door prizes with state lawmakers Rep. Jackie Baginski and Sen. Hanna Gallo, who posted an open invite encouraging attendees to bring a friend and the drama.
* **Shutdown Context:** The event occurred as Congress bickered over a DHS funding bill with Democrats refusing to allocate money for ICE and CBP, resulting in partial DHS funding, unpaid TSA employees, and hours-long airport lines during the spring recess.
* **Office Response:** Magaziner's office stated he believes it is outrageous that Speaker Johnson refuses to call the House back from recess and that he will continue holding events and meetings in his district with constituents.

# Iran downs a US F-15E Strike Eagle, puts bounty on 2nd crew member as rescue race intensifies
Iran's IRGC claimed its air defenses **[shot down a US Air Force F-15E Strike Eagle](https://substack.com/redirect/b72e9a46-98e8-4e28-91cc-edfc43210910?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** jet in central Iran on Friday, triggering an urgent American combat search-and-rescue operation for the two ejected crew members while Tehran placed a bounty on them and urged civilians to hunt them down. CBS reports that one crew member **[has now been rescued.](https://substack.com/redirect/ccf4954f-3ff7-4247-88e3-2672acea29e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/ccf4954f-3ff7-4247-88e3-2672acea29e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[| | | | | OSINTdefender
---
@sentdefender
A McDonnell-Douglas ACES II (Advanced Concept Ejection Seat) from a U.S. Air Force F-15E Strike Eagle has been found by residents in Southern Iran, the whereabouts or status of the pilot and weapons officer is currently unknown, with unconfirmed reports that one or both of the
| 12:10 PM * Apr 3, 2026 * 2.03M Views414 Replies * 2.18K Reposts * 10.9K Likes
---](https://substack.com/redirect/992926e3-047b-4f7e-af93-ccfb8a445b31?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Iranian Claim and Wreckage:** Iranian state media released images of the alleged wreckage showing an ejection seat and reported the jet was "completely destroyed and crashed" after being shot down by newly developed advanced air defenses in central Iran.
* **Urgent Rescue Operation:** Two sources confirmed the downing and that an urgent combat search-and-rescue operation is underway for the two crew members who ejected; videos on X allegedly show US aircraft flying low sweeping the area to locate the pilots.
* **Bounty and Civilian Hunt:** Iran's state television urged civilians to hunt down the American airmen, promising a "precious prize" for handing over any "enemy pilot" to police; the governor of Kohgiluyeh and Boyer-Ahmad province said those capturing or killing hostile forces would be specially commended.

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Not backing down.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
| We don’t take your support for granted.
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2045%2E259176%2EIyMCHS) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2045%2E259176%2EIyMCHS)_

In just a moment, [**I’m going to ask you to contribute to my campaign and Blue Amp Action ahead of our weekly fundraising deadline.**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10878?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.03_Schiff-Constitution_B1_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&t=4&akid=2045%2E259176%2EIyMCHS) But before I do, I want to take a moment to say thank you. Through every challenge, every headline, and every attack thrown my way (of which there are many), you have stood unwaveringly by my side. I want you to know that I never take your support and confidence for granted. And while the attacks on our work to uphold the values we share keep mounting — and will only continue to do so — your continued support motivates me to never back down from this fight. **For the sake of our democracy. Our Constitution. Our future.** Donald Trump and his allies will continue to come after me, and anyone else who stands up to him. They hope that their persistent attacks will silence and intimidate others from holding Trump’s corrupt regime accountable. But I’m not backing down. I never have, and I never will. Your support enables me to fight back even harder — not only against the attacks we’ve already faced from Trump and his allies, but against the challenges to come. [**I’m so grateful to have you on this team, and I’m asking you to have my back once more. I have a fundraising deadline in just a few days, and it would mean a lot to earn your support. Will you pitch in $10 or whatever you can to me and Blue Amp Action to help us reach our goal before the deadline?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10878?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.03_Schiff-Constitution_B1_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&t=5&akid=2045%2E259176%2EIyMCHS) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10 >>](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10879?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.04.03_Schiff-Constitution_B1_F1_S1_C1_IA_N-T0&t=6&akid=2045%2E259176%2EIyMCHS)
