body:
I was live on air when the Palm Beach Sheriff walked in. No warning. No phone call. While my team and I were broadcasting to tens of thousands of people — a
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e15157651/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvZ0RWQlhNd3Z6cQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA0MDM/LbmNseWdCUzl4Mw/qP2hpZHM9bmMwWnJTeGdaRkJYNnhscw/gadA92Q/s2u7a157f53)

| | | | | | | | | | | | | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35")
---
| Dear Patriot,
**I was live on air when the Palm Beach Sheriff walked in.** No warning. No phone call. While my team and I were broadcasting to tens of thousands of people — a deputy came through the doors of OMG headquarters and handed me a restraining order. **Served live. On camera. For the world to see.** The person who filed it? **Matthew Tyrmand** — a former Project Veritas board member who [**admitted on hidden camera that he wants me dead.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35") [****](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35") **Let that sink in.** The man who said he wants to murder me ran to a Miami courthouse and filed a domestic violence restraining order against **ME.** **And yesterday, it got worse.** I stood before a judge in Miami. He extended that restraining order **until May 11th.** And then he asked me to **surrender all of my firearms.** I'm a journalist. I operate in dangerous environments — Minneapolis mobs, government whistleblowers, cartel country. My security team carries firearms because **the threats against my life are real and documented.** **Now a court is trying to disarm me.** I need your help to fight this. Will you chip in **$35** to my legal defense fund right now? **** | [ DONATE TO JAMES'S LEGAL DEFENSE → ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35")
---
Here's what you need to understand about why this is happening:
**We are winning.**
In the past year alone, OMG investigations have generated over **1 million YouTube views** , triggered a **$9 billion Treasury audit** , and led to **$253 million in federal contracts being suspended**. Our hidden camera footage of FBI and DOJ officials has exposed corruption at the highest levels of the United States government.
**They cannot beat us in the court of public opinion. So they're trying to beat us in an actual court.**
This restraining order isn't about domestic violence. [**It's about silencing an investigative journalist who has caught too many powerful people on camera.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35") Matthew Tyrmand served on the Project Veritas board — the same board that ousted me, sued me, and has spent years trying to destroy everything I've built.
**Now they're using the legal system as a weapon.**
My legal team **filed an emergency interlocutory appeal today** challenging this order. We're fighting back on every front — First Amendment, Second Amendment, due process. All of it.
**But legal battles like this cost real money. And right now, we need your help.**
**$35** helps cover one hour of my attorneys' time fighting this appeal.
**$50** funds the constitutional research behind our emergency motion.
**$100** covers court filing fees and legal review.
**$250 or more** helps us keep fighting this all the way to the top — and fund the next investigation while we do it.
**They want me disarmed, silenced, and tied up in court while they continue to operate in the dark.**
**I'm not letting that happen.**
****
[ CHIP IN $35 TO MY LEGAL DEFENSE NOW → ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35")
---
You and I both know that if they can do this to me — served live on national television, stripped of my right to bear arms, buried under legal fees — **they can do it to any journalist who dares expose them.**
**This isn't just about me. It's about whether truth-telling journalism survives in this country.**
I've been through the raid on the journalist who had the Ashley Biden diary. I've been through Project Veritas suing me after throwing me out. I've been through the mob in Minneapolis who gave me **one hour to leave or be killed.**
**I didn't leave then. I'm not leaving now.**
But I need you in this fight with me.
Please give your most generous gift today — **$35, $100, $250** , or whatever you can — to the **O'Keefe Legal Defense Fund** hosted by Liberty Guard. Every dollar goes directly to fighting this unconstitutional order and keeping our cameras rolling.
****
[ DEFEND JAMES NOW — DONATE TO THE LEGAL DEFENSE FUND →](https://link.email.america1stwarroom. "https://secure.anedot.com/liberty-guard/lg-omg-served-on-air-hf/?utm_source=lg-omg-served-on-air&utm_medium=hf&utm_campaign=mb&amount=35")
---

In Truth,
James O'Keefe

O'Keefe Media Group

I filed an emergency appeal today. **The hearing is May 11th.** If you've ever believed in what we're doing, I need you now. team — **BREAKING: Attorney General Kris Mayes and Secretary of State Adrian Fontes are taking Donald Trump to court.** They’ve joined a coalition of states suing to block Trump’s latest Executive Order – his unconstitutional attempt to take control of our elections and decide who gets to vote. Let’s be clear about what this order would do: It would create a federally controlled list of eligible voters and restrict mail ballots only to those approved by MAGA Republicans. It’s a direct attack on our democracy. It’s a direct attack on Arizona voters. And it flies in the face of the Constitution, which is clear: **states run their own elections.** _That’s why AG Mayes and Secretary Fontes are going to court to stop it._ Here in Arizona, our elections are secure, and they’re run by Arizonans. Not by Donald Trump. More than 80% of voters in our state cast their ballots by mail — including military families, rural voters, and Tribal communities. **Trump’s order puts all of that at risk,** and the consequences would be catastrophic: chaos, confusion, and eligible voters being denied their right to vote, all just months before critical elections. That’s why Kris Mayes and Adrian Fontes are going to court, standing up to this illegal power grab **At a moment when the integrity of our elections hangs in the balance, Arizona Democrats are stepping up. But the frontline work of protecting these seats and electing more Democrats across the state takes resources.** _**[Will you rush a donation of $10 or whatever you can right now to help AZ Dems defend voting rights?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128734127/612180374/-7213939?amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20260403_PM3_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQwN2Q1YTQtYWMyZi1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tVCIyFRdqa-UyKNPpyOJeoaz3Y0vjU72uDSN464Neyk=)**_ _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/128734128/612180377/-7213939?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20260403_PM3_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjQwN2Q1YTQtYWMyZi1mMTExLTlhNDgtMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=tVCIyFRdqa-UyKNPpyOJeoaz3Y0vjU72uDSN464Neyk=)

| | | Hi -- It's Devan, Executive Director of the DSCC.

I'm about to read the responses to Pat's straw poll, but he told me **your name is marked "incomplete."** Did you miss his message?

Every unanswered poll leaves us without _vital_ information that will help shape our strategy to take back the Senate ‐‐ **so I extended your deadline to midnight tonight.** Here's the survey again to get started: **[www.dscc.org/PatStrawPoll#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/23047?ask=7&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-ND-20260403-Devan-DevanBumpPatStrawPoll-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20260403-Devan-DevanBumpPatStrawPoll-ETG-sl1&akid=23343%2E9716520%2EqPlOeN)**

Devan

Hi team, it's Pat, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

I'm reaching out because even after causing chaos at every turn all of last year, Republicans are _still_ statistically tied with Democrats in some polls!

We need to know that Democrats _everywhere_ are prepared to stand against the GOP at the ballot box ‐‐ because it's going to take _all of us_ to end their majority and put a stop to Donald Trump's agenda this year.

**We've launched our 2026 Straw Poll to make sure our grassroots team is prepared to take on Republicans once again, but I just checked our records and didn't see your response ‐‐ _so please answer immediately:_**

Every unanswered poll leaves us without vital information that will help shape our strategy to take back the Senate ‐‐ so I extended your deadline to midnight tonight. Here's the survey again to get started: Who will you support in the midterms? I'm excited to review your responses! Devan Executive Director, DSCC \---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Pat [[info@dscc.org]]() Date: March 29, 2026 Subject: Please answer immediately: – Hi team, it's Pat, the Research Director here at the DSCC. I'm reaching out because even after causing chaos at every turn all of last year, Republicans are still statistically tied with Democrats in some polls! We need to know that Democrats everywhere are prepared to stand against the GOP at the ballot box ‐‐ because it's going to take all of us to end their majority and put a stop to Donald Trump's agenda this year. We've launched our 2026 Straw Poll to make sure our grassroots team is prepared to take on Republicans once again, but I just checked our records and didn't see your response ‐‐ so please answer immediately: Who will you support in the midterms? Thank you for your input, Pat Research Director, DSCC If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please . to receive fewer emails. to unsubscribe. subject: We made the ballot. Let’s keep up the momentum!

Team!
We made the ballot! Now what?!
I’m Dain, a field organizer on David’s campaign. I’ll be real with you: Caucus and assembly showed us that Coloradans want an AG like David. But momentum doesn’t last unless we build on it.
So here’s how you can jump in right now:
Join our Volunteer Rally this Sunday, April 5th, (7–8 PM) — get inspired and learn about the ways to plug into the campaign [https://www.mobilize.us/seligmanforattorneygeneral/event/874818/] !
Phonebank with us [https://www.mobilize.us/seligmanforattorneygeneral/event/931589/] every Wednesday & Thursday (5–6:30 PM).
Sign up to volunteer + check out the Volunteer Portal [https://www.seligmanforag.com/volunteer-for-david] for ways to take action from anywhere, with info on writing LTEs, hosting events, etc.
And if you can, help us fund this work: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q2?refcode=x_260403_fieldorganizer_act]
DONATE TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q2?refcode=x_260403_fieldorganizer_act]
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q2?refcode=x_260403_fieldorganizer_act]
Our field team is what gets David’s message in front of voters, whether that’s with calls, organizing, or real one-on-one conversations across Colorado. With less than three months to go, we need to scale that work up in a major way.
Can you chip in $25 (or whatever you can) today? This is how we turn momentum into a win on Primary day. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q2?refcode=x_260403_fieldorganizer_act&amount=25]
Thank you all, and let’s do this!
— Dain, Field Team

Now he’s running for attorney general to defend our freedoms, challenge concentrated power, and build a future where working people can thrive.
He’s already doing the work. Visit SeligmanforAG.com [https://www.seligmanforag.com] to learn more.

name: Sean Feucht
subject: WE DID IT!! OVER $100K FOR CHRISTIANS IN NIGERIA!! 🙌🏼✝️🇳🇬
body:
An amazing video of us presenting a check thanks to YOUR generosity!!| | |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | Peter, We are one Church! My week in Nigeria is over, but the testimonies, stories, and miracles are too numerous to count. What is clear to me is this: our brothers and sisters in Nigeria are fighting for their lives, and while much of the world is ignoring their persecution, the Church is not. After the first attack, the Palm Sunday massacre, God made it clear that we needed to put out the call to Believers to stand in the gap and flood the nation with prayer and resources to bless them in this heartbreaking time. I said we wanted to bless them with $80,000, and thanks to the generosity of THOUSANDS of Believers, today I presented them with a check for $100,000!!! How faithful is our God!! _**WATCH THE CELEBRATION BELOW **_
---
[](https://links.seanfeuchtministries.com/s/c/9OQOx1wTYd6nx_urlZZ_ib7AiTuUdftFunPPwk7oKuMyiSBJ874viN_u4inY5gFjymoWaIsAhHW0mYa-F3Qx5OTyCo6Rbfj9CfLIMuAkU-0zXEYFvOlB0wPGRwc6cQPlARUdhgYQnGaqNSsG3pEFrB3D6CG1Zm4w59vFTCHzW5l1r9ICWYi6jb7jLYOItLqug9c6Owu-aMPT4wqf0uZylMu4wcbwseoz1yTSYPw20zDy4t3Tp72Ld6_MzQXsBrDltn4QrqjuRL6n4kcvS5JAlorhFHGR4s4y1z4C-cEbWjiX1SmeuzBY7ZuJ8SEz9aUJ-98BmQjZWsD7mD5ffe-SHBreHXDX9P2qmP6PdxrfZerobhwOqnl6ggg0Av9sqAhhzgvi8GGJGl3yIFFYsSOUO_uoYa97Jv6Z20fAqt5NamuO_V-2vA/hVoHiVI6yMMAmCC1wPZHrQXBsnJcQS5m/19)
---
From the bottom of my heart, and from the fearless pastors, missionaries, and believers on the ground, we all say THANK YOU. You are sowing into a nation that is on fire for Jesus and bearing the brunt of persecution that has marked a church on the move. This is only the beginning of what God is doing through Let Us Worship in Nigeria. clean_body: An amazing video of us presenting a check thanks to YOUR generosity!!| | | | | | | | | Peter, We are one Church! My week in Nigeria is over, but the testimonies, stories, and miracles are too numerous to count. What is clear to me is this: our brothers and sisters in Nigeria are fighting for their lives, and while much of the world is ignoring their persecution, the Church is not. After the first attack, the Palm Sunday massacre, God made it clear that we needed to put out the call to Believers to stand in the gap and flood the nation with prayer and resources to bless them in this heartbreaking time. I said we wanted to bless them with $80,000, and thanks to the generosity of THOUSANDS of Believers, today I presented them with a check for $100,000!!! How faithful is our God!! WATCH THE CELEBRATION BELOW From the bottom of my heart, and from the fearless pastors, missionaries, and believers on the ground, we all say THANK YOU. You are sowing into a nation that is on fire for Jesus and bearing the brunt of persecution that has marked a church on the move. This is only the beginning of what God is doing through Let Us Worship in Nigeria. If you want to sign our pledge to stand with the persecuted church, you can , and if you would like to give to the continued support of the Nigerian church, you can . | | Till All Hear, Sean Feucht | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- | | INTERNATIONAL DONORS— DONATE Donate by Check or Money Order Sean Feucht Ministries 310 Third Street NEWashington, DC 20002 Contributions are tax-deductible. **Iran activates Khamenei's final, catastrophic blueprint.**

⚠ EMERSON POLL -- MARCH 2026 -- SWALWELL LEADS THE FIELD
# Without This One Move,
You're Handing Swalwell
The Governor's Chair.
Right now, Eric Swalwell is the **leading Democrat in the California governor 's race** — and he's the one we have to stop.Not because California loves him. Because Republicans are about to make the same mistake they always make: pile every vote behind one candidate, let the other one collapse, and leave an empty seat for a Democrat to walk through.

He served on the House Intelligence Committee while a Chinese intelligence operative named Fang Fang helped fundraise for his campaign. He never answered for it.| Berkeley IGS Poll -- February 2026| | 🔴 Steve Hilton (R)| 17%
---|---

---|---

---|---

If Republicans don't coordinate, Swalwell wins by default. Not on merit. On math.
Here's what TBCA built this entire operation around: **the top-two primary is a math problem, not a loyalty contest.** 61 candidates are certified for June 2. 24 Democrats splitting the left vote. 23 independents pulling from the middle. If Republicans put all their chips on one candidate, only one R makes the runoff. Swalwell and another Democrat take the top two. Game over.But if Republicans split their vote between Hilton AND Bianco on purpose -- both Rs advance to the general. Every Democrat goes home. Including Swalwell.
| The Voting Buddy System -- Two Steps| **Step 1:** Pick your candidate -- Hilton or Bianco. Doesn't matter which.
---
**Step 2:** Find one Republican friend. Tell them: _"You take the other one."_ Done.
**Result:** Both Rs advance. Neither Swalwell nor any Democrat makes the top two. We win.
This is not complicated. It just requires coordination. That's what your donation funds.

clean_body: Without this one move, Swalwell wins by default. | ⚠ EMERSON POLL -- MARCH 2026 -- SWALWELL LEADS THE FIELD Without This One Move, You're Handing Swalwell The Governor's Chair. Right now, Eric Swalwell is the leading Democrat in the California governor 's race — and he's the one we have to stop.Not because California loves him. Because Republicans are about to make the same mistake they always make: pile every vote behind one candidate, let the other one collapse, and leave an empty seat for a Democrat to walk through. | 🔄 Know Your VillainEric Swalwell spent a decade in Congress doing one thing: performing outrage for CNN. He served on the House Intelligence Committee while a Chinese intelligence operative named Fang Fang helped fundraise for his campaign. He never answered for it.| Berkeley IGS Poll -- February 2026| | 🔴 Steve Hilton (R)| 17% ---|--- | 🔴 Chad Bianco (R)| 16% ---|--- | ⚠ Eric Swalwell (D) -- Leading Democrat| 13% ---|--- Source: Berkeley IGS, Feb 2026. Rs hold the top two. Swalwell is the leading Democrat — and the one we have to block. If Republicans don't coordinate, Swalwell wins by default. Not on merit. On math. Here's what TBCA built this entire operation around: the top-two primary is a math problem, not a loyalty contest. 61 candidates are certified for June 2. 24 Democrats splitting the left vote. 23 independents pulling from the middle. If Republicans put all their chips on one candidate, only one R makes the runoff. Swalwell and another Democrat take the top two. Game over.But if Republicans split their vote between Hilton AND Bianco on purpose -- both Rs advance to the general. Every Democrat goes home. Including Swalwell. | The Voting Buddy System -- Two Steps| Step 1: Pick your candidate -- Hilton or Bianco. Doesn't matter which. Step 2: Find one Republican friend. Tell them: "You take the other one." Done. Result: Both Rs advance. Neither Swalwell nor any Democrat makes the top two. We win. This is not complicated. It just requires coordination. That's what your donation funds. Ballots mail May 4. That's 35 days.We need to reach 50,000 Republican voters with this message before those ballots land. Every dollar funds that outreach.| | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- TBCA was calling this before any major pollster confirmed it. We endorsed both Hilton and Bianco simultaneously -- before it was obvious, before it was safe, before consultants were willing to touch it. We said: the math works if Republicans cooperate. The certified ballot just proved us right.We're not running for office. We're not raising money to fund ads about our feelings. We're building the infrastructure to put this strategy in front of enough Republican voters to make it work. Mailers. Digital. Voter contact. All of it. This is the best shot Republicans have had at taking back California in a decade. It doesn't happen without your support. Stop Swalwell. Fund the buddy system. Take back California.| | | | ---|---|--- P.S. Swalwell is at 17%. Hilton is at 13%. Bianco is at 11%. The gap is closable -- but only if Republicans don't waste votes. Ballots mail May 4. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2844%2E4032634%2EAMNtVP)
---
I just want to reach out to say thank you. Thank you for still being in this fight. Thank you for continuing to link arms and make each other stronger. Thank you for being a member of our grassroots movement that believes that quality child care should not eat up an entire paycheck. That the top one-tenth of the 1% percent should not be able to own as much wealth as the bottom 90% of all families combined. That corporate special interest groups should not be able to pour billions into our elections to keep the government working in their favor. That masked ICE agents should not be able to gun people down in the streets and swipe children up by their backpacks with full, unchecked immunity. That MAGA extremists shouldn't be able to stop people from voting or redraw maps or overturn election results they don't like. That we need to aggressively address the corruption coming out of the Trump administration and guarantee that no other President can hijack our government to serve as their own personal grift machine ever again. That the Democratic Party should not be more worried about offending big donors than how they’re delivering for working people. Look, our opponents want us to feel powerless. Extremists are counting on apathy, cynicism, heartbreak, or all the above to be their rocket fuel. They are counting on us to point fingers at each other and lose trust in our ability to ever, ever make change. I absolutely refuse to give them the satisfaction — and I know this team won’t either. Feeling powerless is the first step toward becoming powerless. By staying united, by refusing to surrender, we give ourselves a fighting chance. I won’t accept standing idly by and watching as Trump swats away ethics requirements and bulldozes checks and balances. We can beat the extreme MAGA vision of a country that has fewer freedoms, fewer working people able to make ends meet, and fewer voices in our democracy. And we can build something new. A country that doesn’t only work for people at the top, but for everyone. We can reimagine our tax code, with billionaires and giant corporations paying a fair share. We can pass universal child care. We can reform the Supreme Court. We can end the filibuster. We can get our government to look out for people. That’s what I’m going to keep fighting for — and I’m so grateful to have you by my side in this fight. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

---

subject: Early voter turnout is lagging behind

body:

name: Team Grijalva
subject: Looking back on an AMAZING year!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by La Gente for Grijalva_
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3ae4e6981526/weekend-of-action-for-adelita-10309582?e=f7c3700ccb)
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=47fba2cd5a&e=f7c3700ccb)
| | | | | |
# Our People Powered Campaign!
Adelita for Congress Newsletter
---
| | Hi Peter,

If you can believe it, it has been a year since we launched our **PEOPLE POWERED CAMPAIGN** for last year’s special election. We wanted to take the opportunity to reflect and look back before moving forward into another **memorable and action packed year**!
---
[|
---](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=eec5bc500f&e=f7c3700ccb)
| |
**We will be ramping back up** before we know it with many more volunteer opportunities so stay tuned to stay in the loop with **what's new on the campaign!**
---
| | If you have been with us since **DAY 1** you know how **fun, engaging, and exciting** it is to be a part of **La Maquina**. We are always trying to **GROW OUR RANKS** so if you know anyone who would like to volunteer, **send them the link below** or they can [**scan and sign up**](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=cba2e1a09f&e=f7c3700ccb)**.** There is strength in numbers as we support **Adelita, our fighter for Southern Arizona!**
---
|
---
| [SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=3f0fc52373&e=f7c3700ccb)
---
| | Lastly, **we are always grateful** to those who can donate to support our campaign. We don’t take one penny of corporate PAC dollars and our **canvasses, outreach, and voter contact** is fueled by even the smallest donations so feel free to **CONTRIBUTE TODAY!**
Thanks and see everyone soon,
Team Grijalva
---
| [DONATE](https://adelitaforcongress.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4efffbdef3b238a45f56f3bb2&id=e23456a1e4&e=f7c3700ccb)

name: RoyCooper.com
subject: The single-best thing you can do today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
body:
All we can do is ask.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
| | | |
---
| | Peter, we want to give you three reasons why you should chip in $3 to Roy Cooper’s Senate campaign today.
---
| | 1\. After a right-wing group made a seven-figure ad buy spreading lies about Roy, JD Vance came to North Carolina to double down in person.
---
| | 2\. President Trump has endorsed our MAGA opponent, and he’s taken to Truth Social multiple times in the past couple weeks alone to attack Roy personally.
---
| | 3\. The GOP’s attacks are working. Polls are tightening – with a recent poll showing this race statistically tied.
---
| | If you care about taking back the Senate for Democrats and stopping extreme Republican chaos, the single-best thing you can do today is pitch in $3 to help Roy flip North Carolina blue.
**
Now it’s up to you, Peter, and all we can do is ask:**
---
| | **[Will you make your first donation to our campaign so we have the resources we need to surge ahead, win in North Carolina and take back the Senate?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8369?t=8&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)**
---
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $3](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8370?t=9&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
---
| | [DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8371?t=10&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
---
| | [DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8372?t=11&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8369?t=12&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
---
| | Thank you for being on our team.

Team Cooper
---
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)_**
| | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6297?source=&t=4&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
---
| | [DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6298?source=&t=5&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
---
| | [SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=6&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
---
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=7&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Roy Cooper for North Carolina
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=13&akid=935%2E124072%2EuWSI1L)

name: Zoe Lofgren
subject: Republicans continue to sell out working families.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

Donald Trump and Republicans continue to sell out working families — making essentials like health care, groceries, and gas more expensive.

After cutting hundreds of billions of dollars from Medicaid and allowing premiums to double for millions of Americans, Republicans are now threatening further health care cuts to fund Trump’s reckless war.

Axios: “GOP weighs health care cuts to pay for Iran war”

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22026?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-04-03_HLC_DJT_ES-45095&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22026?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-04-03_HLC_DJT_ES-45095&amount=25]

I’m fighting to stop these cuts, Peter — but we need to take back the House to have a shot.

As Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, I’m supporting Democrats running for Congress around the state, and your support is important here. Please make a donation today to help flip red seats blue in California so we can stop Republicans from cutting our health care >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22026?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-04-03_HLC_DJT_ES-45095&amount=25]

DONATE NOW TO HELP FLIP THE HOUSE BLUE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22026?refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-04-03_HLC_DJT_ES-45095&amount=25]

Thanks to Republicans, health care premiums will double for tens of millions of Americans this year.

Grocery prices are sky-high at the supermarket.

And the average price of gas is more than $4 a gallon in America — and it’s over $6 in my district.

We’re all paying the price for Trump’s war of choice and Republicans’ misplaced priorities.

That’s why we need to take back the House and hold a check against their absolute grip on power, Peter.

So can I count on you to help flip red seats blue in California by donating to my re-election campaign today?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

EXPRESS DONATE: $5 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22026?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-04-03_HLC_DJT_ES-45095&amount=5]
EXPRESS DONATE: $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22026?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-04-03_HLC_DJT_ES-45095&amount=25]
EXPRESS DONATE: $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22026?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-04-03_HLC_DJT_ES-45095&amount=50]
EXPRESS DONATE: $100 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22026?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-04-03_HLC_DJT_ES-45095&amount=100]
EXPRESS DONATE: $250 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e-zoe-lofgren-q22026?expresslane=true&refcode=EM_ALL_ZOL_FR_1_2026-04-03_HLC_DJT_ES-45095&amount=250]

It’s up to us to end this affordability crisis.

Zoe Lofgren

Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren is a strong fighter for California’s values in Washington. As the Chair of the California Democratic Congressional Delegation, she has been on the front lines of expanding and protecting the Democratic Majority. Zoe has dedicated her career to fighting for our diverse communities and needs your help.

name: Doris Matsui
subject: Looking ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Matsui for Congress
body:
I’m focusing on what matters most: delivering real results for our communities and fighting back against threats to our democracy. | | | [](http://links.matsuiforcongress.com/s/c/E1Bxa8_bUykFplDddL5FH2_fX1UjxpVA99E-UPgXRO2zValhX1T9jMsUMdSszATbHQhiCmzvdu3wi1V3S5VJAak3KO9-CsXPyXdnTlhJjizmVAi0LtR23GWgGdE1yMDSuK6oLLEpd0ARwjz94kEqqDPJ3zVnpKbKr7dpbrmkPICzJCMBcK3HFDze2WaLCdkxV4lqXbCCebbr8xbwkAL0VetQiemM8wdftm7lr_O0CAFtNIjdB_la6Y7F_5O7ZN-S3RrCo0uZin6F9z13KsOU4oRrBgSu31_qzb7_aiy9NZFTzRNMqc-AVOcFlvhebR93qp20ol5vyujSWYhZDlyYXDTPRSlHVs7nGyLq66FACDCHvOPHoP5KO32lBZKfaHEipabbcVWLDYK-EUelGcus1R_O__v4Zc6aKRkmAdoRqS2lYoSFClCPOGIYymOdDyAY9-t9sUbr5fmmUECzKW7b1LfdR4IVEoIlHbgC1pBFS3g0ECI2GqmUi8zZ3_cgE8B8r2VknouVh1iDt0srTGLy_4UUgFlkkp7gLdWc0Io4FUWmMUgcSJs66suErsJDvNQ_szN8lpu5gBwqtRfcGfM2noE-feooZEtnMdLxG6y_8xBhsBZpJFHUmIAC9s0TgAAhBglJrP0j8Y01fr7ZqS5OwIdOrCaHh-E3zRcyVMiy_oeRru8HPAfERQpyzOVyJdMY0Zl_HSiHkzx4YGMmScNgx9EF3gfYv40MbBj7Kkei5iFnvaez1xOFjLIe8uJlv5NkbQ0yBadM9p787hhMqw-Ammx_E8wCJ29ptfXy7fr1KFWa7fObC3GnzSBYfV1-U8CGmzQleDB3uIPN-qXssqmaDybPoE62ngk8V3d28ERp1WK6LEvXsGYLbYaLJOEX6HfdBZf9vEZjlZPM4oY8vA/xbBwO7M7W7pkTtAsDiglLzcicp663_Ph/19) Friends, I’m focusing on what matters most: **delivering real results for our communities and fighting back against threats to our democracy.** There’s a lot at stake in this election. With Donald Trump and his MAGA allies throwing our country into chaos, undermining our democracy, and ignoring the needs of the people they serve, we can’t afford to slow down. When we come together, _that’s_ how real change happens. That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me. There’s a lot at stake in this election. With Donald Trump and his MAGA allies throwing our country into chaos, undermining our democracy, and ignoring the needs of the people they serve, we can’t afford to slow down. When we come together, that’s how real change happens. That’s why I’m asking you to stand with me. —Doris As a Member of Congress, Doris works to ensure that the voices of her district’s constituents are heard in Congress, and fights for the needs of the Sacramento region.
